The user can also lock themselves in place to become immovable regardless of incoming force.
24.Love Breathing
A personalized breathing style derived from Flame Breathing. Techniques are fluid and unpredictable, disguising lethal strikes within graceful, dance-like movements. Disarms opponents through apparent elegance before landing devastating blows.
25.Acid
Allows the user to secrete a corrosive acid from their skin that can melt through most materials. The potency and viscosity of the acid can be controlled at will.
26.Launch's Personality Shift
A toggleable ability modeled after the involuntary personality-switching condition of Launch from Dragon Ball. The user has a dominant natural personality — either peaceful or aggressive — and can trigger a shift into their opposite state at will. If the user is naturally more peaceful, their shifted state is aggressive and combat-hungry, granting a 3x multiplier to all offensive output for as long as it is sustained. If the user is naturally more aggressive, their shifted state is calm and composed, granting a 3x multiplier to all defensive capability for as long as it is sustained. Switching back is equally instant and voluntary. The multiplier applies only while in the non-dominant state — the natural personality receives no bonus. Additionally, while in the aggressive state, the user gains the ability to manifest most modern firearms out of thin air — rifles, handguns, shotguns, and more appear on demand, fully loaded and ready to use.
27.Parsley Park
Gwess's Stand from Stone Ocean — not to be confused with Kiss. Tracks the health and physical condition of the user and nearby allies in real time, identifying injuries, illness, internal anomalies, and their precise locations within the body with exceptional accuracy. Functions as a passive diagnostic tool that can detect damage others might not be aware of, making it invaluable for medical assessment and battlefield triage.
28.Fierce Wings
Grants the user a powerful pair of wings capable of high-speed flight and precise aerial maneuverability. The feathers can also be launched as sharp projectiles with considerable force.
29.Hardening
Allows the user to harden any part of their body into an incredibly tough, jagged surface. Greatly increases defensive capability and turns the user's body itself into a weapon.
30.Manifest
Allows the user to take on the physical characteristics of any creature they have consumed a part of. Grants the proportional strength, speed, and traits of that creature temporarily. The creature's material must not have been fully digested yet — once it passes through the system, the ability can no longer be used for that sample.
31.Red Hot Chili Pepper
Akira Otoishi's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable. Absorbs and stores electrical energy, growing dramatically stronger the more power it accumulates. Can travel through electrical currents — power lines, wiring, circuits — at extremely high speed, allowing near-instantaneous movement across any electrically connected infrastructure. Delivers devastating electrical strikes in combat, and can drain electrical devices to replenish its own power. Its one weakness is that in environments without electricity it becomes significantly weaker.
32.Universal Language Comprehension
Grants the user the ability to perfectly understand and speak any language they are aware of — spoken, written, or otherwise. Awareness requires only knowing that a language exists, not any prior exposure to it — knowing that French, Ancient Sumerian, or a magical incantation tongue exists is sufficient for immediate fluency. This extends to animal communication, computer code, magic languages, ancient and dead tongues, and any other communicative system the user knows to exist. In practice this means fluent interaction with virtually any living being, seamless use of magic systems tied to specific languages, and the ability to interface directly with machines and ancient knowledge.
33.Flower Breathing
An elegant breathing style derived from Water Breathing. Techniques flow gracefully but strike with sharp, precise cuts. Particularly effective against fast-moving targets, with several forms designed to counter evasive opponents.
34.Catch the Rainbow
Blackmore's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Allows the user to become intangible during rainfall, phasing through any physical attack as long as rain is falling on them. The more rain present, the more completely intangible the user becomes. Can also freeze raindrops in place to use as platforms or projectiles. Completely useless in dry conditions — rain must be actively falling for the ability to function.
35.Serpent Breathing
A sinuous, winding breathing style that mimics the movement of a snake. Attacks follow curved, unpredictable paths that are nearly impossible to track, allowing strikes to reach around guards and connect from unexpected angles.
36.Snatch
Ban's ability from Seven Deadly Sins. Allows the user to steal physical abilities, stats, and objects from others — grabbing strength, speed, or other physical attributes directly from an opponent and adding them to their own. At its most extreme, it can be used to physically rip the heart out of a target's chest. The more physically capable the opponent, the more there is to take.
37.Shapeshifting (Puar)
The transformative ability of Puar from Dragon Ball. Allows the user to instantly transform into any person, creature, or object they have seen or can accurately visualize, with no time limit on how long the form can be held and no restriction on how many times it can be used. The transformation is purely cosmetic — the user does not gain the abilities, strength, or powers of whatever they transform into. The only limit is the user's own knowledge and imagination — they cannot become something they have never observed or cannot mentally picture with sufficient accuracy.
38.Sound Breathing
An explosive breathing style derived from Flame Breathing. Techniques are loud, flashy, and devastating, using rapid spinning attacks and overwhelming force to disorient and destroy targets. Requires exceptional physical conditioning.
39.Illusion Magic
Projects realistic false images, sounds, and sensations into the minds of targets, deceiving their senses completely. Can be used to disorient, mislead, or terrify opponents. The complexity and believability of the illusion scales with the user's skill and magical power.
40.Shadow Clone Jutsu
Creates one or more physical copies of the user that can fight and act independently. Clones vanish after taking damage but transfer their experiences back to the user upon dispelling.
41.Silver Chariot
Jean Pierre Polnareff's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. An armored close-range Stand that wields a rapier with lightning-fast thrusts — its speed is among the highest in the series, capable of delivering dozens of stabs in an instant. Can shed its armor entirely for a significant additional boost in speed, though this leaves the user more vulnerable. The blade is precise enough to deflect bullets and strike targets at near-impossible angles. Polnareff's mastery of the Stand makes Silver Chariot a consistently deadly opponent at close range.
42.3 Tomoe Sharingan
The fully awakened form of the Sharingan. Grants the ability to perfectly perceive and copy any movement, technique, or jutsu witnessed. Also allows basic genjutsu to be cast through eye contact.
43.Rabbit
Grants the physical attributes of a rabbit — extraordinary leg strength, exceptional jumping ability, and enhanced speed. The user can cover massive distances in a single bound and deliver devastating kick-based attacks.
44.Transformation Magic
Allows the user to alter their physical appearance, taking on the form of other people, creatures, or objects with convincing accuracy. The transformation is purely cosmetic and does not grant the abilities of whatever form is taken. Useful for infiltration and deception.
45.Yumeko Jabami's Gambling Intuition
The preternatural gambling sense of Yumeko Jabami. Grants the ability to detect cheating, hidden patterns, and manipulated odds in any game almost instantly through hyper-focused observation and instinct. Also comes with an unshakeable nerve under pressure — the higher the stakes, the sharper the focus becomes.
46.Telepathy
Allows the user to communicate directly with others through thought, bypassing speech and distance. Can also be used to read surface-level thoughts or broadcast messages to multiple targets simultaneously. A powerful tool for coordination and intelligence gathering.
47.Acid Magic
Allows the user to generate and direct a potent magical acid, firing it in streams or coating surfaces in corrosive liquid capable of dissolving most materials it contacts. Unlike physical acids, its potency and spread can be adjusted through magical control alone.
48.Mist Breathing
A deceptive breathing style that uses irregular rhythm and motion to confuse opponents. Techniques appear to shift in and out of range unpredictably, making it difficult for enemies to judge timing or distance.
49.Prayer Song
Miguel Oduol's innate technique. Activated by dancing to a specific beat that is etched into the user's body. While the rhythm is maintained, the user's physical abilities are greatly enhanced and curses are actively driven away from their body — simultaneously buffing the user and debuffing nearby opponents. Functions similarly to a domain in terms of its area effect, but without requiring one.
50.Steel Ball Forging
The Zeppeli family's innate craft, carried in the hands. Allows the user to perfectly forge Steel Balls from any available metal, each one shaped and weighted to exact specifications suited for channeling Spin at the golden ratio. The quality of the balls is not dependent on the quality of the source material — whatever metal is available, the result is always a perfectly made instrument for Spin. An unlimited supply of ideal Spin mediums as long as there is metal within reach.
51.Aera
Sprouts large feathered wings from the user's back, granting the ability to fly at considerable speed and carry others through the air. Simple, reliable, and highly practical for aerial travel and combat positioning. Sustained flight consumes magical energy over time.
52.Drum Spells
Embeds six Tsuzumi drums across the body, each producing a different effect when struck. The shoulder drums rotate the surrounding room left or right, the leg drums rotate it forward or backward, the navel drum releases a slashing attack, and the back drum teleports the user or others to a different room. Only functional within an enclosed structure.
53.Black Flash
Grants the ability to use a Black Flash. Slightly increases the chances of it occurring.
54.Boogie Woogie
A technique that allows the user to instantly swap the positions of any two things that contain cursed energy by clapping their hands. This includes people, objects, and cursed spirits — anything imbued with cursed energy is a valid target. The range is determined entirely by how far the user can sense cursed energy, making it more versatile the more refined their perception becomes.
55.Electrification
Allows the user to generate and discharge electricity throughout their body. Can be used for powerful strikes, paralysis, or to enhance speed by stimulating their own muscles. Extended use risks damaging the user's own nervous system.
56.Flame Breathing
A powerful breathing style that channels explosive, forward-driving force into each attack. Techniques are bold and direct, hitting with intense heat and momentum. One of the most respected and storied styles among Demon Slayers.
57.Hamon
An ancient martial art that channels sunlight energy through controlled breathing. Can be used to enhance physical strikes, heal wounds, and is particularly effective against vampires and undead beings.
58.Wind Breathing
A fierce and sweeping breathing style that strikes with the force of a violent gale. Techniques are wide-ranging and powerful, capable of cutting down multiple targets at once with each swing.
59.Roga Fufu Ken
Yamcha's signature technique, invented during his days as a desert bandit. A purely physical style of kenpō that channels ki energy directly into the strikes rather than expelling it outward — a unique approach that makes it distinct from nearly every other technique in existence. The user fights with the characteristics of a wolf attempting to bite its prey to death, launching a relentless flurry of high-speed punches and kicks that prioritize speed above all else, often trailed by a red aura or the image of a crimson wolf itself. Finished with a double palm strike that launches the opponent away. Invented by Yamcha and assumed to be his creation alone.
60.Love
Allows the user to grant a powerful boost to a target by confessing their feelings for them. The more intense the user's love, the stronger the power transferred. Can only be activated once per day and the boost lasts for a limited time, making it a high-value trump card best saved for critical moments.
61.Insect Breathing
A swift, precise breathing style designed for a user lacking the raw strength to decapitate demons. Compensates through rapid, needle-like thrusts that inject Wisteria poison directly into the target. Highly technical and lethal at close range.
62.Air Magic
Allows the user to generate and shape currents of air into blades, shields, or concentrated bursts. Effective at any range for offense, defense, and mobility — propelling the user or launching opponents across distances.
63.Wheel of Fortune
ZZ's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. Fuses with any vehicle the user is in, dramatically enhancing its speed, power, and off-road capability. The fused vehicle can traverse virtually any terrain, extend metal spikes to grip surfaces, and weaponize fuel — spraying it from the exhaust and igniting it as a massive flamethrower. The Stand can also warp the chassis of the vehicle at will, reshaping it mid-pursuit. The user can hide inside or merge with the vehicle completely, making them difficult to target directly.
64.Jajanken
A Nen technique based on rock-paper-scissors. Rock releases a concentrated blast of Nen energy on impact. Scissors fires two sharp beams of Nen from the fingers. Paper emits a large explosion of Nen that engulfs the surrounding area. Each form requires a charge time, making timing and reading the opponent critical to landing any of them.
65.Hadoken
A concentrated ball of life energy fired from both palms thrust forward. A staple of martial arts energy combat — fast, reliable, and capable of staggering or knocking back opponents at range. Can be charged for a more powerful variant.
66.Paralyzing Gaze
A technique that, upon making eye contact with a target, locks their body in place through sheer cursed energy pressure transmitted through the eyes. The stronger the user's cursed energy, the more complete and lasting the paralysis.
67.Creation
Allows the user to create objects out of lipids extracted from their own body. The properties of the created object depend on the nutrients consumed beforehand — a versatile and highly adaptable ability.
68.Bankoku Bikkuri Sho
Master Roshi's signature electric technique, considered so lethal that he reserves it as a last resort. The user charges their hands together, converting their ki entirely into electricity, then thrusts both palms forward to fire an unavoidable electric beam at the target. If it connects, the opponent is engulfed in an electric field that delivers 20,000 volts throughout their entire body, lifting them off the ground and holding them completely immobilized until the technique is released. Capable of shocking, incapacitating, or killing a superhuman opponent depending on the output. Two significant limitations: the user cannot move while sustaining the electric field, and the charge-up time before firing leaves a brief window of vulnerability. Before being used against Goku at the 21st World Tournament, Roshi had only ever needed to use it once — against Grandpa Gohan.
69.Tenku Pekeji Ken
A powerful aerial strike technique used by Nam during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user leaps high into the air above the opponent, then descends at tremendous speed with both arms raised overhead, driving a crushing double-handed overhead blow down onto the top of the opponent's head with the full force of the fall behind it. The technique combines the user's raw strength with gravitational momentum, concentrating enormous force into a single devastating point of impact. A direct hit is powerful enough to knock out opponents of considerable physical capability for extended periods — Nam's successful use of it rendered Goku unconscious, an opponent whose physical durability at that stage of training already far exceeded normal human limits. Requires sufficient airspace to execute and telegraphs clearly during the ascent phase.
70.Afterimage Technique
A speed-based technique mastered by Master Roshi, one of the foundational skills of the Turtle School. The user moves at such extreme speed that a visual copy of their body is left behind at the original position — opponents attack the afterimage while the user has already moved elsewhere. The basic form leaves a single afterimage, creating a simple but effective feint. The advanced form, the Afterimage Strike, has the user spinning rapidly around the opponent while leaving multiple simultaneous afterimages in all directions — making it virtually impossible to identify the real body among the copies. The technique requires no ki expenditure beyond the raw speed needed to execute it, making it available at any time as long as the user can move fast enough to trigger it.
71.Roshi's Mind Reading
A telepathic technique mastered by Master Roshi, one of the greatest martial arts minds in history. Allows the user to read the thoughts of any person within range without physical contact, accessing their surface thoughts, intentions, and memories at will. Can also be used to establish two-way mental communication between people across a distance. Particularly devastating in combat — an opponent's next move, strategy, and emotional state are transparent before they act. The one consistent limitation is that it fails entirely against beings of very low intelligence, as there is simply not enough coherent thought to read.
📦 Items
1.Diego Brando's Full Outfit
The complete signature outfit of Diego Brando. Centres around his iconic equestrian helmet bearing the letters 'D', 'I', and 'O' mounted on bending pins emerging from a small ribbon tied at its front. The main outfit consists of a turtleneck jumper patterned with a diagonal grid, mid-forearm-length light gloves, light wide-legged breeches, and tall dark riding boots. Bold, precise, and unmistakably built for both racing and combat. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
2.Bulma's Full Outfit (Gypsy)
The outfit Bulma acquired at a village store immediately after finally ditching the bunny costume, worn through to her return to West City. A white shoulderless top paired with white pants and a red waistband cinching the waist, finished with a small blue jacket, gold armlets on both wrists, and red sandals. A relief upgrade from what came before, and a look that oddly suits her perfectly. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
3.Child Goku's Full Outfit
The very first outfit worn by Son Goku at the start of Dragon Ball, before receiving his trademark orange gi. A blue martial arts dougi with no markings or symbols, paired with red wristbands and a white belt tied in a bow at the front. Simple, unadorned, and worn by a boy who had barely just begun his journey. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
4.AH-64 Apache (+ 3,600x 30mm Rounds & 48x Hellfire Missiles)
A fully operational AH-64 Apache attack helicopter. One of the most feared and capable combat helicopters in existence. Armed with a 30mm M230 chain gun stocked with 3,600 rounds, 48 AGM-114 Hellfire anti-tank missiles, and rocket pods. Equipped with advanced targeting systems, night vision, and the ability to operate in virtually any weather condition. A nightmare for ground forces and armored vehicles alike.
5.The Softest Pillow in the Universe
Exactly what it says. No pillow in any corner of the universe comes close to this level of comfort. The moment your head touches it, every muscle in your body relaxes. Sleep quality increases dramatically. Fighting over it is inevitable.
6.Ryu's Full Outfit
The iconic outfit of Ryu from Street Fighter. Includes a white karate gi with the sleeves fully torn off, loose-fitting gi pants with frayed edges, a black martial arts belt, and his signature long red hachimaki headband. Also includes his red fingerless hand pads. Worn bare-footed, as Ryu prefers. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
7.Yamcha's Full Outfit (Desert Bandit)
The signature first outfit of Yamcha from Dragon Ball, worn during his days as a desert bandit. A Chinese-style martial arts ensemble consisting of a white turban and a vest, with the kanji 楽 (raku), meaning "comfort" or "easy", displayed on the chest — a personal choice reflecting nothing more than Yamcha's own preference for comfort. Paired with his signature sword, carried as a sidearm for combat. The look of a fierce and independent warrior who feared nothing but beautiful women. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
8.SCP-458 — The Never-Ending Pizza Box
A standard pizza box that, when opened by anyone, always contains a freshly made pizza perfectly tailored to that person's preferences at that exact moment — the right size, the right toppings, the right temperature. The box is never empty. The pizza is always exactly what you want. The mechanism behind it is entirely unknown. Practically useless in combat and absolutely invaluable in every other situation.
9.Steven Steel's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Steven Steel, promoter of the Steel Ball Run. A tall, commanding ensemble centered around a high-collared coat decorated with several tassels along the collar, paired with assorted trousers and small rectangular glasses. Eccentric and authoritative in equal measure — the look of a man who has reinvented himself many times and arrived at something unmistakably his own. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
10.Power Pole
Goku's legendary extending staff. Can grow and shrink on command to any length, from pocket-sized to long enough to reach the heavens. Near-indestructible and deceptively powerful as a combat weapon in the hands of someone who knows how to use it.
11.Stone Mask
An ancient artifact that, when activated with blood, transforms the wearer into a vampire. Grants superhuman strength, speed, regeneration, and the ability to manipulate their own body. A dangerous and irreversible transformation. If the Red Stone of Aja is used to channel light through this mask during activation, the result surpasses vampirism entirely — transforming the wearer into the ultimate life form, a B rank outcome.
12.M1 Abrams (+ 126x 120mm Rounds)
A fully operational M1 Abrams main battle tank. One of the most advanced and heavily armored tanks ever built, weighing in at around 70 tons with composite armor capable of withstanding most conventional anti-tank weapons. Armed with a 120mm smoothbore cannon and comes stocked with 126 rounds. Also equipped with a coaxial machine gun and two additional machine gun mounts. An absolute powerhouse on any battlefield.
13.The Paradise Herb
An extraordinarily rare herb from the Dragon Ball universe. Grants the one who consumes it Type 1 immortality — eternal life, immune to death from age or illness. However, the herb must be consumed once every 1,000 years to maintain the immortality. Failure to do so will cause the effect to lapse.
14.Pocoloco's Full Outfit
The signature racing outfit of Pocoloco from Steel Ball Run. A light, cropped tank top and pants both sporting a distinctive brick-like pattern, worn with a harness, knee-high boots, and a classic leather aviator helmet covered with distinctive elliptical pieces. During cold crossings, a long-sleeved shirt with a similar brick pattern is worn over the tank top. Racing number 777. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
15.Toji Fushiguro's Full Outfit
The signature combat outfit of Toji Fushiguro. Includes a tight-fitting short-sleeve black shirt, tan baggy training pants, a black belt woven through the waist, and black martial arts slippers. Simple, unrestricted, and built entirely for maximum physical performance. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
16.Cross Tail
A glove-type Teigu that houses a supply of near-indestructible razor-sharp threads. The threads can be woven into weapons, armor, traps, or used as sensory barriers to detect intruders. Highly versatile and best suited to creative users who can think on their feet.
17.SCP-035 — The Possessive Mask
A white porcelain comedy mask of unknown origin. When worn, it immediately seizes full control of the host's body, overriding their will entirely while the original wearer's consciousness is suppressed. The entity behind the mask is highly intelligent, manipulative, and persuasive — capable of convincing others to put it on through charm and deception alone. The mask also secretes a corrosive fluid that slowly destroys whatever surface it rests on, including the host body over time. A deeply dangerous object in the wrong hands — or on the wrong face.
18.Master Roshi's Full Outfit (Turtle Hermit)
The iconic first and most recognizable outfit of Master Roshi, the Turtle Hermit. A loud Hawaiian-style button-up shirt covered in printed letters and triangles, paired with cuffed shorts and simple sandals. Topped with his trademark dark sunglasses. A large turtle shell worn on the back with shoulder straps — the mark of the Kame School. Completed by a walking cane, carried in hand at all times. The signature look of a man who invented the Kamehameha, trained generations of the world's greatest fighters, and once destroyed the Moon — all while appearing to be nothing more than a frail, lecherous old man on a beach. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
19.Lucy Steel's Full Outfit
The signature main outfit of Lucy Steel. A short dress worn over striped tights, paired with arm warmers and tall boots — both the arm warmers and boots adorned with circular decorations throughout. Simple and distinctive, the look of a young woman navigating the chaos of the Steel Ball Run with quiet determination. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
20.Muhammad Avdol's Full Outfit
The signature main outfit of Muhammad Avdol from Stardust Crusaders. A long red flowing jellabiya — a traditional Egyptian overcoat — worn over white and beige clothing underneath, with a white headband wrapped around the head. Completed with a distinctive golden chain necklace. The overall look is striking and deliberate, mirroring the visual of the Magician card from the Rider-Waite tarot deck — fitting for a professional fortune teller. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
21.Baby Gamera
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Baby Gamera into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. A miniature version of the legendary kaiju Gamera, associated with Master Roshi. Brown and tortoise-like in appearance, with a spiked shell, a long tail, and pronounced tusks. Flies by retracting his limbs into his shell and expelling fire from the holes, spinning like a top to propel himself and any rider through the air. Nearly as fast as the legendary Kinto-Un, making it one of the quickest modes of aerial transport available. The only downside is that extended spinning causes significant motion sickness in the rider. Cooperative and willing in all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
22.Launch's General Blue Saga Outfit
Launch's outfit worn during the General Blue Saga of Dragon Ball. A pink tank top paired with black pants and white knee pads. A red ribbon is tied in the outfit. Understated but functional — the kind of outfit that works equally well for a quiet afternoon and a running gunfight. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
23.Perfector
A pair of gloves-type Teigu known as the Glorious Hands of God. Dramatically enhances the speed and precision of the user's hand movements beyond what should be physically possible, enabling surgically precise strikes and techniques at blinding speeds.
24.SCP-173 — The Peanut
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release SCP-173 into the world — after which the marble disappears and the creature remains as a permanent presence. An animate concrete and rebar sculpture of unknown origin. Extremely hostile and capable of moving at untrackable speeds — but only when no one is directly looking at it. As long as eye contact is maintained it is completely immobile. If line of sight is broken for even a moment, it will close the distance and snap the nearest neck instantly. Will readily follow the user's directions — the only orders it will refuse are those that require it to protect or spare a living being. Hunting is its nature; anything contrary to that is where its compliance ends.
25.The Red Stone of Aja
A perfectly formed gemstone of ancient and mysterious origin, said to be the ultimate form of the Aja stone. On its own it is inert, but when light is channeled through it into a Stone Mask, it pushes the transformation far beyond the standard vampire result — evolving the wearer to the absolute peak of biological existence and becoming the ultimate life form, a B rank outcome. An object of immense latent power that requires the right catalyst to unlock.
26.Gyro's Steel Balls
A pair of masterwork iron balls forged to exacting specifications by the Zeppeli family. Perfectly weighted and balanced for channeling and applying Spin, serving as the primary medium through which rotational force is transmitted to a target. In the hands of someone who knows how to use them they are devastatingly precise instruments capable of delivering Spin through walls, around corners, and into the internal structures of the body. Without knowledge of Spin they are simply two very well made iron balls.
27.Extase
A pair of large scissors-type Teigu known as the Cutter of Creation. Capable of cutting through virtually any material in existence. Their size also makes them effective as a defensive tool for blocking incoming attacks. Can emit a blinding flash of light to disorient enemies.
28.Funny Valentine's Full Outfit
The iconic pink outfit of Funny Valentine. Features a flamboyant pink jacket and overcoat over a purple shirt and pants, giving it a distinct magician's aesthetic. Includes frilled garments underneath the coat, net-patterned gloves on the upper half, a black belt, and matching pink shoes. Commanding, extravagant, and unmistakably presidential. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
29.Kryptonite (Rubix Cube Sized)
A chunk of Kryptonite roughly the size of a Rubix cube. In the presence of any Kryptonian — Superman, Supergirl, or otherwise — it rapidly drains their powers, causes intense physical pain, and will kill them with prolonged exposure. Harmless to non-Kryptonians but an absolute trump card against anyone with Kryptonian biology.
30.Gyro Zeppeli's Full Outfit
The complete signature outfit of Gyro Zeppeli. Centres around a wide-brimmed hat with slits across the crown and brim to let light and air filter through, with a pair of slit goggles situated around the crown. The main outfit consists of a short-sleeved studded black leather coat, leather pants, and cowboy boots, with a belt whose buckle bears a pair of hands and a pair of special holsters at the hips for his Steel Balls. Depending on conditions, a scarf may be worn alongside the goggles. Completed by his iconic teeth — either grills or prosthetics — with the phrase 'GO! GO! ZEPPELI' chiselled across them. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
31.Pumpkin
A large rifle-type Teigu that converts the user's spirit energy into concentrated shockwave blasts. Can be configured as a sniper or a rapid-fire weapon. Its key trait is that its firepower scales with the level of danger the user is in — the more desperate the situation, the more devastating each shot.
32.Jean Pierre Polnareff's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Jean Pierre Polnareff from Stardust Crusaders. A fitted black tube top, shoulderless except for a single strap running from the chest over the left shoulder, paired with light trousers and a belt with pouches tied to each hip. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
33.Kinto-Un
The legendary golden flying cloud from Dragon Ball. Moves at incredible speed and responds only to those with a pure heart — anyone else who tries to ride it will fall straight through. Capable of flying anywhere in the world and beyond, requiring no fuel or maintenance. One of the most reliable and fast modes of transport available to a worthy rider.
34.Hawk
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Hawk into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. The talking pig and self-proclaimed 'Captain of the Order of Scraps Disposal' from Seven Deadly Sins. Possesses the rare ability to eat magic and nullify its effects by digesting it, and can absorb the traits of anything he consumes. Cooperative and reliable in almost all situations — he will follow directions without much fuss. The only exception is orders that are outright cruel for no reason or that require him to abandon someone in genuine need. Everything else, he'll grumble about but do.
35.Giorno Giovanna's Full Outfit
The complete outfit of Giorno Giovanna. A two-piece suit featuring a heart-shaped cutout on the chest, wing-shaped emblems on the collar, and gold trim throughout. Adorned with three ladybug brooches on the chest and one below the zipper, with matching ladybug emblems on the shoes. Comes in the iconic pink and green color scheme. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
36.Johnny Joestar's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Johnny Joestar from Steel Ball Run. Centers around a star-printed knit cap with two holes at the top that let his shoulder-length hair stick out like short horns. The main outfit consists of a light blue hooded top adorned with pink stars throughout, with protruding star-patterned hearts on the shoulders and wrist cuffs. Paired with star-patterned trousers and riding boots. Simple jockey attire that grows into something iconic over the course of the Steel Ball Run. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
37.Gyumao's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of the Ox-King from Dragon Ball. A golden horned helmet with a single blue feather plume rising from the top and large circular goggle-like eye pieces on the front. A gold segmented chest plate over a purple tunic adorned with two large yellow stars on the chest, with gold shoulder guards fitted with circular studs. A flowing red cape draped over the shoulders. Blue wide-legged trousers with gold trim at the cuffs, and a white sash tied across the waist. Brown boots complete the look — the full ensemble of a king who rules through overwhelming force. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
38.Launch's Debut Outfit
The first outfit worn by Launch from Dragon Ball. A light green belly-baring crop top paired with yellow shorts cinched with a red belt, brown fingerless gloves, and red shoes worn with green socks. A red ribbon is tied in the outfit. Simple, practical, and iconic — the look of a woman who can go from cooking dinner to firing a machine gun between sneezes. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
39.Lionelle
A belt-type Teigu that transforms the user into a powerful beast form, massively boosting their strength, speed, instincts, senses, and perception. Its trump card grants high-speed regeneration capable of healing severe wounds — including lost limbs — over time.
40.Sandman's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Sandman from Steel Ball Run. Bare-chested with a deep red studded corset-like garment covering the midsection, fastened with gold rivets throughout. A decorative yellow and black zigzag-patterned collar piece sits across the upper chest and shoulders. Long yellow forearm sleeves extend from the elbows to the wrists. A cream-coloured fringed loincloth hangs at the front, held by a belt with gold square buckles. Fringed leather wrappings are bound around the lower legs, worn barefoot. Body markings include bold dark red chevron stripes across the chest, circular tribal tattoos on both upper arms, and additional patterned markings across the body. A small blade is carried tucked into the back of the belt. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
41.Gaea Foundation
A cosmetic case-type Teigu that allows the user to perfectly transform into any living creature — animals, insects, or even plants. The user gains the natural abilities of whatever form they take, enabling both deep infiltration and highly adaptable combat.
42.Joseph Joestar's Full Outfit (Part 2)
The signature battle outfit of young Joseph Joestar from Battle Tendency. Includes a dark green sleeveless tank top, blue jeans, a brown belt with a gold buckle, long brown fingerless gloves with yellow armbands, black motorcycle boots, and his iconic green and yellow striped scarf. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
43.Full Set of Hoi Poi Capsules
A complete set of Hoi Poi Capsules from the Dragon Ball universe. Each capsule can store any physical object inside it — vehicles, houses, equipment, weapons, or supplies — and instantly deploy it when thrown. The full set comes in a carrying case and includes capsules of varying sizes for storing everything from a motorcycle to a full house. An incredibly practical item for anyone who needs to carry more than their pockets allow.
44.Puar
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Puar into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. A small cat-like creature of ambiguous species who graduated from the Southern Transformation Shapeshifting Academy, mastering the art completely unlike his classmate Oolong. Can transform into any person, creature, or object imaginable — including inanimate objects — and hold the form indefinitely with no time limit. The transformation is purely cosmetic and does not grant the abilities or strength of whatever form is taken, and cannot replicate consumable substances like fuel or food. Also possesses the innate ability of self-levitation and flight. Soft-spoken, deeply loyal, and cooperative in virtually all situations — the only orders he will refuse are those that require abandoning someone he cares about in genuine danger.
45.Judo Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt (Godan)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo Godan — a 5th degree black belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains true mastery of Judo in its entirety — every throwing technique, pin, choke, armbar, and transition executed with the precision and efficiency of decades of ingrained practice. At this level throws are applied with minimal effort against fully resisting opponents, combinations flow instinctively, and the underlying principles of maximum efficiency and minimum effort are second nature. A Godan is qualified to teach and examine others at the highest levels, and their physical expression of the art borders on effortless.
46.European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery in the European pike and spear tradition — a senior grade requiring mastery across multiple polearm types alongside the spear, including the halberd, quarterstaff, and partisan. The complete Italian and German polearm canon is internalized at a level approaching the historical masters who wrote the manuals. Every thrust, bind, transition, close-measure grapple, and counter is executed with automatic precision, and the weapon's reach advantage is exploited at every opportunity with the tactical intelligence of a seasoned practitioner. In superhuman hands, a two-metre war spear driven by Provost-level mechanics at superhuman speed produces a weapon virtually unanswerable at range.
47.Aikido Grimoire — 5th Dan Godan
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Godan proficiency in Aikido — a senior instructor rank (Shidoin) representing many years of dedicated practice and deep mastery of the complete curriculum. Every technique is executed with the naturalness and precision of long internalization, and the principles of aiki are applied effortlessly against committed attacks from multiple directions. The practitioner is fully qualified to lead their own dojo and transmit the art. In superhuman hands, Aikido's joint-locking and throwing mechanics — designed to control opponents regardless of size — become capable of generating forces that no conventional body can withstand. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 8th Dan grimoire.
48.Sambo Grimoire — Master of Sports International
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master of Sports International level mastery in Sambo — the highest competitive title, reserved for athletes who have placed at the top of international championship competition. Every throwing technique, takedown, and submission in the Sambo system is executed with the automaticity and tactical intelligence of an elite international competitor. The practitioner's ability to close distance, execute throws against fully resisting opponents, and transition immediately to devastating leg locks or ground control is at the absolute peak of the sport. In superhuman hands, Sambo's combination of explosive throws and immediate submission transitions becomes virtually impossible to survive on the ground.
49.Muay Thai Grimoire — Kru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kru rank in Muay Thai — a certified instructor and master practitioner who has reached the highest level of the art's technical and competitive development. Every technique across all eight limbs is executed with the precision, power, and timing of a career professional. The clinch, which distinguishes elite Muay Thai from all other striking arts, is at a level where the practitioner can control, sweep, and devastate any opponent who enters close range. In superhuman hands, Muay Thai's eight-limb arsenal driven by superhuman power and speed — particularly the shin kick and flying knee — becomes capable of ending any confrontation with a single strike.
50.Kickboxing Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient master-level command of kickboxing — the complete technical arsenal of punches, kicks, combinations, counters, feints, and defensive movement executed with the automaticity and fight IQ of a career professional. Every technique is sharp, fast, and correctly structured, and the practitioner's ability to read opponents, control range, and string combinations is at an elite level. In superhuman hands, the speed and power of kickboxing technique driven by superhuman output makes every strike a potential finisher.
51.MMA Grimoire — Elite Champion
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of an elite championship-level MMA fighter — a top-10 ranked competitor in a major promotion, with the complete technical arsenal, fight IQ, and physical conditioning of someone who can compete for a world title. Every range — striking, clinch, takedown, scramble, and ground — is developed to an elite level, and transitions between them are seamless and instinctive. The practitioner reads opponents' patterns in real time, adapts their game plan mid-fight, and applies finishing techniques with the precision of a career professional. In superhuman hands, the complete striking and grappling integration of championship MMA becomes something no conventional fighting art can fully prepare for.
52.Eskrima Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 5th Dan Black Belt mastery in Eskrima/Arnis — a senior rank representing many years of dedicated practice and deep, broad mastery across all weapon categories. Every technique — single stick, double stick, knife, espada y daga, staff, and empty hand — is executed with fluid automaticity and tactical intelligence. The flowing, continuous attack-and-defense that defines Eskrima at its highest levels is fully internalized. The practitioner reads and responds to armed opponents with the instincts of a career fighting artist. In superhuman hands, Eskrima's principles of continuous striking and simultaneous attack-defense become nearly impossible to interrupt.
53.Silat Grimoire — Mahaguru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mahaguru rank in Silat — the grandmaster level, representing the absolute pinnacle of the art. Every technique of the style — striking, sweeping, locking, grappling, and weapons — is executed with effortless automaticity and devastating efficiency. The Mahaguru's understanding of Silat's biomechanics, deceptive entries, and the art's characteristic ability to flow seamlessly between ranges makes them one of the most difficult practitioners to engage at close quarters. In superhuman hands, Silat's close-range destruction principles applied at grandmaster level become something few opponents could survive.
54.Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master-level command of the American Bowie knife fighting tradition — the level of the frontier knife duelists who built the reputation of the Bowie as the most feared close-quarters weapon on the American frontier. Every technique is executed with complete automaticity, the practitioner reads and exploits openings with the speed and decisiveness of a career fighter, and the Bowie's weight and cutting geometry are used to maximum efficiency at every range. In superhuman hands, the Bowie's combination of reach, mass, and master-level technique makes it a weapon of extraordinary lethality.
55.Italian Stiletto Grimoire — Maestro
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Maestro-level mastery of Italian stiletto fencing — the highest grade in the tradition, representing complete command of the art's theory and practice. Every technique is executed with automatic precision at speeds approaching the limits of human reaction time. The practitioner understands the complete corpus of Italian dagger theory and can generate lethal thrusting force with minimal telegraphing. In superhuman hands, the stiletto at Maestro level becomes a weapon capable of ending any confrontation in a fraction of a second at close range.
56.Navaja Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master-level command of the Spanish Navaja fighting tradition — the level of the professional Navajero whose skill with the folding blade was legendary in Spanish and Latin American fighting culture. Every technique is executed with effortless automaticity, the practitioner's control of distance and timing is prescient, and the Navaja's curved blade is used with devastating efficiency at all ranges from long slashing to close thrusting work. In superhuman hands, Navaja technique at master level applied with superhuman speed produces a blade fighter of extraordinary lethality.
57.Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 5
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 5 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — the highest military-grade level of the system, equivalent to the training of elite Russian special forces operators. Every technique is executed with the effortless, economical precision that Systema's founders described as using 25% physical force and 75% natural flow. The practitioner can engage multiple armed opponents simultaneously, disarm under extreme conditions, and apply knife technique with a directness and adaptability that conventional martial arts cannot easily prepare for. In superhuman hands, Systema's principle of total relaxation combined with explosive, precise striking produces knife work of devastating efficiency.
58.Goku's Full Outfit (First Turtle Gi)
The first Turtle Hermit uniform gifted to Son Goku by Master Roshi upon completing his training at Kame House, worn for the first time at the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. An orange martial arts gi with the Kame kanji (亀) — meaning "turtle" — printed on both the front chest and back, representing Goku's student status under Master Roshi and the Turtle School's philosophy of pushing oneself beyond all limits. Paired with a black belt, blue wristbands, and blue toe shoes with white socks. The outfit Goku wore through some of his most iconic early battles. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
59.Sojutsu Grimoire — Menkyo
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo of a koryu sojutsu school — a formal teaching license representing many years of dedicated practice and deep mastery of the school's complete spear curriculum. Every technique is internalized at a level that allows transmission to others, and the practitioner's command of distance, timing, and the weapon's balance is expert. The yari's extraordinary reach combined with master-level technique makes this a devastating combination in any combat context. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo Kaiden grimoire.
60.Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 5th Dan (Godan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 5th Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — the highest dan grade in the modern federation system, above which only the shogo teaching titles of Renshi, Kyoshi, and Hanshi exist. Every technique in the curriculum is executed with precision and naturalness, forms are performed with the depth of long internalization, and the practitioner's command of the weapon's extraordinary reach and cutting geometry is at an expert level. The naginata's combination of a long cutting blade and extended reach, wielded at this level of mastery, is exceptionally difficult to counter with any shorter weapon.
61.Qiang Grimoire — Si-Gung (Master's Master)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Si-Gung level of Chinese spear — a master whose students have themselves become instructors, representing the highest tier of practical mastery in the traditional lineage. Every technique, form, and combat principle of the style's spear system is fully internalized at the level of the founding generation. The nine-year mastery curve that gives the weapon its traditional name has been fully traversed and exceeded. In superhuman hands, the penetrating force of a two-meter war spear wielded with the whipping power generation of a Si-Gung produces thrusting strikes of extraordinary velocity and force, far beyond what the weapon's size would suggest.
62.Assegai Grimoire — Induna (Warrior Commander)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills and tactical awareness of an Induna — a Zulu warrior commander, appointed directly by the king for demonstrating exceptional individual fighting ability, leadership, and battlefield intelligence. Every technique of Shaka's reformed close combat system is executed with complete automaticity and devastating efficiency. The Induna fights with the weapon at the absolute peak of the tradition — the iklwa and shield combination at this level mirrors the Roman legionary's gladius and scutum in its systematic lethality, delivering fast, decisive thrusts with the shield controlling the opponent's ability to respond. In superhuman hands, the explosive aggression and penetrating force of iklwa technique at this level becomes almost impossible to survive at close range.
63.Kenjutsu Grimoire — Menkyo
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo — a formal teaching license within a koryu school, representing a level of mastery requiring many years of dedicated practice. Every technique in the school's curriculum is internalized to a high degree, and the practitioner understands the art deeply enough to transmit it to others under a senior instructor's oversight. Combat instincts, sensitivity to the opponent's blade, and the ability to apply technique against fully resisting opponents are all at an expert level. In superhuman hands, the battlefield-refined techniques of a koryu school become lethally efficient beyond any conventional measure. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo Kaiden grimoire.
64.European Longsword Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery in the European longsword tradition — a senior grade requiring mastery across multiple weapon systems alongside the longsword, including sword and dagger, unarmed combat, and polearms. The practitioner has an encyclopedic command of the historical sources, has publicly proved themselves through extended Prize Playing bouts against numerous senior opponents, and is qualified to teach independently. Every major technique of the German and Italian schools is internalized at a level approaching that of the historical masters who wrote the manuals. In the hands of someone with superhuman physical output the cutting and thrusting mechanics of this tradition become devastating beyond any conventional measure.
65.Rapier Grimoire — Maestro
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the rank of Maestro di Scherma — the highest grade in the historical and classical rapier tradition, requiring mastery across multiple weapons and a profound understanding of the art's theoretical foundations. The practitioner has internalized the complete corpus of Italian fencing theory, executes all techniques with effortless precision, and is qualified to maintain their own school and certify others. Point control, sentiment du fer, and the reading of an opponent's intent are at a level that borders on prescient. Physical strength multiplies the penetrating force of every thrust dramatically — in superhuman hands, the rapier becomes a weapon of surgical lethality.
66.Sabre Grimoire — Maestro
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the rank of Maestro — the highest grade in classical sabre fencing, requiring mastery of the complete system across all weapon categories and the ability to certify others. The practitioner commands every cut, thrust, and counter in the tradition with complete automaticity, fights with the economy of motion and tactical intelligence of a seasoned duelist, and understands the biomechanics of the weapon at a level that allows them to extract maximum efficiency from every exchange. In superhuman hands, the sabre's combination of speed and devastating cutting force becomes almost impossible to defend against.
67.Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient master-level command of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing — the highest attainment in the tradition, representing complete mastery of the system as documented by the historical masters and refined through generations of military and civilian use. Every technique is executed with total precision and automatic instinct, the guard system is impenetrable at this level of mastery, and the cutting mechanics deliver force with devastating efficiency. In superhuman hands the basket-hilted broadsword, swung with master-level mechanics, becomes a weapon of extraordinary destructive capability.
68.Dao Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient master-level command of Chinese Dao swordsmanship — a level of attainment representing complete internalization of the style's principles, forms, and combat applications. Every technique flows with effortless precision, power generation is maximized through perfect mechanics, and the practitioner can adapt the art's principles to any combat situation. In superhuman hands the Dao's slashing power, amplified by correct Chinese biomechanical principles, delivers force that can cleave through obstacles far beyond what the weapon's size would suggest.
69.Taekwondo Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt (O Dan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the 5th Dan level — a senior master rank qualifying the practitioner as a head instructor. Decades of expertise are transferred instantly: all techniques from foundational through advanced are executed with effortless precision, kicks are devastatingly fast and controlled, and the practitioner possesses deep understanding of the art's biomechanics, pressure points, and combat applications. Physical strength multiplies the effectiveness of every technique dramatically — in the hands of a superhuman practitioner, Taekwondo at this level becomes something else entirely.
70.Guruguru Gum
A magical technique used by Giran, a member of the Monster Race who competed in the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user spits a sticky, rubbery substance from their mouth that wraps around a target and binds them completely. The defining property of Guruguru Gum is that it is self-tightening — the more the victim struggles and strains against it, the more constricting it becomes, making conventional attempts to break free actively counterproductive. The substance is magical in nature and cannot be torn or broken through ordinary physical force alone. A target with sufficient ki or magical power beyond a certain threshold can break through it, but for anyone below that ceiling it functions as an effectively inescapable restraint.
71.Jackie Chun's Full Outfit (21st Tournament)
The disguise outfit worn by Master Roshi during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament under the alias Jackie Chun. A dark navy formal martial arts gi worn without a turtle shell, paired with dark sunglasses and a white wig glued firmly to the head — the complete ensemble of a man who entered a children's martial arts tournament in disguise to ensure his students never grew complacent from winning too easily. Simple, understated, and completely unconvincing to anyone paying attention. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
72.Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Tuhon
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Tuhon — the grandmaster rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Tuhon is the guardian and master of the complete Pekiti Tirsia Kali system — a rank representing total mastery of one of the most combat-proven Filipino martial arts in existence. The system spans over 25 countries and is used to train military and law enforcement in Asia Pacific, India, and Europe. Grand Tuhon Leo T. Gaje Jr., the current guardian and source of the system, is a three-time Hall of Fame awardee and one of the greatest living legends of Filipino martial arts. The bearer receives the complete technical and tactical expression of Pekiti Tirsia Kali at its absolute highest level — a lifetime of combat-oriented knife and blade mastery with no equivalent in modern martial arts.
73.Kyudo Grimoire — 8th Dan (Kyoshi)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a Kyoshi — an 8th Dan master title in Kyudo, meaning professor of the philosophy of the art. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. At the 8th Dan level, the shooting has reached perfection in technique — every movement, every breath, every release is an expression of the art at its highest technical expression. The Kyoshi title requires holding the Renshi title, passing the 8th Dan examination with a pass rate that historically falls below one percent on any given attempt, and waiting years between examinations. The bearer possesses total mastery of Kyudo in both its technical and philosophical dimensions.
74.Composite Bow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a composite bow master — the absolute peak of the tradition across all cultures that developed it, from the Mongols and Turks to the Persians and Scythians. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and fully refined command of the composite bow across all its applications — instinctive accuracy at range, mounted shooting in all directions, rapid fire at full gallop, and the ability to extract the maximum performance from the bow's exceptional power-to-size ratio. Turkish flight archers using the composite bow held world records for distance shooting for centuries. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the composite bow's combination of compact size and exceptional power becomes something medieval armies had no reliable answer for.
75.Recurve Bow Grimoire — Olympic Champion
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of an Olympic and World Champion level recurve archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Olympic recurve is the only bow form permitted in the Olympic Games, and the athletes who reach champion level represent the absolute technical ceiling of the form. The bearer gains complete mastery — perfect form, a completely consistent and repeatable shot cycle, near-perfect groupings at 70 meters under full competition conditions, the ability to read and adapt to wind in real time, and the mental discipline to perform at the highest level under maximum pressure. Combined with any significant physical enhancement, the recurve bow at this level can be pushed far beyond what any human body currently allows.
76.Crossbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a master crossbow operator — the absolute ceiling of what can be achieved with the weapon across all its forms and traditions. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains total command of the crossbow in every form — from light hunting crossbows to heavy siege weapons — with instinctive accuracy, perfected reloading speed, and deep knowledge of bolt types, trajectories, and effective engagement scenarios. Combined with extraordinary physical strength, the already formidable penetrating power of a heavy crossbow becomes even more devastating.
77.Shortbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a shortbow master — the absolute peak of what has been achieved with a shortbow across all traditions. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and refined command of the shortbow across all its applications — instinctive close-range accuracy, rapid fire at speed, mounted shooting in all directions, and the ability to exploit the shortbow's unique maneuverability advantages to their fullest. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical speed and coordination, the shortbow's rate of fire and close-range precision become a genuinely lethal combination.
78.Longbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a longbow master — the Howard Hill tier, the absolute peak of what a human being can achieve with a longbow. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Howard Hill, widely regarded as the greatest longbow archer in recorded history, could hit a target thrown into the air, split an arrow at range with a second, and consistently drive arrows clean through large game at hunting distances. The bearer gains a lifetime of mastery — instinctive aiming without sights, perfect mechanical release through the back muscles alone, the ability to gauge range and wind intuitively, and the speed and accuracy to deliver rapid effective fire in any conditions. Combined with extraordinary physical strength, the penetrating power and range of the longbow at this level is genuinely staggering.
79.Sumo Grimoire — Yokozuna (Grand Champion)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of a Yokozuna — the Grand Champion rank of professional sumo, the highest title a wrestler can achieve. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Only 75 wrestlers have ever been awarded this rank across all of recorded sumo history. Promotion requires not just two consecutive tournament championships but a demonstration of the dignity, bearing, and dominance befitting the sport's living embodiment of its ideals. Unlike every rank below it, Yokozuna cannot be demoted — a holder who can no longer perform at the required level is expected to retire. The bearer receives the complete physical and technical expression of sumo at its highest level — explosive tachi-ai, overwhelming forward pressure, mastery of every kimarite in the canon, and the ability to control any opponent's movement from the moment of contact. Combined with any significant physical ability beyond the human norm, the power, leverage, and technique of a Yokozuna scales to something else entirely.
80.Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a catch wrestling master — the Karl Gotch and Billy Robinson tier, the highest level the art has ever produced. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Karl Gotch, known in Japan as the God of Wrestling, and Billy Robinson, regarded as one of the most technically complete grapplers who ever lived, represent the absolute ceiling of catch-as-catch-can. The bearer gains a complete lifetime of refined catch wrestling knowledge — every takedown, control position, pin, submission, counter, and re-counter executed with the total economy of motion and tactical depth that defines grandmaster level grappling. Billy Robinson famously stated that the key to catch wrestling is learning how to learn — at this level, every combat situation encountered becomes an opportunity to adapt and counter in real time. Combined with any significant physical ability, the principles of this art scale without limit.
81.Boxing Grimoire — Undisputed Champion
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of an undisputed world champion in professional boxing. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Undisputed status — holding all four major world titles simultaneously across the World Boxing Association, World Boxing Council, International Boxing Federation, and World Boxing Organization — is one of the rarest achievements in all of sport. In the modern four-belt era, fewer than a handful of fighters have ever accomplished it. The bearer gains the complete mastery of a fighter who has beaten every credible challenger their weight class has produced — flawless technical execution under maximum pressure, championship-level conditioning, an intuitive ability to adapt mid-fight, and the psychological fortitude to perform when everything is on the line. Combined with extraordinary physical attributes, the boxing knowledge in this grimoire scales without limit.
82.Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — 6th Degree Black Bel
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 6th degree black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu — the highest achievable black belt rank before the coral belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Reaching the 6th degree requires a minimum of 31 years as a black belt. The bearer possesses a complete and deeply refined understanding of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu across every dimension — technique, strategy, teaching methodology, and combat application. Every movement is executed with the effortless precision of a lifetime practitioner. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the leverage and submission principles of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu at this level become something else entirely.
E
E RankSTANDARD
108 entries
▼
⚡ Powers / Abilities
1.Hey Ya!
Pocoloco's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Manifests as a small, cheerful figure that sits on the user's shoulder and whispers encouragement, reassurance, and strategic advice directly into their ear. It cannot fight directly and offers no combat capability whatsoever. Its sole function is psychological support — bolstering the user's confidence, restoring resolve in desperate situations, and helping them maintain focus when they would otherwise falter. The advice it gives is remarkably accurate and timely, making it an unexpectedly valuable companion in high-pressure moments.
2.Jan Ken
Goku's signature technique from early Dragon Ball, based on rock-paper-scissors. Rock delivers a powerful straight punch. Scissors strikes with two fingers aimed at the eyes. Paper is an open-palm strike to the face. Simple, unpredictable, and surprisingly effective in the hands of someone fast enough to land any of the three.
3.Anivoice
Allows the user to command any animal they speak to, bending it to their will. Works on a wide range of creatures and can be used to gather intel, create diversions, or overwhelm enemies with wildlife.
4.Big Fist
Dramatically enlarges the user's fists, massively amplifying the impact and reach of their punches. Simple but brutally effective at close range.
5.Hair Control
Grants the user complete control over their own hair, allowing it to be extended, hardened, and manipulated freely. Can be used to grab, restrain, or strike targets at a distance.
6.Earphone Jack
Allows the user to plug long, flexible earphone jacks from their earlobes into surfaces, transmitting the sound of their own heartbeat as a powerful shockwave that can shatter objects and disorient enemies.
7.Breaking (B-Boying)
Complete mastery of breaking — the street dance born in the Bronx in the 1970s at the intersection of hip-hop, funk, and athletic expression. The practitioner commands all four foundational elements: toprock, the standing dance that opens a set with rhythm and attitude; footwork, the rapid floor-based leg patterns using the hands for support; power moves, the acrobatic full-body rotations including windmills, headspins, flares, airflares, and turtles that require exceptional upper body strength and momentum; and freezes, held poses that suspend the body off the ground through core and arm strength alone. Transitions between all elements are seamless and musical, hitting breaks in the beat with precision. At master level the practitioner can improvise complete competitive sets in a cypher, battle opponents with original combinations, and execute advanced power moves including the one-handed airflare. An Olympic sport since the 2024 Paris Games.
8.Saruken (Crazy Monkey Technique)
A wild improvised fighting style created by young Goku during his match against Jackie Chun at the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament as a direct counter to the Sui-Ken drunken fist style. The user mimics the erratic, frenzied movements of a monkey — scurrying, scratching, leaping, and attacking from unpredictable angles with no discernible pattern. The style is deliberately chaotic and unreadable, making it nearly impossible to predict or counter with a conventional fighting approach. Goku used his tail to trip Jackie Chun and scratched at his face — attacks no trained martial artist would expect from an opponent in a formal tournament setting. The technique works precisely because it abandons all structure, making it uniquely effective against opponents who rely on reading and responding to conventional technique.
9.Sui-Ken (Drunken Fist)
A martial arts style mastered by Master Roshi and used during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament under his Jackie Chun alias. The user mimics the swaying, stumbling movements of a drunk person — creating a combat style that is almost entirely unreadable. The irregular rhythm, unpredictable footwork, and unconventional attack angles make it nearly impossible for an opponent to anticipate the next strike, as the body appears to be off-balance at all times while actually being in complete control. The style incorporates striking, grappling, joint locks, dodging, feinting, and aerial techniques all woven through the same deceptive movement pattern. Roshi himself stated he chose this technique against Goku precisely because Goku had never experienced intoxication and therefore had no reference point to counter it — a strategy that briefly even stumped one of the most naturally gifted fighters in the world.
10.Tornado!
A rapid spinning rush technique used by young Goku during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user tucks into a tight spinning motion and launches themselves at the opponent at high speed, delivering a flurry of rotating strikes as they close the distance. The spin makes it difficult to read the exact angle and timing of the incoming attack, and the rotational momentum adds force to each hit. Simple in concept but effective as a close-range approach tool — particularly useful for breaking through an opponent's guard or closing distance too quickly for them to react.
11.Bacterian's Super Stench
The legendary hygiene-based fighting technique of Bacterian, one of the most feared competitors in the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. A toggleable ability — when active, the user emits an overwhelming and all-encompassing stench produced by a complete and deliberate lifelong refusal to bathe, brush teeth, or practice any form of personal hygiene whatsoever. The odor is so catastrophically powerful that it functions as a genuine combat tool — opponents within range are overwhelmed by nausea, watering eyes, and complete loss of focus, rendering them unable to fight effectively regardless of their power level. The ability is entirely bypassed by anyone without a functioning sense of smell. When toggled off, the stench subsides entirely — and unlike the original Bacterian, whose filth was permanent and irreversible, the user retains the option to thoroughly wash and clean themselves while the ability is inactive, restoring normal hygiene for as long as they choose to maintain it. Toggling the ability back on gradually restores the stench to full potency over time.
📦 Items
1.Atlatl (+ 10 Javelins)
A masterwork atlatl — a spear-throwing lever that dramatically extends the range and force of a thrown javelin by adding mechanical leverage to the throw. Comes with 10 masterwork javelins, each hand-forged with a steel tip and a perfectly balanced hardwood shaft. Capable of launching a javelin with enough force to punch through light armor at range.
2.Katana
A masterwork katana forged by a top-tier Japanese swordsmith using traditional tamahagane steel. Perfectly balanced, with a razor-sharp edge that holds its sharpness exceptionally well. The blade features a flawless hamon and comes with a custom-fitted lacquered saya.
3.Scimitar
A masterwork scimitar forged from high-carbon steel. A curved single-edged blade optimized for fast, slashing strikes from horseback or on foot. Perfectly weighted toward the tip for maximum cutting momentum, with a grip shaped for fluid one-handed use.
4.Yari
A masterwork yari with a hand-forged double-edged steel blade mounted on a hardwood shaft wrapped in lacquered cord. Perfectly balanced for precise thrusting at range. One of the most refined spear designs ever developed.
5.Labrys
A masterwork labrys — a double-headed axe with two symmetrical hand-forged steel blades mounted on a hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for two-handed use, capable of delivering powerful strikes from either direction without repositioning. An iconic weapon with ancient origins.
6.Halberd
A masterwork halberd combining an axe blade, a steel spike, and a rear hook on a long hardwood shaft. Perfectly balanced for its length, capable of chopping, thrusting, and pulling mounted opponents from their saddles. One of the most versatile polearms ever designed.
7.Claymore
A masterwork two-handed claymore forged from high-carbon steel. A massive, broad double-edged blade designed to be swung with both hands for devastating cleaving power. Despite its size, it is perfectly balanced — quick for its weight in the hands of someone strong enough to wield it.
8.War Pick
A masterwork war pick with a hand-forged steel head featuring a sharp, hardened pick on one side, mounted on a hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use. The pick concentrates force into a needle point capable of punching through plate armor where bladed weapons fail.
9.Short Sword
A masterwork short sword forged from high-carbon steel. Compact, perfectly balanced, and razor-sharp. Designed for speed and precision in close quarters, with a grip shaped for a secure hold in any conditions.
10.Bardiche
A masterwork bardiche with a long, curved single-edged blade attached along much of a tall hardwood pole. Perfectly weighted for powerful two-handed chopping strikes with exceptional reach. One of the most powerful cutting weapons ever fielded.
11.Partisan
A masterwork partisan featuring a broad spearhead with two lateral projections near the base, mounted on a reinforced hardwood pole. Perfectly balanced for thrusting and for catching and redirecting an opponent's weapon. A weapon of both function and prestige.
12.Sling (+ 30 Stones)
A masterwork sling crafted from braided leather, perfectly balanced for accurate throws at range. Comes with 30 smooth, weighted stones selected for consistent flight. In skilled hands, capable of delivering devastating blunt force at distances that far exceed a thrown weapon.
13.Estoc
