A masterwork estoc forged from high-carbon steel. A long, rigid, double-edged blade with no cutting edge — designed entirely for thrusting with enough force to punch through gaps in plate armor. Perfectly balanced for precision and reach, deadly against armored opponents.
14.Ranseur
A masterwork ranseur with a central thrusting spike flanked by two curved prongs, mounted on a long hardwood shaft. Perfectly balanced for thrusting and trapping an opponent's blade between the prongs to disarm or control them in combat.
15.Fauchard
A masterwork fauchard with a long curved single-edged blade mounted on a hardwood pole, featuring a back-spike for hooking and thrusting. Perfectly balanced for sweeping cuts, hooks, and thrusts at extended range.
16.Messer
A masterwork Messer forged from high-carbon steel. A long single-edged blade with a knife-style handle, combining the reach of a sword with the chopping power of a heavy blade. Perfectly balanced for one or two-handed use, with a straight crossguard and a grip that allows a wide range of fighting techniques.
17.Saber
A masterwork saber forged from high-carbon steel. A slightly curved single-edged blade built for fast, aggressive slashing from horseback or in close combat. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use, with a basket hilt protecting the hand.
18.Broadsword
A masterwork broadsword forged from high-carbon steel. A wide, double-edged blade suited for powerful slashing and thrusting in equal measure. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use, with a cruciform hilt and a grip that allows a firm hold in any grip style.
19.Naginata
A masterwork naginata forged using traditional Japanese tamahagane steel, with a curved single-edged blade mounted on a lacquered hardwood pole. Perfectly balanced for sweeping cuts, thrusts, and keeping opponents at distance. Comes with a protective cover for the blade.
20.Jerrycan of Magic Fuel (20L)
A 20-litre jerrycan filled with a mysterious magical fuel that works as a power source for absolutely anything — vehicles, weapons, machines, generators, or anything else that requires fuel of any kind. Never produces the wrong type — it simply works, regardless of what it's poured into.
21.Dragon Slayer
The massive sword wielded by Guts from Berserk. An enormous slab of iron roughly as tall as a man, too large and heavy to be considered a conventional sword. Despite its crude construction, its sheer size and weight make it capable of cleaving through armor, monsters, and multiple enemies in a single swing. Has absorbed so much demonic blood over the years that it now repels evil and astral beings on contact.
22.Tomahawk
A masterwork tomahawk with a hand-forged steel head and a straight hardwood handle. Perfectly balanced for both one-handed combat and throwing. Lightweight, fast, and highly effective at close range or as a precision thrown weapon.
23.Valkyrie
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Valkyrie into the world — after which the marble disappears and she remains as a permanent companion. A 4-year-old stock horse of possible Australian origin, ridden by Gyro Zeppeli throughout the Steel Ball Run. Known for her exceptional stamina and durability, she has a plain coat and a distinctive mane tied and cut into a row of four flat-topped buns. She wears a dark hood covering most of her head, with openings for her mouth, eyes, ears, and a strand of hair, with several cloth straps across her neck and bandaging at the cannons. She has a unique quirk of swaying to her left every eight breaths — a habit that can be exploited by a skilled Spin user to generate tremendous rotational force. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
24.Cutlass
A masterwork cutlass forged from high-carbon steel. A slightly curved, single-edged blade built for fast, powerful slashing in confined spaces. Perfectly weighted for one-handed use, with a solid D-guard protecting the hand. As effective on land as it is at sea.
25.Voulge
A masterwork voulge with a broad, cleaver-like blade fixed to a long hardwood pole. Perfectly weighted for powerful chopping strikes at extended range. Simple in design but brutally effective against both armored and unarmored targets.
26.Zweihänder
A masterwork Zweihänder forged from high-carbon steel. A massive two-handed sword designed to be wielded by those with extraordinary strength and reach. The long blade features a ricasso — an unsharpened section near the hilt for half-swording in tight combat. Perfectly balanced for its size, and capable of sweeping through multiple opponents in a single swing.
27.Rapier
A masterwork rapier forged from high-carbon steel. An exceptionally thin, needle-sharp blade designed purely for speed and thrusting precision. Perfectly balanced in hand, with an ornate swept hilt that doubles as a guard for deflecting incoming blades. The weapon of choice for a technically skilled duelist.
28.#1
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release #1 into the world — after which the marble disappears and it remains as a permanent companion. A 4-year-old Boulonnais horse, ridden by Mongolian horseman Dot Han during the Steel Ball Run race. A powerful and sturdy breed, the Boulonnais is known for its strength and endurance. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
29.AK-47 (+ 3 Magazines)
One of the most iconic and reliable assault rifles ever made. Chambered in 7.62x39mm, built to function in virtually any conditions, and almost impossible to jam. Comes with 3 fully loaded 30-round magazines for a total of 90 rounds. Effective at close to medium range and instantly recognizable worldwide.
30.Lloyd Frontera's Shovel
The signature weapon of Lloyd Frontera from The Greatest Estate Developer. More than just a tool — holding it activates the passive skill 'The Shovel and I Are One!', dramatically boosting all of the wielder's physical stats. In the hands of someone with the right build, this humble shovel becomes a genuinely fearsome weapon.
31.Glaive
A masterwork glaive with a long single-edged blade mounted on a hardwood pole. Perfectly balanced for sweeping cuts and thrusts at extended range. The blade is razor-sharp along its full length, making it effective against both armored and unarmored opponents.
32.Ghost Rider in the Sky
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Ghost Rider in the Sky into the world — after which the marble disappears and she remains as a permanent companion. A 5-year-old mustang ridden by Mountain Tim throughout the Steel Ball Run. A sturdy and reliable horse with the endurance befitting a mount ridden by one of the race's leading competitors. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
33.Gladius
A masterwork gladius forged from high-carbon steel. A short, double-edged blade designed for close-quarters combat — fast, precise, and deadly in tight formations or one-on-one. Perfectly balanced, with a contoured grip for an iron-tight hold.
34.Broadaxe
A masterwork broadaxe with a wide, flat hand-forged steel head and a long hardwood handle. Perfectly balanced for powerful two-handed chopping strikes. The broad cutting edge maximizes damage across a wide arc with each swing.
35.Lance
A masterwork cavalry lance crafted from hardwood with a reinforced steel tip. Long, perfectly balanced for couched use on horseback, and capable of delivering devastating impact force at a full charge. Lethal in the hands of a mounted warrior.
36.Spear
A masterwork spear with a hand-forged high-carbon steel head, fitted to a hardwood ash shaft reinforced with metal bindings. Perfectly weighted for both thrusting and throwing. The tip holds a fine, durable edge capable of piercing most conventional armor.
37.Pike
A masterwork pike with a hand-forged steel head mounted on a long hardwood shaft reinforced with metal bands. Designed to keep enemies at extreme distance and form an impenetrable wall in formation. Perfectly weighted for sustained use.
38.High-End Gaming PC
A top-of-the-line custom-built gaming and workstation PC. Specs: AMD Ryzen 7 9800X3D CPU, Nvidia RTX 5090 32GB GDDR7 GPU, 128GB DDR5-6000 RAM, 8TB PCIe 5.0 NVMe SSD, 360mm AIO liquid cooler, 1200W 80+ Platinum PSU, all housed in a Lian Li O11 Dynamic EVO XL case. Comes fully assembled, Windows installed, and ready to use.
39.Mossberg 500 Shotgun (+ 18x 12 Gauge Shells)
A reliable and widely used pump-action shotgun. Sturdy, straightforward, and devastating at close to mid range. Comes loaded with 18 twelve-gauge shells — enough for a prolonged engagement. Each shell delivers a wide spread of buckshot capable of stopping most threats in their tracks.
40.Nokia 3310 (SIM Included)
A near-indestructible mobile phone with a pre-installed SIM card. Calls, texts, and Snake. Battery lasts for days. Won't break no matter what you put it through.
41.Bearded Axe
A masterwork bearded axe with a distinctive hooked lower blade, hand-forged from high-carbon steel on a hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use. The beard hook can catch an opponent's weapon or shield to pull it aside, creating openings for follow-up strikes.
42.Trident
A masterwork trident with three sharp high-carbon steel prongs mounted on a reinforced hardwood shaft. Perfectly balanced for thrusting, trapping weapons, and controlling opponents. As effective in open combat as it is at sea.
43.Dane Axe
A masterwork Dane axe with a large, elegantly curved hand-forged steel head mounted on a long hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for sweeping two-handed strikes at extended range. One of the most feared weapons of the Viking age — fast, powerful, and devastatingly effective.
44.Spontoon
A masterwork spontoon featuring a broad leaf-shaped blade with two lateral lugs, mounted on a long hardwood pole. Perfectly balanced for thrusting and parrying. Combines the function of a spear with a commanding presence.
45.Wakizashi
A masterwork wakizashi forged using traditional Japanese tamahagane steel. The shorter companion blade to a katana, designed for close-quarters combat and fast draws in confined spaces. Perfectly balanced, with a razor-sharp edge and a flawless hamon. Comes with a custom lacquered saya.
46.Colt Python Revolver (+ 18x .357 Magnum rounds)
A powerful and reliable revolver chambered in .357 Magnum. Comes with 18 rounds, enough for 3 full cylinders.
47.Francisca
A masterwork Francisca — the iconic Frankish throwing axe — with a hand-forged steel head and a curved hardwood handle. Perfectly balanced for throwing, with an unpredictable bouncing trajectory that is nearly impossible to deflect. Equally effective in close combat.
48.Stimpack
A single-use medical syringe from the Fallout universe. Instantly accelerates the body's natural healing process, rapidly closing wounds and restoring health in seconds. A staple of wasteland survival and invaluable in the middle of a fight.
49.Enhancement Stone
A one-time use consumable. Apply it to any item of your choice to slightly strengthen its capabilities. Once used, the stone crumbles to dust.
50.Battle Axe
A masterwork battle axe with a broad hand-forged steel head and a sturdy hardwood handle. Perfectly weighted for devastating one or two-handed strikes. The wide blade concentrates tremendous force on impact, capable of cleaving through armor and shields alike.
51.PP Candy (x3)
Three pieces of Bulma's infamous invention from Dragon Ball, disguised to look like ordinary sweet mango-flavoured candy balls. Anyone who eats one will suffer severe stomach cramps and diarrhea whenever anyone — not just the distributor — utters the trigger phrase "Pii-Pii." The effect activates instantly upon hearing the phrase regardless of the victim's power level or toughness, and repeats every time the phrase is said for a full month before wearing off. Three candies means three separate targets can be placed under this condition simultaneously. Completely harmless to those who don't eat them, and pure misery for those who do.
52.Long Sword
A masterwork hand-and-a-half longsword, custom-forged from high-carbon steel. Perfectly balanced for both one and two-handed use, with a sharp double edge, a tapered point for thrusting, and a leather-wrapped grip. A weapon built to last a lifetime of serious combat.
53.Barrett M82 (+ 3 Magazines)
A semi-automatic anti-materiel sniper rifle chambered in .50 BMG. Designed to destroy equipment and vehicles as much as personnel, with rounds capable of penetrating light armor and concrete cover. Comes with 3 fully loaded 10-round magazines for a total of 30 rounds. Effective range exceeds 1,800 meters in the right hands.
54.Silver Bullet
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Silver Bullet into the world — after which the marble disappears and it remains as a permanent companion. A 4-year-old mix of an Arabian horse and a Thoroughbred, ridden by Diego Brando throughout the Steel Ball Run. Distinguished by a light-colored mane and coat and a star-shaped mark on its forehead. While being ridden it is adorned with a bridle and reins, with Diego's jockey number, 001, displayed on its side. An exceptionally capable horse possessing remarkable strength, endurance, and agility. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
55.Falchion
A masterwork falchion forged from high-carbon steel. A single-edged blade with a widening curve toward the tip, concentrating weight at the point of impact for powerful chopping strikes. Perfectly weighted and exceptionally sharp along its cutting edge.
56.Judo Grimoire — 1st Dan Black Belt (Shodan)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo Shodan — a 1st degree black belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains full technical competence across Judo's complete throwing curriculum, fluid combination attacks, advanced groundwork including chokes, armbars, and complex transitions, and the competition-hardened timing to apply technique against fully resisting opponents. Shodan represents the end of the beginner's journey — every foundational technique is ingrained and functional under pressure.
57.European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Free Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Free Scholar-level proficiency in the European pike and spear tradition — an advanced grade requiring demonstration of considerable expertise in both technique and historical source material. The practitioner has a thorough command of the Italian and German polearm curricula: all major thrusting sequences, transitions between guards with full footwork, half-staff grips for close-measure work, grappling applications using the shaft, and the application of techniques from Fiore's spear sections and Meyer's staff and halberd teachings. Public Prize Playing against senior opponents has been passed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
58.Aikido Grimoire — 1st Dan Shodan
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Shodan proficiency in Aikido — the first black belt, marking the end of the beginner's journey and the true beginning of study. The complete kyu-level curriculum is deeply internalized: all foundational throws, pins, and joint locks are executed with fluency from both static and moving attacks. The practitioner understands the underlying principle of aiki — meeting force with redirection rather than resistance — and applies it consistently under pressure. A Shodan-level Aikidoka is a genuinely capable martial artist. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
59.Sambo Grimoire — Master of Sports
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master of Sports level proficiency in Sambo — a nationally recognized title awarded to competitors who meet strict performance standards at major competitions. The complete throwing, takedown, and submission curriculum is deeply internalized and proven under live competitive conditions. Leg locks, heel hooks, and the brutal combat Sambo striking-to-grappling transitions are all executed with dangerous proficiency. A Master of Sports Sambo practitioner is a serious and complete grappler by any standard. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master of Sports International grimoire.
60.Muay Thai Grimoire — Nak Muay Khao
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Nak Muay Khao level mastery — the designation for a skilled competitive Muay Thai fighter with a complete arsenal across all eight limbs. The clinch game, elbow work, and knee strikes that elevate Muay Thai above other striking arts are fully developed and pressure-tested through competitive bouts. The practitioner reads and controls range, sweeps opponents off balance, and lands devastating combinations from the clinch with the instincts of a seasoned fighter. At this level the practitioner is among the most dangerous stand-up fighters in any context. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Kru grimoire.
61.Kickboxing Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level proficiency in kickboxing. The complete striking curriculum — punches, kicks, combinations, counters, and defensive movement — is deeply internalized and pressure-tested through competitive sparring. The practitioner reads and reacts to opponents at speed, chains combinations fluidly, and fights with the timing and rhythm of an experienced competitive fighter. At this level the practitioner can hold their own against and defeat most opponents they encounter in a stand-up exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
62.MMA Grimoire — Professional Fighter
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of a professional MMA fighter — someone who trains full-time across all combat domains and earns their living competing under unified rules. Striking, clinch work, takedowns, scrambles, ground control, and submissions are all integrated at a high level and pressure-tested through years of live sparring and competitive bouts. The practitioner understands how to impose their game plan, neutralize an opponent's strengths, and exploit openings across all ranges simultaneously. A professional MMA fighter is one of the most comprehensively dangerous unarmed fighters on the planet at any given weight class. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Elite Champion grimoire.
63.Eskrima Grimoire — 1st Dan Black Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 1st Dan Black Belt proficiency in Eskrima/Arnis — the entry point of black belt mastery in the Filipino fighting arts. The complete foundational curriculum is deeply internalized: all twelve strike angles, basic and intermediate disarms, espada y daga (sword and dagger) combinations, empty hand applications derived from weapon techniques, and sparring proficiency with full protective equipment. A 1st Dan Eskrimador is a genuinely dangerous fighter with a stick, blade, or empty hands. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
64.Silat Grimoire — Guru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Guru rank in Silat — a full master level, representing deep mastery of the complete art. All jurus, applications, weapon techniques, and the deceptive, low-to-the-ground combat principles that define Silat are fully internalized. The Guru fights with the flowing, unpredictable transitions between striking, sweeping, and grappling that make Silat extraordinarily difficult to read. Weapon work — particularly with the kerambit at close range — is executed with lethal precision. A Guru is fully qualified to open their own school and transmit the art. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mahaguru grimoire
65.Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Experienced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Experienced-level proficiency in the American Bowie knife fighting tradition. The practitioner has thorough command of the complete system — all major cuts, thrusts, parries, traps, and the aggressive forward pressure that characterizes the frontier style at its most effective. Timing, distance, and the reading of an opponent's intent with a blade are well developed. A practitioner at this level has the skill and instinct to win against most knife fighters they encounter. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
66.Italian Stiletto Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery of Italian stiletto fencing — a level requiring many years of training and public proving against experienced opponents. All major techniques of the tradition are deeply internalized, thrusting speed and precision are exceptional, and the practitioner's ability to control measure and timing at blade-close range is expert. A Provost-level stiletto fencer is one of the most dangerous opponents imaginable in the confined spaces where the dagger excels. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
67.Navaja Grimoire — Practiced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient a Practiced level of mastery in the Spanish Navaja tradition. The complete cutting and thrusting curriculum of the style is deeply internalized, footwork is fluid and instinctive, and the practitioner reads and exploits openings with the speed and decisiveness of an experienced blade fighter. The Navaja's combination of reach, curved cutting geometry, and the tradition's aggressive rhythm of continuous attack are all exploited at their most effective. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
68.Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 3
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 3 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — an advanced level covering the full knife and counter-knife curriculum. All attack, defense, and disarm sequences are executed with the fluid, deceptive continuity that defines Systema at higher levels. The practitioner can operate effectively against single and multiple armed opponents, maintains psychological composure under extreme duress, and applies knife technique with the efficiency and directness of special forces training. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Level 5 grimoire.
69.NR-40 Combat Knife
A masterwork Russian NR-40 combat knife forged from high-carbon steel. The standard fighting knife of Soviet and Russian special forces, with a single-edged blade featuring a false edge on the spine, a simple steel guard, and a textured wooden grip. Designed for both thrusting and cutting in close-quarters combat with a simple, no-nonsense profile that prioritizes function over form. Perfectly balanced and built to last under harsh conditions.
70.Navaja
A masterwork Spanish navaja — a large folding knife with a locking blade, forged from high-carbon steel. The blade is long, slender, and slightly curved, razor-sharp along its full length. The navaja was the weapon of the Spanish working class and a mainstay of street and dueling culture for centuries, developing an entire fighting tradition around its reach and cutting ability. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use and folds flat for concealment.
71.Stiletto
A masterwork Italian stiletto forged from high-carbon steel. A long, slender, needle-pointed blade with no cutting edge — designed purely for thrusting with the force to punch through gaps in clothing, light armor, and between ribs. Perfectly balanced for rapid repeated thrusting at very close range. The weapon of the Italian schools of dagger fencing and a favorite of professional duelers for centuries.
72.Bowie Knife
A masterwork Bowie knife forged from high-carbon steel. A large single-edged fighting knife with a clip point, a brass guard, and a stacked leather grip. The clip point allows for fine thrusting work while the heavy blade delivers powerful cuts. Originally designed by Jim Bowie as a dueling weapon capable of blocking an opponent's blade and immediately retaliating. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use in close quarters.
73.Kerambit
A masterwork kerambit forged from high-carbon steel. A small curved blade modeled after a tiger's claw, worn with the finger ring over the index finger for a secure grip that cannot be disarmed. The curved geometry concentrates cutting force into a hooking draw cut that tears rather than slices, devastating against flesh and tendons. Compact, concealable, and extraordinarily dangerous at grappling range.
74.Pinuti
A masterwork Filipino Pinuti, the signature single-edged blade of Eskrima and Arnis. A short to medium-length sword-knife with a wide fuller along the spine and a distinctive flared tip optimized for slashing. Perfectly weighted for rapid figure-eight cutting motions and close-quarters strikes. Sharp along the full length of its curved edge and capable of both deep cuts and thrusting
75.Sojutsu Grimoire — Mokuroku
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mokuroku of a koryu sojutsu school — a scroll cataloguing the complete curriculum of techniques the practitioner has mastered. The full set of the school's spear kata is deeply internalized, including techniques against multiple weapon types. Distance management, thrusting precision, and the ability to apply techniques against fully resisting opponents are all well developed. A Mokuroku-level sojutsu practitioner is a formidable fighter with the yari. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo grimoire.
76.Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 3rd Dan (Sandan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 3rd Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — a meaningfully advanced rank requiring several years of dedicated practice past black belt. The complete shikake-oji curriculum, advanced forms, and bogu sparring are all executed at a high level. Combinations, transitions, and reading an opponent's distance and timing are well developed. A Sandan-level naginata practitioner is a serious and dangerous fighter with the weapon. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
77.Qiang Grimoire — Sifu (Instructor)
— A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Sifu level of Chinese spear — an instructor-grade within the traditional Chinese lineage system, representing deep and broad mastery of the complete spear curriculum. The practitioner has internalized all major forms, understands the underlying combat principles of the style's spear work, and is qualified to teach others. The whipping, coiling, and thrusting power generation characteristic of Chinese spear at the highest levels — transmitting force in a wavelike motion from the spine through the full length of the weapon — is fully developed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Si-Gung grimoire.
78.Assegai Grimoire — Izikhulu (Veteran Warrior)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills of a senior Zulu Izikhulu veteran — a battle-hardened warrior who has served in the chest of the buffalo formation and fought in multiple campaigns. Iklwa technique is refined through live combat experience, shield work is instinctive, and the practitioner reads the rhythms of close-quarters battle with the awareness of a soldier who has survived many of them. Combination attacks, counter-thrusts, and the explosive short-range burst that defines Zulu close combat are all executed with dangerous proficiency. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Induna grimoire.
79.Kenjutsu Grimoire — Mokuroku
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mokuroku — a scroll cataloguing the full curriculum of techniques the practitioner has mastered within the school. At this level the practitioner has a thorough command of the school's complete kata set, understands the combat principles underlying each technique, and executes them with the precision and naturalness of long internalization. Timing, distance, and reading an opponent's subtle intent are well developed. A Mokuroku holder is a serious and dangerous swordsman. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo grimoire.
80.European Longsword Grimoire — Free Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Free Scholar-level proficiency in the European longsword tradition — an advanced grade requiring demonstration of considerable expertise in both technique and historical source material. The practitioner has a thorough command of the Ringeck and Danzig glosses, executes complex techniques from the masters' manuals with precision, and has proven themselves in competitive free-play against senior opponents through the trial of Prize Playing. At this level the practitioner can assist in teaching and has been publicly tested in open sparring against multiple senior opponents. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
81.Rapier Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery of historical rapier fencing — the lesser teaching grade, requiring many years of training and public Prize Playing against multiple senior opponents. The practitioner has thorough command of the Italian and Spanish systems, executes all major techniques from the historical masters' treatises with precision, and reads and responds to an opponent's blade with the sensitivity characteristic of a trained fencer. Qualified to teach under the oversight of a Master at Arms. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
82.Sabre Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level proficiency in military sabre fencing. The practitioner has a thorough command of the full cutting and thrusting curriculum, executes compound actions, feints, and counter-attacks with precision, and has developed the explosive speed and decisive commitment that defines sabre at the highest competitive and military levels. Capable of holding their own against and defeating most practitioners they encounter. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
83.Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level mastery of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing. The practitioner has a thorough command of the complete cutting and thrusting system, executes compound actions and counter-cuts with decisive speed, and fights with the relentless forward pressure and controlled aggression that defines the Highland style at its most effective. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
84.Dao Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level mastery of Chinese Dao swordsmanship. The practitioner has a complete command of the style's forms and applications, understands the combat principles of continuous flowing attack and defence, and executes techniques with speed and power. The Dao's slashing capability and the leverage generated by its curved geometry are fully exploited at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
85.Taekwondo Grimoire — 1st Dan Black Belt (Il Dan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the 1st Dan level — the entry point of black belt mastery. All color belt techniques are fully internalized alongside advanced poomsae and sparring instincts honed to expert level. The practitioner can perform board and brick breaking with precision, reads opponents' movements rapidly, and fights with the efficiency and economy of motion characteristic of a trained black belt. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan Black Belt grimoire.
86.Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Mataas na Guro
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Mataas na Guro — the master instructor rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Mataas na Guro translates as respected teacher and represents a level of mastery sufficient to independently run a school and transmit the full system. The bearer has complete command of the Pekiti Tirsia Kali curriculum across all ranges — long, medium, and close — and across all weapon categories including the single blade, double blade, stick and blade combinations, and empty hand. The system's survival strategy and tactics have been field-tested and validated by special forces units across multiple countries, and the bearer's knife and blade fighting knowledge reflects this practical, combat-proven foundation.
87.Kyudo Grimoire — 6th Dan (Renshi)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a Renshi — a 6th Dan instructor title in Kyudo, meaning polished instructor. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Excellence of technique is far more prominent than in previous levels — the bearer's shooting form flows naturally and is characterized by a high degree of refinement. The Renshi title is awarded not by examination alone but by selection and recommendation, recognizing both technical mastery and the character to transmit the art. The bearer possesses a complete and deeply internalized command of Kyudo, capable of reading and correcting the form of others with precision.
88.Composite Bow Grimoire — Mongol Horse Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a composite bow master — the absolute peak of the tradition across all cultures that developed it, from the Mongols and Turks to the Persians and Scythians. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and fully refined command of the composite bow across all its applications — instinctive accuracy at range, mounted shooting in all directions, rapid fire at full gallop, and the ability to extract the maximum performance from the bow's exceptional power-to-size ratio. Turkish flight archers using the composite bow held world records for distance shooting for centuries. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the composite bow's combination of compact size and exceptional power becomes something medieval armies had no reliable answer for.
89.Composite Bow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent composite bow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The composite bow — constructed from layers of wood, horn, and sinew — is one of the most technologically sophisticated bows in history, producing significantly more power and range from a shorter length than a simple wooden bow. The bearer gains foundational composite bow technique — the Mongolian thumb draw, proper use of the thumb ring, correct posture and anchor, and accurate shooting at combat distances. The composite bow's compact size makes it well-suited to mounted use and confined spaces where longer bows cannot function.
90.Recurve Bow Grimoire — National Competitor
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a national-level competitive recurve archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains the refined technical skill and mental composure of an archer who has competed and placed at national championship level — consistent groupings at 70 meters, mastery of the stabilizer and sight system, complete command of the release and follow-through under competition pressure, and the ability to perform with precision in variable wind conditions. At this level, the recurve bow is pushed to the peak of what the archer's body and technique can deliver.
91.Crossbow Grimoire — Marksman
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of an expert crossbow marksman. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. At marksman level, the bearer has fully mastered the crossbow's accuracy potential — capable of consistent precision hits at extended range, rapid reloading through refined technique, effective engagement of moving targets, and the tactical knowledge to use the weapon's high penetrating power and mechanical precision to maximum effect. Medieval crossbows at full power could penetrate plate armor at close range and were accurate enough for individual target selection at distances that challenged even experienced longbowmen.
92.Shortbow Grimoire — Mounted Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a skilled mounted shortbow archer — the Mongol horse archer tradition, considered the most complete expression of shortbow mastery in history. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Mongol horse archers trained from early childhood and could deliver accurate fire in any direction from a galloping horse — including the famed Parthian shot, firing backwards at full gallop while retreating. The bearer gains the full skill set of this tradition — the Mongolian thumb draw producing faster reloading than finger draw techniques, accurate fire at the gallop in all directions, target selection and range estimation at speed, and the tactical understanding of mobile archery that helped the Mongol armies conquer from the Pacific to central Europe.
93.Longbow Grimoire — War Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of an elite English war longbow archer — the longbowman who shaped medieval warfare at Crécy, Poitiers, and Agincourt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. English war archers began training in childhood and were typically considered fit for full duty only by the age of 21, with skeletons showing significant skeletal deformation from years of high-poundage drawing. The bearer gains the full skill set of a professional war archer — capable of loosing 10 to 12 accurate arrows per minute with a 130 to 160 pound draw weight bow, penetrating chainmail and some plate armor at 250 yards, and sustaining this rate through an extended engagement. Against any unarmored opponent at range, the result is not in question.
94.Sumo Grimoire — Ozeki
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of an Ozeki — the second highest rank in professional sumo, requiring a minimum of 33 wins across three consecutive elite tournaments for promotion. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Only a handful of active wrestlers hold this rank at any given time. The bearer gains the refined technical mastery and championship-level fighting instincts of a wrestler who has consistently defeated Yokozuna and all competition below. At the Ozeki level, every throw, push, and grip is executed with total efficiency — the bearer can change tactics mid-bout in an instant, exploit micro-imbalances in an opponent's posture, and generate devastating force through proper weight transfer and timing rather than raw strength alone.
95.Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Professional Competitor
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a professional catch wrestling competitor. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Catch wrestling at the professional level was historically contested in carnival athletic shows and professional bouts where the full range of submission holds — armbars, kimuras, heel hooks, toe holds, neck cranks, and countless others — were not just permitted but expected. The bearer gains a complete and battle-tested grappling arsenal built around the pin-and-submit methodology, seamless transitions between positions, advanced control rides, and the ability to apply submissions from virtually any position. The emphasis on improvisation and adaptability makes this a uniquely dangerous style in unpredictable real-world situations.
96.Boxing Grimoire — Contender
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a ranked professional boxing contender. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. A ranked contender has navigated the professional circuit long enough to earn a top fifteen position in their weight class from one of boxing's four major sanctioning bodies — the World Boxing Association, the World Boxing Council, the International Boxing Federation, or the World Boxing Organization. The bearer gains the full skill set of a fighter one or two bouts away from a world title shot — refined defensive technique, sharp counter-punching instincts, the ability to cut off the ring and control distance, and the mental composure to perform under sustained pressure. Against anyone short of elite professional level, the result is rarely in doubt.
97.Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — 1st Degree Black Belt
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 1st degree black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu is among the rarest and hardest earned in all martial arts — typically requiring 10 to 15 years of serious training. The bearer has complete command of the entire Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu curriculum, can fight effectively from any position, and has internalized the art's core principle of using leverage and technique to defeat larger, stronger opponents. The 1st degree represents the beginning of true mastery.
F
F RankBASIC
78 entries
▼
📦 Items
1.Dagger
A masterwork double-edged dagger forged from high-carbon steel. Needle-sharp point, perfectly balanced for both thrusting and slashing. The grip is wrapped in quality leather for a firm hold in any conditions.
2.Horse
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release the horse into the world — after which the marble disappears and it remains as a permanent companion. Strong, fast on open ground, and capable of carrying a rider over long distances. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty. One of humanity's oldest and most reliable companions.
3.Crab
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release the crab into the world — after which the marble disappears and it remains. Will generally go where directed — it mostly just does crab things. It pinches. That's about it.
4.Pickaxe
A masterwork pickaxe with a hand-forged steel head and a hardwood handle. Perfectly balanced for powerful downward strikes. The pointed tip concentrates all force into a single devastating point, capable of punching through hard materials.
5.Chakram (5x)
A set of 5 masterwork chakram — circular throwing discs with a sharpened outer edge, forged from high-quality steel. Perfectly balanced for throwing with a flat, spinning release. Each one capable of slicing through flesh and light materials with a well-aimed throw.
6.Mars
A chocolate bar filled with soft nougat and caramel, coated in milk chocolate. Rich, sweet, and filling.
7.Pairs of Socks (2x)
Two pairs of basic socks. Dry feet make a bigger difference than you'd think.
8.Full Tarot Card Pack
A complete 78-card tarot deck including all 22 Major Arcana and 56 Minor Arcana cards. Features the full set: Fool through World, plus all four suits — Wands, Cups, Swords, and Pentacles. Comes with a guidebook. Whether used for readings, games, or collection, it's a full and proper deck.
9.Oreos
A pack of classic Oreo cookies — two crispy chocolate wafers sandwiching a sweet cream filling. Best twisted apart first, obviously.
10.Wooden Table
A solid wooden table with four legs and a flat surface. Big enough for a meal, a game, or spreading out your things. Goes well with the chair.
11.Coca-Cola (1.5L)
A 1.5 litre bottle of Coca-Cola. Ice cold, fizzy, and timeless. The classic.
12.Christmas Tree
A full artificial Christmas tree, pre-assembled and ready to decorate. Comes with a stand. Lights and ornaments not included — that part's up to you.
13.Milky Way
A light, fluffy nougat bar coated in milk chocolate. Softer and lighter than most chocolate bars — easy to eat, easy to enjoy.
14.Pepsi (1.5L)
A 1.5 litre bottle of Pepsi. Slightly sweeter than its rival with a distinct cola flavour. Refreshing and familiar.
15.Throwing Daggers (20x)
A matched set of 20 masterwork throwing daggers, precision-forged for consistent weight and aerodynamics. Each blade is balanced to spin predictably in flight and hold a fine edge through repeated use.
16.Pilum
A masterwork Roman pilum with a long iron shank and a hardwood shaft, perfectly constructed to bend on impact — preventing the enemy from throwing it back and adding weight to their shield. Devastating as a thrown weapon before closing in for melee combat.
17.KitKat
A classic chocolate-covered wafer bar, split into four breakable fingers. Crispy, light, and satisfying. Have a break.
18.Bolas (5x)
A set of 5 masterwork bolas, each consisting of weighted balls connected by braided cord. Thrown at a target's legs to wrap around and bring them down. Perfectly weighted for consistent throws and reliable entanglement.
19.Yamaha U1
One of the most widely used upright pianos in the world. A compact vertical piano with a warm, balanced tone and a responsive touch, equally at home in a living room or a professional studio. Comes fully tuned and ready to play.
20.Wooden Chair
A sturdy, standard wooden chair with four legs and a backrest. Functional, reliable, and gets the job done. Sit down.
21.Kunais (20x)
A set of 20 masterwork kunai, hand-forged from high-quality steel. Perfectly balanced for throwing, with a sharp double edge for close combat use. Each one consistent in weight and edge quality — far above standard-issue tools.
22.Boomerang
A masterwork returning boomerang, shaped and weighted for a reliable return arc. Capable of striking a target at range and returning to the thrower when thrown correctly. Also effective as a close-range striking weapon.
23.White Shirt
A plain white shirt. Nothing special, but it covers your back.
24.Shuriken (20x)
A set of 20 masterwork shuriken, hand-forged from high-quality steel. Perfectly balanced for throwing, with sharp edges across all points. Consistent in weight and spin — far above standard-issue tools.
25.Black Pants
A pair of sturdy black pants. Comfortable enough for movement in most situations.
26.Torch
A basic handheld torch. Provides a steady flame for light, warmth, or starting a fire. Low-tech but reliable when everything else runs out of battery.
27.Steinway Model D
The gold standard of concert grand pianos. At nearly 9 feet long, it is the instrument of choice for professional pianists and major concert halls worldwide. Produces a rich, powerful, and extraordinarily expressive sound across its full range. Comes fully tuned.
28.Tonfa
A masterwork tonfa crafted from dense hardwood with a reinforced steel cap on the striking end. Perfectly weighted for blocking, sweeping strikes, and close-range combat. A step above any standard-issue baton.
29.Flashlight
A battery-powered handheld flashlight. Bright, reliable, and easy to carry. An essential piece of kit for navigating the dark.
30.Martin D-28
One of the most legendary acoustic guitars ever crafted. A dreadnought-body guitar with a Sitka spruce top and rosewood back and sides, producing a full, resonant sound with exceptional projection. A staple of folk, country, and bluegrass. Comes with a hard case.
31.Gibson Les Paul
One of the most iconic electric guitars ever made. A solid mahogany body with a maple top, known for its warm, rich tone and exceptional sustain. A favourite of rock and blues players worldwide. Comes with a cable and a hard case.
32.Lollipop
A single lollipop on a stick. Sweet, simple, and lasts longer than most candy. Flavour unknown until you try it.
33.Alarm Clock
A standard battery-powered alarm clock. Tells the time and wakes you up when you need it. Simple, reliable, and surprisingly easy to take for granted until you don't have one.
34.Snickers
A chocolate bar packed with nougat, caramel, and roasted peanuts, all coated in milk chocolate. Substantial enough to actually tide you over.
35.Yoga Mat
A standard non-slip yoga mat. Good for stretching, exercise, or just having something soft to lie on. More useful than it looks.
36.Hand Axe
A masterwork hand axe with a hand-forged steel head and a short hardwood handle. Perfectly weighted for one-handed use — fast, powerful, and effective for both chopping and throwing at close range.
37.Fanta (1.5L)
A 1.5 litre bottle of Fanta. Bright, fruity, and fizzy. Classic orange flavour.
38.Sprite (1.5L)
A 1.5 litre bottle of Sprite. Crisp, clean lemon-lime flavour with a sharp carbonated bite. Great on its own or as a mixer.
39.Javelin
A masterwork javelin with a hand-forged steel tip mounted on a straight hardwood shaft. Perfectly weighted and balanced for throwing at range, delivering significant penetrating force on impact. Can also be used as a short spear in a pinch.
40.Hatchet
A masterwork hatchet with a hand-forged steel head and a hardwood handle. Perfectly weighted for one-handed chopping and throwing. Compact enough to carry on a belt and effective as both a tool and a weapon.
41.20,000mAh Solar Power Bank
A high-capacity power bank with a built-in solar panel for recharging. Keeps your devices alive as long as there's sunlight. Reliable backup power in any situation.
42.Licorice
A pack of soft, chewy licorice candy. Strong anise flavour that people tend to either love or hate. A divisive classic.
43.Darts (20x)
A set of 20 masterwork darts, precision-crafted for consistent weight and balance. Sharp, aerodynamic, and accurate in skilled hands. Effective at short range as a silent, fast harassment tool.
44.Bueno
A Kinder Bueno bar — two crispy wafer fingers filled with smooth hazelnut cream and coated in milk chocolate. Light, delicate, and dangerously easy to finish in one go.
45.Judo Grimoire — Blue Belt
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo blue belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational competence in Judo — proficiency in core throwing techniques such as o-soto-gari, seoi-nage, and uchi-mata, proper breakfall technique in all directions, fundamental groundwork including basic pins, transitions, and early submission attempts, and the body awareness and balance that separates a trained judoka from an untrained one. Meaningfully dangerous in unarmed grappling against anyone without formal training.
46.European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in the European pike and spear tradition — the polearm curriculum of the historical fencing guilds as documented by masters including Fiore dei Liberi, Joachim Meyer, and Paulus Hector Mair. The practitioner understands the three foundational guards — High, Middle, and Low — correct thrusting mechanics, basic bind-and-replace sequences, and the footwork required to maintain and control the weapon's extraordinary reach advantage. Already a serious threat against any untrained opponent at range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Free Scholar grimoire.
47.Aikido Grimoire — 4th Kyu (Blue Belt)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 4th Kyu proficiency in Aikido — the Blue Belt level, marking the transition from beginner to intermediate study. The practitioner has internalized the foundational ukemi (breakfalls) in all directions, core throws including ikkyo, nikyo, sankyo, and shihonage, basic irimi and tenkan footwork, and the principle of blending with an attacker's force rather than opposing it. The circular redirection of force that defines Aikido is beginning to emerge in technique. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan grimoire.
48.Sambo Grimoire — Candidate Master of Sports
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Candidate Master of Sports level proficiency in Sambo — the Russian combat and sport grappling system developed from Judo, wrestling, and indigenous Soviet martial arts. The practitioner has a solid command of Sambo's distinctive throwing curriculum, leg locks that are banned in most other grappling arts, and the aggressive ground-and-pound transitions that bridge Sambo's combat and sport applications. Competition-ready and meaningfully dangerous against any untrained or lesser-trained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master of Sports grimoire.
49.Muay Thai Grimoire — Nak Muay
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Nak Muay level proficiency in Muay Thai — the Thai art of eight limbs. The practitioner has internalized foundational technique across all eight weapons: jabs, crosses, elbows, knees, teeps, roundhouse kicks, and clinch entries. Basic pad work, bag work, and sparring fundamentals are solid. The devastating roundhouse kick — driven by hip rotation and the shin rather than the foot — is already meaningfully developed at this level. A Nak Muay is a genuinely dangerous striker against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Nak Muay Khao grimoire.
50.Kickboxing Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level proficiency in kickboxing — the striking art combining boxing punches with kicks above the waist. The practitioner has solid command of the jab-cross-hook-uppercut combination framework, mid and high roundhouse kicks, front kicks, and the footwork and defensive head movement that separates a trained kickboxer from an untrained one. Sparring instincts are sharpened and the practitioner is genuinely dangerous in any stand-up striking exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
51.MMA Grimoire — Amateur Competitor
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of a competitive amateur MMA fighter — someone who has trained seriously across striking, wrestling, and ground fighting, and competed under full rules against other trained opponents. The practitioner has functional boxing and kickboxing for stand-up, basic takedown offense and defense from wrestling, and foundational ground control and submission awareness from BJJ. Cross-training across all three ranges is coherent enough to apply in live sparring against resisting opponents. Well beyond any untrained individual or single-discipline hobbyist in a real confrontation. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Professional grimoire.
52.Eskrima Grimoire — Blue Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Blue Belt proficiency in Eskrima/Arnis — the Filipino national martial art. The practitioner has internalized the foundational twelve strike angles that form the backbone of the system, basic defenses, disarming concepts, and the stick and knife techniques that distinguish Eskrima from most other martial arts. Training begins with weapons rather than empty hands — the Filipino principle that armed technique naturally develops unarmed ability. At Blue Belt level, single stick, double stick, and knife fundamentals are all meaningfully developed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan grimoire.
53.Silat Grimoire — Cikgu
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Cikgu rank in Silat — an instructor level representing solid foundational mastery of the art. The practitioner has internalized the core jurus (forms), fundamental footwork patterns, and the basic application of Silat's characteristic low stances, sweeps, and strikes. The weapon curriculum — kerambit, parang, and others — has been introduced and foundational techniques are practiced with competence. A Cikgu-level Silat practitioner is qualified to teach basics under senior supervision. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Guru grimoire.
54.Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Journeyman
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Journeyman-level proficiency in the American Bowie knife fighting tradition — the frontier dueling system built around the large clip-point fighting knife. The practitioner understands the basic guards, parries, and cuts of the tradition, can use the heavy blade to deflect an opponent's knife while immediately retaliating, and has internalized the footwork and timing of this aggressive, forward-driving style. Meaningfully dangerous with the Bowie knife against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Experienced grimoire.
55.Italian Stiletto Grimoire — Scholare
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholare-level proficiency in the Italian stiletto fencing tradition — the piercing dagger art of the Renaissance schools. The practitioner understands the fundamental thrusting mechanics, basic guards and parries, and the principle of controlling an opponent's blade while seeking an opening for a lethal thrust. The stiletto's unique geometry — designed to punch through clothing and between ribs — is understood and exploited correctly. A practitioner at this level is already genuinely dangerous at very close range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
56.Navaja Grimoire — Apprentice
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Apprentice-level proficiency in the Spanish Navaja fighting tradition — the blade art built around the large folding knife that dominated Spanish street and dueling culture for centuries. The practitioner understands the fundamental cuts, guards, and the characteristic footwork of the style, and has internalized the basic combination attacks that define Navaja fighting's aggressive rhythm. The weapon's considerable reach for a folding knife and its razor-sharp curved blade are exploited correctly at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Practiced grimoire.
57.Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 1
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 1 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — the foundational level of the military system used by Russian special forces. The practitioner has internalized the core principles of Systema knife work: natural, tension-free movement; simultaneous defense and attack; and the use of breathing to maintain calm under extreme pressure. Basic knife attacks, defenses, and disarms against both armed and unarmed opponents are fully functional. A Level 1 Systema knife practitioner is already a credible threat with a blade. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Level 3 grimoire.
58.Sojutsu Grimoire — Kirigami
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kirigami of a koryu sojutsu school — the first formal certificate of spear training. The practitioner has been accepted into the school's transmission and has internalized foundational spear kata, correct grip and footwork, and the basic principles of reach, timing, and thrusting mechanics with the yari. The spear's extraordinary reach advantage over shorter weapons is already meaningfully developed at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mokuroku grimoire.
59.Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 1st Dan (Shodan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 1st Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — the entry point of black belt mastery in the art. All foundational kihon, the basic shikake-oji partner practice sequences, and the initial bogu sparring curriculum are fully internalized. The practitioner fights with the sweeping, long-range cutting and thrusting that characterizes the naginata, and has proven themselves at examination level against qualified opponents. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 3rd Dan grimoire.
60.Qiang Grimoire — Si-Hing (Senior Student)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Si-Hing level of Chinese spear — the senior student grade within a traditional Chinese martial arts lineage. Known in China as the "Nine Year Spear" for the time required just to develop a feel for the weapon, the Si-Hing practitioner has completed the foundational curriculum: core thrusting sequences, the circular deflecting motions characteristic of the style, footwork patterns, and the initial forms. The distinctive leaf-shaped blade and red horsehair tassel are understood and used correctly. The practitioner is already meaningfully dangerous with the weapon. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Sifu grimoire.
61.Assegai Grimoire — Ibutho (Junior Warrior)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills of a junior Zulu Ibutho warrior — a member of a fighting age regiment who has completed Shaka's foundational combat training. The practitioner has internalized the iklwa's short stabbing mechanics, the shield-and-spear combination technique pioneered by Shaka, the art of hooking an opponent's shield to force it aside before thrusting, and the basic movements of the impondo zankomo buffalo formation. Fleet-footed, aggressive, and effective in close-quarters exchanges against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Izikhulu grimoire.
62.Kenjutsu Grimoire — Kirigami
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kirigami — the first formal certificate of a koryu sword school, written on folded paper and bearing the seal of the headmaster. The practitioner has been formally accepted into the school's transmission and has internalized its foundational kata, basic footwork, maai (distancing), and the correct mechanics of cutting and thrusting with the Japanese sword. Well beyond an untrained individual in any exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mokuroku grimoire.
63.European Longsword Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in the European longsword tradition — the foundational grade of the historical fencing guilds. The practitioner understands the core principles of the Liechtenauer tradition: the four guards, the five master cuts, the before and after, and the concept of Fühlen (feeling the blade). Basic thrusts, cuts, and guards are executed with structural correctness. Well beyond an untrained individual in any sword exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Free Scholar grimoire.
64.Rapier Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in historical rapier fencing — the entry grade of the Schools of Defence, covering the Italian and Spanish traditions of Fabris, Capoferro, and Destreza. The practitioner understands the fundamental guards, lines, and measure, executes basic thrusts and parries with correct structure, and has begun developing the sensitivity and point control that defines this art. A Scholar-level rapier practitioner is already meaningfully dangerous in any close-quarters exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
65.Sabre Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level proficiency in military sabre fencing — the tradition of the cavalry sword as systematized by masters like Roworth, Angelo, and the Hungarian school. The practitioner has sound command of the basic cuts, parries, and guards, understands the principles of tempo and distance, and executes technique with proper mechanics. Meaningfully dangerous against any untrained opponent at close range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
66.Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level mastery of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing — the basket-hilted sword tradition systematized by Donald McBane, Henry Angelo, and the Highland military schools. The practitioner understands the fundamental cuts, guards, and parries of the system, executes technique with correct Highland mechanics, and has begun developing the aggressive, forward-driving style characteristic of the tradition. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
67.Dao Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level mastery of Chinese Dao swordsmanship — the single-edged curved sword tradition of the Chinese martial arts. The practitioner has internalized core forms, understands the principles of circular power generation and the flowing transitions characteristic of the style, and executes basic cuts, deflections, and footwork patterns with structural correctness. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
68.Taekwondo Grimoire — Blue Belt (4th Geup)
— A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the Blue Belt level — the final stage of the intermediate program. The practitioner has full command of foundational and intermediate kicks, strikes, and stances, including the Spin Hook Kick, and has internalized multiple poomsae forms. Sparring instincts are sharpened and reactions are considerably faster than an untrained individual. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan Black Belt grimoire.
69.Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Lakan Guro
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Lakan Guro — the assistant instructor rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali, meaning Warrior Teacher. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Pekiti Tirsia Kali is a sacred family system originating in Negros Occidental, Philippines, with roots tracing back over 2,000 years, and is the only Filipino martial art officially recognized by the Philippine government and used to train the Marine Force-Recon Battalions of the Armed Forces of the Philippines. At Lakan Guro level the bearer has internalized the foundational curriculum of the system — the complete close quarters combat methodology centered on edged and impact weapon control, from the initial engagement through to finishing techniques.
70.Kyudo Grimoire — 3rd Dan
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a 3rd Dan practitioner of Kyudo, the Japanese way of the bow. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer has internalized the fundamental shooting sequence — the hassetsu, the eight stages of shooting — with consistent and correct form, stable posture, and proper breath control. At the 3rd Dan level the practitioner shoots with genuine composure and has begun to embody the principle that technique and spirit are inseparable. The knowledge encompasses both the physical and philosophical foundations that underpin Kyudo as a martial art.
71.Recurve Bow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent recurve bow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational recurve technique — correct stance and posture, proper finger draw and anchor point, consistent release, and accurate shooting at standard competition distances. The recurve bow's curved limb design stores more energy than a straight bow for its size, making it faster and more powerful at shorter lengths. At competent level the bearer can shoot reliably and accurately, and understands the bow's mechanics well enough to maintain and tune it independently.
72.Crossbow Grimoire — Competent Operator
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent crossbow operator. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The crossbow's key advantage in history was its accessibility — it could be taught to an untrained soldier in days where the longbow required years. At competent level, the bearer has mastered the full mechanics of the crossbow — spanning, loading, aiming with a simple sight system, and effective engagement at combat range. They understand bolt selection, maintenance, and the tactical use of cover to compensate for the slow reload time. Effective against armored and unarmored opponents alike within range.
73.Shortbow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent shortbow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational shortbow technique — proper thumb draw or finger draw depending on tradition, accurate shooting at close to medium range, rapid reloading, and the maneuvering advantage the shortbow's compact size provides in close quarters and mounted situations. The shortbow's lower draw weight and shorter length make it faster to draw and easier to use on horseback than a longbow, at the cost of range and penetrating power. Effective and reliable against unarmored opponents within its range.
74.Longbow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a competent English war longbow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a functional foundation in war longbow technique — correct stance, the English pressing method of drawing using the chest and back rather than the arms alone, proper arrow selection, and the ability to draw and loose accurately at combat distances. The war longbow requires a draw weight of between 80 and 160 pounds — demanding years of conditioning that physically reshapes the skeleton. At competent level, the bearer can draw consistently and accurately enough to contribute to a volley formation and engage individual targets at moderate range.
75.Sumo Grimoire — Maegashira
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of a Maegashira — the entry rank of the top Makuuchi division in professional sumo. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains the complete technical foundation of elite professional sumo — mastery of the full range of the 82 official kimarite techniques, including throws, trips, pushes, and lifts, combined with the powerful forward-driving tachi-ai charge, precise footwork within the dohyo, and the ability to read and exploit an opponent's balance in real time. Every Maegashira has earned their place by dominating every division below the top and surviving a grueling schedule against the best wrestlers in the world. Against any untrained opponent, there is no contest.
76.Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Competent Practitioner
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a competent catch wrestling practitioner. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a fully functional foundation in catch-as-catch-can wrestling — solid single and double leg takedowns, breakdowns, control positions, basic pins, fundamental submission holds including the armbar, kimura, toe hold, and rear naked choke, and the escapes and reversals needed to survive on the ground. Unlike sport wrestling styles, every technique is oriented toward real combat with no restrictions on joints or submissions. Against any untrained opponent on the ground, the result is not in question.
77.Boxing Grimoire — Golden Gloves
grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a National Golden Gloves champion in amateur boxing. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Golden Gloves is the most prestigious amateur boxing tournament in the United States, founded in 1923, with alumni including Muhammad Ali, Joe Louis, Sugar Ray Robinson, and Joe Frazier. The bearer gains the complete technical foundation of elite amateur boxing — precise footwork, sharp defensive head movement, accurate combination punching, ring generalship, and the conditioning to sustain three hard rounds. A Golden Gloves champion has fought through regional, state, and national elimination rounds against the best amateur fighters in the country. Against any untrained opponent, the skill gap is total.
78.Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — Purple Belt (2 Stripe)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 2-stripe purple belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer has internalized a wide and well-rounded foundation of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu — guard passing, sweeps, submissions from multiple positions, escapes, and transitions. A 2-stripe purple belt can hold their own against most practitioners below their level and begin to develop their own personal game. Dangerous on the ground against any untrained opponent.

465 entries
RANK NAME DESCRIPTION ACTIONS
S
⚡ Power
SCP-914 — The Clockworks (Ability)
A personal ability version of SCP-914. The user can designate any object, item, weapon, or physically manifested power and run it through one of five settings — Rough, Coarse, 1:1, Fine, or Very Fine — to alter or upgrade it. Rough and Coarse degrade or destroy. 1:1 produces an equivalent. Fine improves and refines. Very Fine pushes the target to its absolute theoretical peak, potentially beyond what was originally possible. Can be used on physical abilities and power manifestations to refine and strengthen them further. One of the most versatile and potentially limitless abilities in existence.
S
⚡ Power
Bugs Bunny's Toon Force
The reality-defying cartoon logic of Bugs Bunny at its fullest expression. The user exists outside the normal rules of physics, causality, and common sense — surviving anything, producing objects from nowhere, rewriting the terms of any situation through sheer absurdist will. Falling off a cliff, being flattened by a boulder, or being blown up are inconveniences at most. The user can reach into impossible spaces, bend space and time for comedic effect, and turn any scenario to their advantage simply by being the one holding the punchline. There are no conditions, no cooldowns, and no logical framework to exploit or counter — it simply works because it's funny. One of the most unpredictable and unkillable states of existence possible.
S
⚡ Power
All Fiction
The ability of Najimi Ajimu, holder of 12,858,051,967,633,865 skills. Allows the user to declare anything to be fiction — and by doing so, erase it from existence entirely. Injuries, death, events, people, concepts, abilities — anything the user designates as fiction simply stops being real. There is no known limit to what can be declared fictional, and no known defense against it since the target ceases to exist before any counter can be applied. One of the most absolute and unconditional erasure abilities ever conceived.
S
⚡ Power
SCP-682's Adaptation
The adaptive survival ability of SCP-682, the Hard-to-Destroy Reptile. The user's body evolves in real time in response to any threat, damage, or hostile phenomenon — rapidly developing biological countermeasures, resistances, and new physical traits to neutralize whatever is harming them. The changes begin the moment a threat is registered and can be immediate and dramatic. No method of harm has ever proven permanently effective against it — including attempts to erase or annihilate its very existence. Given enough time and exposure, the user becomes functionally unkillable by any means previously used against them.
S
⚡ Power
Gold Experience Requiem
The Requiem evolution of Gold Experience, achieved when Giorno Giovanna pierced the Stand Arrow through his own Stand. A sentient, autonomous Stand that operates independently of its user's consciousness — even Giorno himself does not fully understand the extent of its power. Its core ability is Return to Zero: the power to revert any action, will, or movement directed against the user to a state of absolute zero — as if it never occurred.
