Attacks, abilities, time manipulation, fate itself — anything that moves toward a result opposing the user is nullified before it can arrive. No ability is exempt. Even destinies confirmed by precognition are rendered unreachable. The Stand itself confirmed that no Stand ability can ever oppose it. Its secondary application is the Infinite Death Loop: anyone killed by GER has their death reset to zero — they are revived, but remain fated to die, and so die again, and are revived again, endlessly. The victim experiences death in an infinite variety of ways across an eternal purgatory, never able to reach the reality of either life or death. There is no escape from the loop. The only way to prevent it is to never be killed by GER in the first place. Retains and vastly amplifies Gold Experience's life-giving abilities as well, capable of creating living creatures from inanimate matter at a scale far beyond the original.
S
📦 Item
The Gate Guardian
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release the Gate Guardian into the world — after which the marble disappears and it remains as a permanent guardian. A divine celestial being of immense power, originally stationed to guard the entrance to Eden with a flaming sword that turns in every direction. In this form, its purpose has been redirected — it exists solely to guard the user, standing between them and any threat with absolute divine authority. Its flaming sword strikes from any angle simultaneously, making conventional defense nearly impossible. As a being of divine origin tasked with an eternal purpose, it does not tire, does not negotiate, and cannot be reasoned out of its duty. It will follow the user's directions in all things — the only orders it will refuse are those that require it to abandon its guarding role entirely.
S
📦 Item
The Requiem Arrow
The Stand Arrow bearing a distinctive beetle design, recovered in Egypt and kept by Jean Pierre Polnareff. Physically similar to other Stand Arrows but set apart by what it grants — where ordinary Arrows draw out Stand abilities that already exist within the laws of reality, the Requiem Arrow grants power beyond the concept of Stand abilities entirely. Any suitable Stand pierced by it undergoes a Requiem evolution — a transformation that creates something new, something that transcends every existing ability and concept. The two confirmed Requiem evolutions it has produced are Chariot Requiem and Gold Experience Requiem. Piercing a Stand with it does not guarantee a controlled result — the transformation is unpredictable and the resulting Stand may act autonomously. The Arrow itself is an item of immense passive power — in the right hands, it is the single most transformative object in existence, capable of elevating any Stand to a level beyond all others.
S
📦 Item
Super Dragon Balls
The original and most powerful set of Dragon Balls in existence, created by the Dragon God Zalama in Year 41 of the Divine Calendar. Seven planet-sized spheres — each with a diameter of approximately 37,196 kilometers, roughly 27 times the volume of Earth — scattered across the cosmos. When gathered, the summoner must chant the phrase "Come forth, Dragon of the Gods, and grant my wish pretty peas!" in the Divine Language to call forth Super Shenron, a dragon so vast he dwarfs entire galaxies. Super Shenron grants one wish with virtually no limitations — confirmed uses include restoring entire erased universes, swapping the bodies of divine beings, and granting immortality. Beerus himself noted he could have wished for a universe to be destroyed. The only practical restrictions are that the wish must be spoken in the Divine Language and only one wish is granted per summon. After the wish is granted, the balls scatter to the very edges of the universe and turn dormant for one year before becoming active again. Due to their planet-sized scale, they can only be deployed from the inventory outside of a planet's atmosphere — releasing them within an atmosphere would be immediately catastrophic.
A
⚡ Power
Arc of Embodiment
Allows the user to materialize anything they can imagine into physical reality. Creations range from weapons and structures to fully independent creatures, and anything summoned is real and functional for as long as the user sustains it. The only limits are the breadth of the user's imagination and the magical power available to maintain what has been conjured. An exceptionally dangerous ability in creative hands.
A
⚡ Power
New Order
Allows the user to impose rules onto the world by touching something and stating a condition aloud. Up to two rules can be active at once. The rules are absolute — they can affect the body, reality, and even other quirks.
A
⚡ Power
Wonder of U
The Stand of Toru, featured in JoJolion. A sentient, autonomous Stand that acts entirely without its user's direct control, operating under the alias of Satoru Akefu — a disguise fully visible to non-Stand users. Its core ability is Calamity: anyone who pursues the user or acts with hostile intent against them will find disasters cascading toward them in an endless, escalating chain — accidents, falling objects, sudden impacts, and lethal coincidences that compound until the pursuer stops or dies. The pursuit does not need to be physical — even the intention or desire to act against the user is enough to trigger it. Multiple targets can be affected simultaneously. Critically, Wonder of U can continue to function even after its user is dead, briefly seeking a new host. Its only known counter is an attack that operates entirely outside the laws of physics, bypassing the logic of calamity itself.
A
⚡ Power
Super Saiyan
The legendary transformation of the Saiyan race, born from a surge of intense emotion and requiring a sufficient base power level to achieve. In its first form, it multiplies the user's power by 50 times, turning the hair golden and the eyes teal. Each subsequent pull unlocks the next tier: a second pull unlocks Super Saiyan 2 — a 100x multiplier achieved by pushing beyond the first form, with a sharper, more jagged aura and greater speed — a transformation first achieved by Gohan in a moment of pure rage. A third pull unlocks Super Saiyan 3 — a 400x multiplier that pushes the body to its absolute limit, with dramatically elongated golden hair — extraordinarily powerful but burns through energy at a rapid rate, limiting how long it can be sustained. A fourth pull unlocks Super Saiyan 4 from Dragon Ball GT — achieved by a Saiyan with a tail undergoing the Golden Oozaru transformation and then regaining conscious control — a unique form that produces red fur across the body and wild dark hair, with a power multiplier of 4,000x base — the equivalent of SSJ3 combined with the Oozaru's tenfold amplification. Each transformation carries the same emotional and physical requirements as in Saiyan legend — the power is real, but it must be earned. If the user unlocks a subsequent transformation naturally on their own before pulling it from the gacha, the gacha automatically accommodates this — the next pull of Super Saiyan will grant the tier beyond what was naturally achieved rather than a duplicate, ensuring no pull is ever wasted.
A
⚡ Power
Chariot Requiem
The Requiem evolution of Silver Chariot, achieved when the Arrow pierced it of its own accord. An autonomous Stand that operates entirely without a user's direction, driven solely by a single purpose: protect the Arrow at any cost. Its fundamental nature is that it is the shadow of every living soul — meaning it cannot be attacked by any Stand ability, as doing so means attacking one's own soul, which turns the attack back on the user. Any Stand that attempts to take or disturb the Arrow will be commandeered by Chariot Requiem and turned against its own user. Upon activation, every living being in a city-wide radius is put into a forced sleep lasting several hours, during which their souls are swapped with those of nearby organisms regardless of species. Stands follow their user's soul, not their body, amplifying in power to the point where some users can barely control them. Given enough time, Chariot Requiem begins mutating the swapped souls themselves into unidentifiable, otherworldly entities — the theorized end result being the complete metamorphosis of every living organism on Earth into something entirely unknown. Can regenerate lost limbs instantly. The critical weakness: each affected person has a small orb of light behind their head representing their soul. Destroying that orb destroys both the shadow and the soul it belongs to, which is the only known method of reversing its effects and defeating it.
A
⚡ Power
Comedian
A technique that bends the rules of reality around the concept of comedy. Anything the user does that can be perceived as a punchline or comedic setup is reinforced by the technique — turning jokes into lethal outcomes and making absurd, impossible things happen as long as they follow a comedic logic.
A
⚡ Power
The End
Kurokami Medaka's most fearsome abnormality. Allows the user to copy any special ability, skill, or power they witness and make it permanently their own — retaining it forever with no degradation. Unlike imitation or mimicry, The End does not produce a weaker version — every copied ability is not only acquired at full potency but used at 120% of its original output, exceeding even the source. There is no known limit to how many abilities can be accumulated. However, The End has clear boundaries: it cannot copy physical prowess, raw stats, or bodily conditioning — only special abilities and powers. Fighting styles and martial techniques are similarly beyond its reach. Every encounter becomes an opportunity to expand an already limitless arsenal, and every opponent risks arming the user further simply by fighting them.
A
⚡ Power
Soft & Wet: Go Beyond
The final evolution of Soft & Wet, unlocked when Josuke discovers that certain bubbles generated from his Joestar birthmark are composed of spinning lines so infinitesimally thin they practically cease to exist. These lines combine the explosive energy of Killer Queen with the Spin, producing an "explosive Spin" that operates entirely outside the laws of physics. The bubbles of Go Beyond pass through any barrier, wall, or defense without interaction — they do not exist in the conventional sense, and therefore nothing in the conventional world can stop or block them. Upon contact, they instantly erode whatever they touch. They cannot be aimed with precision and are largely uncontrollable once fired, but their invisibility, speed, and physics-defying nature make them functionally unanswerable. Critically, these bubbles are entirely unaffected by calamity-type abilities, as they operate beyond the logic those abilities govern.
A
⚡ Power
Rewind
Allows the user to revert any living thing they touch back to a previous physical state — healing injuries, reversing age, or undoing changes to the body. Even a child's uncontrolled use of this ability has been known to reduce a living person to dust in moments — in the hands of a skilled adult, the implications are staggering. Drains the user significantly with each use.
A
📦 Item
Aladdin's Genie Lamp
A bronze oil lamp housing the Genie of Agrabah, one of the most powerful beings in existence. Rubbing the lamp summons the Genie, who will grant exactly three wishes to the current master — no more, no less, and wishing for more wishes is explicitly forbidden. The wishes transfer with ownership of the lamp, not with whoever rubbed it. The Genie's power is phenomenal and near-limitless — he can reshape reality, shapeshift into anything, teleport, materialize any object or person, and transcend space and time. Three rules are absolute and cannot be broken under any circumstances: he cannot kill anyone directly, cannot make anyone fall in love, and cannot revive the dead. Wishes must be carefully worded — imprecise phrasing may produce unintended results, as the Genie interprets the spirit of the wish but is bound by its exact wording. Once all three wishes are used, the lamp passes to its next owner with no wishes remaining.
B
⚡ Power
Alibi Block
One of Ajimu Najimi's vast collection of skills. Allows the user to appear anywhere and at any time without restriction — physical locations such as locked rooms, outer space, heaven, or hell, as well as metaphysical spaces such as inside a dream, inside a heart, or within another person entirely. There are no barriers that can keep the user out. The only limit is the user's own judgment — the ability places no safeguards on where it sends them, meaning a careless destination is as likely to be lethal as it is liberating.
B
⚡ Power
Ultimate Life Form
The transcendent state achieved by combining the Stone Mask with the Red Stone of Aja. The wearer evolves beyond the limits of any single species, gaining access to the biological capabilities of every living being they are aware of — freely transforming any part of their body to replicate the traits, physiology, and abilities of any creature within their knowledge. The more living beings the user is aware of, the more vast and versatile their arsenal becomes. By extension, any ability or power with a biological or viral origin that the user knows of is theoretically within reach — including those that manifest through living hosts. An irreversible transformation.
B
⚡ Power
Overhaul
Allows the user to disassemble and reassemble anything they touch at will, down to the molecular level. Can destroy, reconstruct, and reshape matter instantly — including living bodies. One of the most versatile and lethal quirks in existence.
B
⚡ Power
Advanced Growth Rate
Kurokami Medaka's signature abnormality. From birth, the user's rate of growth has been fundamentally inhuman — Medaka herself learned to walk, talk, and reason at a pace so far beyond normal infancy that those around her could barely keep up. This accelerated development never stops. The user can learn, adapt to, and master any skill, technique, or ability at a rate that borders on instant. What takes others years of dedicated training can be achieved in minutes or hours of exposure. The more the user is pushed, the faster and more completely they grow — meaning combat itself becomes a constant source of rapid self-improvement. There is no ceiling to what can be learned and no skill too complex to eventually master. In a prolonged fight, the user becomes exponentially more dangerous the longer it lasts.
B
⚡ Power
Golden Spin
The perfected form of Spin, achieved when the rotation matches the golden ratio exactly. Generates infinite rotational energy — a self-sustaining force that cannot be stopped, blocked, or negated by any conventional means. The energy is fundamentally incompatible with the concept of being halted, meaning defenses that would stop any other attack are simply irrelevant. An evolved form of Spin, achieved when the user masters perfect golden ratio rotation.
B
⚡ Power
Restless Gambler
A technique that operates entirely on chance. The user rolls a die embedded in the technique, and the result determines the effect — ranging from minor inconveniences to catastrophic, reality-altering outcomes. The unpredictability makes it nearly impossible to counter or prepare for.
B
⚡ Power
Mahoraga's Wheel
The adaptation ability of the divine shikigami Eight-Handled Sword Divergent Sila Divine General Mahoraga. After being struck by the same phenomenon four times and surviving each hit, the user's body fully adapts — developing a resistance or counter to that specific attack and eventually becoming immune or capable of reflecting it entirely. There is no ceiling to what it can adapt to given enough exposure and survival.
B
⚡ Power
Pocoloco's Luck
The inexplicable innate luck of Pocoloco from Steel Ball Run. Not a Stand ability or any kind of power — simply an astronomical degree of natural fortune that consistently bends circumstances in the user's favour. According to a fortune teller, the probability of this level of luck occurring naturally is 1 in 5 billion. Events align, coincidences stack, and outcomes that should be impossible keep happening anyway. The user doesn't need to be the strongest, fastest, or most skilled — luck fills in every gap. Pocoloco entered the Steel Ball Run with nothing exceptional and won it on this alone. This luck does not affect gacha pulls — it is explicitly excluded from influencing roll outcomes.
B
⚡ Power
One For All (Previous Users' Quirks)
The fully realized form of One For All. In addition to massively amplifying the user's physical capabilities, it grants access to the accumulated quirks of all previous wielders — including float, blackwhip, smokescreen, fa jin, danger sense, and more. An overwhelming all-purpose power.
B
⚡ Power
Bookmaker
Kumagawa Misogi's signature minus. Using his screws, the user sets a target's every stat and ability to match their own level exactly — no more, no less. Used against an enemy stronger than the user it is a devastating equalizer, stripping away everything that made them dangerous. Used on a weaker ally it raises them entirely up to the user's level, making it an extraordinary force multiplier in the right hands. Should never be used on an enemy weaker than the user — it would only make them stronger. The seal can be broken by a sufficiently strong will, but reapplying it is always an option. Requires physical contact with the screws to apply.
B
⚡ Power
D4C: Love Train
The evolved form of Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap, achieved after Funny Valentine obtained the Holy Corpse. Surrounds the user with a rift between dimensions that functions as the ultimate defensive barrier — all misfortune, harm, and attacks directed at the user are automatically redirected through the dimensional boundary onto bystanders and people nearby instead. The user becomes essentially untouchable as long as the rift is active, with every attack that should hit them simply finding someone else to strike instead. Cannot be maintained while the user is in motion.
B
⚡ Power
Renewal Taekwondo
The most refined and powerful martial art in the God of High School universe. A kicking-based style that maximizes efficiency, speed, and force through perfect technique, allowing the user to draw out the absolute peak of their physical output. Its most devastating technique, Recoilless Kick, bends space itself to bypass conventional defense. The upper limit of its power scales entirely with the user — in the hands of someone with extraordinary physical output, it becomes a universe-ending force.
B
⚡ Power
Infinity Castle
Grants the user a personal pocket dimension in the form of the Infinity Castle — a seemingly endless structure of shifting rooms, staircases, and corridors that defies spatial logic. The user has full control over its layout and can use it to disorient, trap, or separate enemies across its infinite interior.
B
⚡ Power
Idle Transfiguration
Allows the user to reshape the soul of any target they touch, warping their physical form in any way the user chooses. Can produce monstrous transformations, create suicide bombers out of victims, or reshape people into tools or weapons. One of the most disturbing and versatile techniques in existence.
B
⚡ Power
Killer Queen: Bites the Dust
The evolved form of Killer Queen, born from a second piercing of the Arrow. Implants a miniaturized Killer Queen inside a non-Stand user, making them the host. If anyone discovers the user's identity through the host — by hearing it, reading it, or being told in any way — the miniature Killer Queen enters that person's eye and detonates them instantly. Multiple people can be killed simultaneously if they learn the secret at the same time. After the explosion, time is rewound roughly one hour, looping back to before the detonation occurred. Only the host retains memory of each loop. Crucially, anyone killed by Bites the Dust in a previous loop is fated to die at the exact same moment in every subsequent loop — regardless of their location or what they are doing, the explosion finds them. This destiny cannot be avoided or prevented unless the user is killed or voluntarily retracts the ability, which erases all loops created by it. While active, the user cannot use Killer Queen's other abilities. Bites the Dust also protects the host from all harm — including from the user themselves — as the host must remain alive for the ability to function.
B
⚡ Power
Saiyan's Tail
A prehensile brown-furred tail characteristic of the Saiyan race. The tail absorbs Blutz Waves, enabling the Oozaru transformation — upon absorbing at least 17 million Zeno units of Blutz Waves through the eyes from a full moon or equivalent source, the user transforms into a massive anthropomorphic Great Ape standing roughly 50 feet tall — mountain-level in scale. Even a brief moment of eye contact with a sufficient Blutz Wave source is enough to trigger the transformation, making it nearly impossible to prevent once exposure begins. The transformation multiplies the user's power level tenfold, dramatically amplifying all physical capabilities and granting the ability to fire an energy beam from the mouth. Speed is not diminished despite the enormous size increase. Most users are overwhelmed by primal instincts and become berserk, though trained Saiyan elites can mostly retain their sanity and keep their techniques — full control is never guaranteed and the transformation always amplifies violent tendencies. The only reliable counter is the tail itself — severing it instantly reverts the form. The tail also serves as a significant weak point on the body: grabbing or squeezing it causes the user to freeze up and lose most of their strength. However, this vulnerability is trainable — with dedicated conditioning the tail can be hardened against this weakness and eventually used as a reliable combat limb in its own right. Also grants the Power Ball technique: the user compresses ki and atmospheric particles into a sphere that simulates a full moon, generating enough Blutz Waves to trigger the transformation at any time without needing a natural moon. The Power Ball lingers briefly even after destruction, maintaining the transformation for a short time. Legend speaks of Saiyans who, through the tail, could access transformations far beyond the Oozaru — up to and including the Legendary Super Saiyan form. All such transformations remain accessible through this tail, each carrying the same requirements and conditions as they do in Saiyan legend.
B
⚡ Power
Arcane Dragon Slayer Magic
The Dragon Slayer magic of the Dragon King. Unlike conventional Dragon Slayer magic, which is attuned to a single element, this version can consume and nullify any element or magical energy it encounters — an all-devouring power with no elemental blind spot. Its destructive output is commensurate with the most feared being in the Dragon Slayer lineage.
B
⚡ Power
Full Counter
Meliodas' signature ability from Seven Deadly Sins. Reflects any magic-based attack back at the attacker with multiplied power. There is no upper limit to what it can reflect — the stronger the incoming attack, the more devastating the counter. Cannot reflect physical attacks, only magic. Requires the user to not initiate an attack themselves while it is active.
B
⚡ Power
Limitless
The inherited technique of the Gojo clan. Brings the concept of infinity into reality, allowing the user to manipulate space at the atomic level. Includes Infinity — a passive barrier that slows anything approaching the user to a halt — as well as Blue, which creates attraction, and Red, which creates repulsion. Cursed Technique Reversal and Hollow Purple are also unlocked with mastery. Sufficiently fast opponents can bypass the barrier entirely.
B
⚡ Power
Ultra Instinct
A transcendent combat state in which the body moves and reacts entirely on its own, independent of conscious thought. Attacks, dodges, and counters are executed with perfect efficiency and speed beyond what the mind could process in real time. Extremely difficult to trigger and even harder to sustain, but nearly unbeatable while active.
B
📦 Item
SCP-294 — The Coffee Machine
A standard-looking vending machine with a keypad that accepts any text input. When a liquid is entered, it dispenses a cup of it — any liquid, real, theoretical, or conceptual. Abstract inputs are valid: a cup of immortality, a cup of enlightenment, a cup of an enemy's weakness — the machine makes no distinction between the physical and the conceptual. The possibilities are effectively limitless given enough creativity and knowledge of what to ask for. However, the machine is large and stationary, cannot be used in a pinch, and requests for unknown or exotic substances have occasionally proven immediately lethal to the person who drank the result. Extraordinary power at the cost of mobility and certainty.
B
📦 Item
7 Dragon Balls
The complete set of seven Dragon Balls from the era when Kami was still alive — summoning the original Shenron at his full but unaugmented power. When gathered, they summon Shenron who will grant one wish within his ability. Once the wish is granted, the Dragon Balls scatter across the new world and turn to stone for one year before becoming active again.
C
⚡ Power
Sunshine
Escanor's sacred power from Seven Deadly Sins. A divine ability that continuously strengthens the user's physical body using solar energy — the higher the sun, the greater the boost to strength, durability, and speed. Peaks at noon when the user enters The One for exactly one minute, reaching a state of absolute physical invincibility at a multi-continental scale. Comes with the divine axe Rhitta, which stores solar power during the day. At night, Sunshine becomes completely unusable. Does not buff other abilities unless they are tied to celestial bodies.
C
⚡ Power
Blue Flame
Allows the user to generate and control intense blue flames, which burn significantly hotter than standard fire. Highly destructive and difficult to extinguish.
C
⚡ Power
Take Over
Allows the user to capture the essence of a creature or entity they have defeated and transform their own body into it, gaining that being's physical form, traits, and abilities. The user retains their own mind and will throughout. The more powerful the entity taken over, the greater the transformation's combat potential. Particularly effective against demonic or monstrous opponents.
C
⚡ Power
Dark Regulus
Allows the user to imbue their body with dark flames for enhanced melee strikes, or project them as ranged blasts from the palm. Its defining trait is the ability to absorb light-based energy and other fire-type magic, nullifying incoming attacks and converting the absorbed power into greater strength and duration. The more that is absorbed, the more destructive it becomes — though an upper limit does exist. Dragon Slayers who attempt to consume these flames will find their own magic clashing with the dark energy internally, causing a severe fever unless the foreign magic is expelled.
C
⚡ Power
The Hand
Okuyasu Nijimura's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable. A close-range humanoid of considerable physical strength. Its ability is simple and terrifying: anything that The Hand's right palm swipes through — objects, space itself, people — is erased and teleported to an unknown location. The space closes seamlessly behind it, pulling anything adjacent into the gap. It can erase the air between itself and a target to instantly close distance, or remove sections of the ground, walls, or an opponent's body in a single swipe. The only limit is the user's own imagination and combat intelligence.
C
⚡ Power
Transparent World
A heightened perception technique that allows the user to see through the bodies of others, revealing their muscles, blood flow, and internal organs in real time. By reading these signals, the user can predict every movement an opponent is about to make before it happens, making them nearly impossible to deceive in combat.
C
⚡ Power
Kiss
Gwess's Stand from Stone Ocean. Features exceptional stats across the board. Its ability creates sticker-like duplicates: when Kiss attaches a sticker to an object or body part, a second identical copy of that object or limb is created. When the sticker is removed, the two copies violently merge back into one — anything caught between them at the time of merging is crushed or destroyed in the process. The mechanic can be applied to weapons, surfaces, or directly to an opponent's body with devastating results.
C
⚡ Power
Destructo Disc
A razor-sharp disc of concentrated energy hurled at the target. Capable of cutting through virtually anything regardless of the target's power level or durability. Difficult to control precisely but nearly impossible to tank.
C
⚡ Power
Blood Control
Grants the user full control over their own blood, allowing them to weaponize it — hardening it into blades, launching it as projectiles, or using it to affect any open wound on an opponent.
C
⚡ Power
The Fool
Iggy's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. Unlike most Stands, The Fool has no fixed physical form — it is bound entirely to sand, taking shape by animating and controlling particles of sand and dust from the environment. This makes it fully visible to non-Stand users and completely invulnerable to attack, since striking it is simply striking sand. Iggy can shape it into anything he imagines — a glider for flight, a protective dome, a replica of a person, or an attacking creature. The sand does not behave like normal sand: it resists moisture, can vary in density, and can be directed with precision. Its versatility is limited only by the availability of sand in the environment.
C
⚡ Power
Deadpool's Healing Factor
The regenerative healing factor of Wade Wilson, derived from the Weapon X program's experimentation with Wolverine's mutant ability. In its original host it was fused with pre-existing cancer, which caused the regen to lock in the diseased state as baseline — but in a healthy user, the first activation instead locks in full health as the restored state, producing a clean and extraordinarily powerful healing factor with none of the drawbacks. Once toggled on, the user recovers from gunshots, stabbings, severe burns, complete incineration, decapitation, and having entire sections of the body destroyed — all within moments. Brain cells regenerate at an accelerated rate, rendering the user nearly immune to psychic and telepathic interference. No demonstrated upper limit has been established — documented futures show the user surviving events that killed beings considered immortal. The critical rule is that the body's condition at the moment of first activation becomes the permanent baseline it heals toward — any injury sustained while the ability is toggled off is treated as part of the new baseline and will not be restored. Toggling it off halts all regeneration instantly.
C
⚡ Power
Killer Queen
Yoshikage Kira's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable. A powerful close-range humanoid with exceptional combat stats. Its ability is to render anything it touches a bomb, detonating it at will — Primary Bomb can destroy a target without leaving any trace of the victim whatsoever, as if they never existed. Its second bomb, Sheer Heart Attack, is a detached, autonomous heat-seeking explosive that homes in on the nearest heat source, is virtually indestructible, and cannot be recalled or stopped by conventional means — it pursues its target relentlessly until detonation. If obtained a second time, it evolves into Killer Queen: Bites the Dust — a B Rank ability.
C
⚡ Power
Star Platinum
Jotaro Kujo's Stand, widely considered one of the greatest in the series. A massive, muscular humanoid of extraordinary physical capability — its strikes land at over 300 km/h with enough force to shatter substances as hard as diamond, and its speed has been stated to approach the speed of light. It possesses surgical precision, capable of removing a bullet embedded in a person's skull without harm, as well as a self-preservation instinct that activates to protect Jotaro even when he is unconscious. Its time stop ability freezes all of existence except the user for up to 5 seconds — a duration that can diminish with disuse but recovers with effort. The only Stand known to match it directly is The World.
C
⚡ Power
Biokinesis
Grants total control over the user's own body at a cellular level. Allows instant shapeshifting, full organ restructuring, the creation of bladed whips from flesh, generation of mouths across the body, and the ability to split into pieces and reform. Virtually immune to decapitation due to distributed vital organs.
C
⚡ Power
Judgeman
Summons a cursed spirit that acts as an impartial judge. It evaluates a target based on their sins and past actions and delivers a verdict — sentencing them to a punishment proportional to their guilt. The technique is impartial and cannot be argued with once a verdict is reached.
C
⚡ Power
The World
DIO's Stand, regarded as one of the most powerful close-range Stands in existence. A towering humanoid with immense physical strength and speed comparable to Star Platinum — its punches strike at a speed calculated to exceed that of a machine gun. Its defining ability is Time Stop: the user freezes time for everyone in the world except themselves for up to 9 seconds, during which they can move, attack, reposition, and set up kills freely. Anything put in motion during stopped time continues moving once time resumes. The World and Star Platinum are the same type of Stand — two sides of the same coin — making their direct confrontations uniquely matched.
C
⚡ Power
Black Hole
Allows the user to generate miniature black holes capable of pulling in and disintegrating matter. Highly destructive and difficult to counter at any range.
C
⚡ Power
Clone Magic
Allows the user to create physical duplicates of themselves that can act, move, and fight independently. Each clone is a convincing replica capable of confusing and overwhelming opponents through numbers. Clones dissipate when struck with sufficient force.
C
⚡ Power
Heavy Weather
Weather Report's Stand in its awakened form from Stone Ocean. Manipulates weather on a massive scale — capable of generating tornadoes, lightning, and other phenomena at will. Its most dangerous ability converts sunlight passing through the atmosphere into a field of prismatic rainbow light that causes any living organism it touches to begin an irreversible biological transformation into snails. The effect spreads progressively and rapidly, and the victim retains consciousness throughout. Even subliminal perception of the rainbow can trigger the transformation, making it extraordinarily difficult to avoid.
C
⚡ Power
Tusk Act 1-4
Johnny Joestar's Stand from Steel Ball Run, evolving through four acts by mastering the Spin. Act 1 fires nail bullets imbued with rotational energy. Act 2 allows the nails to home in on targets through wounds they've already entered. Act 3 creates portals through wounds, allowing Johnny to fire through and emerge from any location a nail has previously struck. Act 4 delivers infinite rotational energy — the absolute perfection of the Spin — that cannot be stopped, blocked, or negated by any means once it strikes. The rotation is self-sustaining and perpetual, making it one of the most fundamentally unanswerable attacks in the series.
C
⚡ Power
Fire Dragon Slayer Magic
The Dragon Slayer magic of the fire element, originally passed down by a fire dragon. Allows the user to generate, control, and consume fire to replenish their strength. Fire produced by this magic surpasses conventional fire in power and cannot be absorbed by standard fire magic users. Can be pushed to overwhelming output through Dragon Force.
C
⚡ Power
Moon Breathing
A breathing style derived from Sun Breathing, developed to mirror it with dark, sweeping techniques. Attacks come in massive, layered arcs that strike from multiple directions simultaneously, overwhelming opponents with relentless, crescent-shaped slashes.
C
⚡ Power
Cryokinesis
Allows the user to generate and freely manipulate ice using their blood. Can freeze the air itself, create full ice clones of equal power, and scatter powdered ice that destroys the lungs of anyone who inhales it — making breathing techniques nearly impossible to perform.
C
⚡ Power
The Knight
A personal form of Requip magic that allows the user to store and instantly swap between a vast personal armory of weapons and armor — each set carrying different magical properties, resistances, and offensive capabilities. Switching is instantaneous and can be done mid-combat, making the user a constantly adapting and unpredictable fighter. The breadth of power scales entirely with how many armors have been acquired and mastered.
C
⚡ Power
Hellflame
Grants the user the ability to generate and control massive amounts of intense flame. The fire can be shaped, directed, and superheated at will, making it effective at both close and long range.
C
⚡ Power
Spice Girl
Trish Una's Stand from Golden Wind. Can render any object or surface it touches soft and rubbery, absorbing and dispersing the force of any impact — making attacks harmlessly bounce off or sink in without damage. Objects affected retain their new properties until Spice Girl releases them. Can be used to protect allies by softening the ground beneath them, neutralize incoming weapons, or reshape the physical battlefield. The ability has no effect on living beings directly.
C
⚡ Power
Explosion
Allows the user to secrete nitroglycerin-like sweat from their palms and ignite it at will, producing powerful explosions. Can be used for combat, propulsion, and mobility.
C
⚡ Power
Dirty Deeds Done Dirt Cheap
Funny Valentine's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Allows travel between parallel universes — the user can slip between dimensions and navigate alternate versions of the world. Alternate versions of people and objects can be retrieved and brought across, and the user can use dimensional boundaries as shields or escape routes. One key rule: two versions of the same person cannot exist in the same dimension simultaneously — the one that arrived second will die. If obtained a second time, it evolves into D4C: Love Train — a B Rank ability.
C
⚡ Power
Magician's Red
Muhammad Avdol's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. A humanoid figure with a bird-like head modeled after a phoenix, with heavily muscled arms ending in claws. Generates and controls intense fire with a temperature far exceeding conventional flame — hot enough to vaporize metal on contact. The fire can be shaped freely, directed as streams or ropes, formed into ankh-shaped projectiles called Crossfire Hurricane, or densely wound as Red Bind — fiery ropes that trap and incinerate targets. Also possesses a heat radar: a cruciform mass of psychic flame that extends in all six directions, detecting movement, breathing, and Stand energy within a 15-meter radius and indicating the location of any heat source it finds.
C
⚡ Power
Godspeed
A Nen ability that runs electricity through the body at all times, splitting into two modes. Whirlwind automatically sends electrical signals to the muscles to dodge anything the eyes detect, removing reaction time from the equation entirely. Speed of Lightning converts all bodily Nen into electricity for a burst of movement speed that surpasses what the naked eye can follow. Both modes can be active simultaneously.
C
⚡ Power
Cursed Spirit Manipulation
Allows the user to absorb and take full control of any cursed spirit they defeat, adding it to their arsenal. Absorbed spirits can be deployed in combat, used as shields, or merged to produce new and more powerful entities. The more spirits collected, the more versatile and overwhelming the technique becomes.
C
⚡ Power
Arc of Time
A form of time magic that applies specifically to physical objects. Allows the user to age an object forward — accelerating its decay and destruction — or rewind it to a previous state, restoring damage or reversing changes. Particularly effective against inorganic matter. Living targets are far more resistant and cannot be aged or rewound directly under most circumstances.
C
⚡ Power
Moody Blues
Leone Abbacchio's Stand from Golden Wind. Can replay the past actions of any person at a specific location — transforming into a perfect recreation of that person's body and movements at a chosen point in time, replaying everything they did with complete accuracy, including sounds and speech. The replay happens in real time, matching the original duration exactly. During replay, Moody Blues cannot fight and is vulnerable, but the intelligence it provides for tracking, investigation, and reading an opponent's history is unparalleled.
C
⚡ Power
Echoes Act 1-3
Koichi Hirose's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable, evolving across three distinct forms. Act 1 fires egg-shaped projectiles that leave sound effects physically imprinted on surfaces — when touched, the embedded sound replays at full volume. Act 2 materializes those sound effects as real physical phenomena — the word BANG creates an actual explosion, SLIP creates real slipperiness, and so on. Act 3 is a close-range powerhouse that can mark targets with its ability SEX PISTOLS — any surface marked by Act 3 becomes subject to a heavy gravitational pressure, pinning the target in place with a force proportional to the number applied. The user can freely switch between all three acts and each has a distinct role in combat.
C
⚡ Power
Cursed Speech
A powerful innate technique that infuses spoken words with cursed energy, forcing anyone who hears them to obey as commands. Can compel targets to stop, explode, or be hurled away with a single word. The stronger the command, the greater the strain on the user's own throat and body.
C
⚡ Power
Cream
Vanilla Ice's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. In its basic form, a powerful close-range humanoid of exceptional physical strength. Its ability is the Void: Cream can swallow itself and its user, consuming them into a ball of nothingness that erases anything it passes through — matter, space, and people alike are annihilated on contact without leaving any trace. The void ball moves freely in any direction, carving paths of total destruction through walls, floors, and everything in its path. Its singular weakness is that while in void form, Cream and its user are completely blind, making navigation entirely dependent on memory and estimation.
C
⚡ Power
One For All
A transferable power-stockpiling quirk. Greatly enhances the user's physical abilities — strength, speed, and durability. This version does not include the quirks of previous users.
C
⚡ Power
Time Magic
Grants the ability to manipulate the flow of time in a localized area — slowing, stopping, or accelerating it at will. Gives the user a significant advantage in combat and movement. Difficult to master fully and highly taxing to sustain over long periods.
C
⚡ Power
Whitesnake
Enrico Pucci's Stand from Stone Ocean. Can extract a person's Stand and memories in the form of physical DISC objects through a single touch. The victim immediately falls into a comatose state and loses all memory and Stand ability until their DISCs are returned. Extracted DISCs can be implanted into other people — granting them the Stand or memories contained within. Whitesnake can also produce corrosive acid from its hands, capable of dissolving most materials. Its intelligence-gathering and ability-stealing potential make it one of the most strategically dangerous Stands in the series.
C
⚡ Power
Fire God Slayer Magic
A God Slayer magic attuned to fire, granting the ability to generate and control black flames of divine origin. These flames burn far hotter than conventional fire and cannot be absorbed by Dragon Slayers or standard fire magic users. Extraordinarily difficult to extinguish and overwhelms most fire-based defenses.
C
⚡ Power
Instant Transmission
A teleportation technique that allows the user to instantly move to any location by locking onto a ki signature. Range is theoretically limitless as long as the target's energy can be sensed. Can be used offensively to close gaps or escape in an instant.
C
⚡ Power
Destructive Death
Enhances the user's martial arts with waves of destructive shockwave energy released on impact. Each strike sends out expanding arcs of force capable of obliterating anything in their path. Also grants extrasensory perception to detect and predict an opponent's movements before they act.
C
⚡ Power
Half-Cold Half-Hot
Grants control over both ice and fire, split between the left and right sides of the body. Each side can be used independently or in tandem for devastating combinations.
C
⚡ Power
Scary Monsters
Diego Brando's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Grants the ability to transform the user and any target they touch into powerful dinosaur-like creatures, enhancing their strength, speed, and physical capabilities dramatically. Transformed targets retain the user's control over them. The transformation can also spread like a virus — those who come into contact with a transformed individual may themselves undergo the change. In full transformation, the user also gains enhanced senses, regenerative capability, and the instincts of a predator.
C
⚡ Power
Devil Slayer Magic
A specialized magic type designed to combat and destroy demons and devil-class entities. Like Dragon Slayer magic, the user can consume their element to replenish strength. Attacks deal significantly amplified damage to demonic targets and can neutralize their abilities on contact. A powerful counter to any opponent of demonic origin.
C
⚡ Power
Galick Gun
A powerful energy wave fired from both hands pressed together at the chest. Rivals the Kamehameha in raw output, launching a wide, devastating beam of purple energy capable of leveling mountains at full charge.
C
⚡ Power
Sun Breathing
The original and most powerful of all breathing styles, from which all others are derived. Techniques are radiant and all-encompassing, covering every angle of attack and defense. Capable of permanently destroying demons rather than simply decapitating them. Extremely difficult to master.
C
⚡ Power
Porcelain Vase Spells
Allows the user to conjure an unlimited number of porcelain vases and instantly teleport themselves and others between them. The vases can also be used offensively — spawning fish-like creatures, encasing targets in pottery, or transforming the surrounding environment into a deadly, grotesque landscape.
C
⚡ Power
Sky Dragon Slayer Magic
The Dragon Slayer magic of the sky element, primarily support-oriented. Grants powerful healing and buffing abilities alongside attacks that manipulate air currents at high speed. The healing component can restore wounds and reverse the effects of certain poisons, making it uniquely versatile among Dragon Slayer types. Can be pushed further through Dragon Force.
C
⚡ Power
Decay
Allows the user to disintegrate anything they touch with all five fingers simultaneously. The decay spreads from the point of contact and cannot be stopped once it begins. One of the most lethal quirks in existence.
C
⚡ Power
Lightning Dragon Slayer Magic
The Dragon Slayer magic of the lightning element. Allows the user to generate, control, and consume lightning to replenish their strength. Attacks carry tremendous electrical force and speed, and the user can channel electricity through their own body for enhanced physical strikes. Can be pushed to devastating output through Dragon Force.
C
⚡ Power
Soft & Wet
Josuke Higashikata's Stand from JoJolion. A close-range humanoid of strong physical capability. Its ability generates soap bubbles that can steal any quantifiable property from objects or living beings — not just physical attributes like moisture or friction, but abstract physical laws themselves. Gravity, sound, sight, the concept of friction between two surfaces, the property of being able to breathe — anything that can be defined as a property or law governing a thing can be stripped away and stored in a bubble. These stolen properties can be transferred to other objects or simply released. The bubbles are actually spinning lines of Spin energy taking a spherical form, giving them properties beyond ordinary physics. If obtained a second time, it evolves into Soft & Wet: Go Beyond — a B Rank ability.
C
⚡ Power
Double
Allows the user to create a near-perfect copy of any person they have touched, replicating their appearance, voice, and quirk. The copy is fully functional but fades after a set duration.
C
⚡ Power
R.I.P
A Curse wielded by an Etherious demon. Upon activation, it blankets an area in a death-like magical field that induces overwhelming drowsiness in every living being caught within it. The effect cannot be resisted through willpower alone — even intense physical pain is insufficient to fight it off, as the curse bypasses conscious resistance entirely. One of the most insidious area-control abilities in existence.
C
⚡ Power
Crazy Diamond
Josuke Higashikata's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable. Physically on par with Star Platinum — its punches exceed 300 km/h and carry enough force to punch through two people simultaneously. Its defining ability is restoration: Crazy Diamond can return any object or person it touches to a previous state — repairing damage, healing wounds, reversing changes, or even reconstructing scattered pieces by sending them flying back together. The ability extends to tracking targets using fragments, reassembling things into different configurations, and can be selectively stopped mid-repair. The one limitation is that it cannot be used on Josuke himself.
C
⚡ Power
Magic Touch
The ability of Usagi Ninjinka, leader of the Rabbit Gang from Dragon Ball. Any living thing that touches the user is instantly transformed into a carrot — the contact is bidirectional, meaning the target doesn't need to be grabbed; simply brushing against the user is sufficient. The ability can be switched on and off at will, allowing the user to touch allies or handle non-living objects without triggering it. Only works on living targets — inanimate objects are unaffected. The transformation is fully reversible: the user can restore the target to normal by clapping their hands. Targets remember nothing from their time as a carrot upon returning to normal. Theoretically capable of affecting any living being regardless of power level, though whether there is an upper limit against overwhelmingly powerful opponents remains unknown.
C
⚡ Power
Death 13
The Stand of Mannish Boy from Stardust Crusaders. Exists exclusively within the dream world — it has no presence or power in the waking world whatsoever. When a living being falls asleep within range of its user, their consciousness is drawn into Death 13's nightmare realm: a twisted carnival where Death 13 has absolute dominion over everything, can reshape the environment freely, and wields a massive scythe. Injuries inflicted within the dream are carried into the waking world. Victims retain no memory of the Stand upon waking. Inside the dream, Death 13 is effectively invincible — the only counter is to summon one's own Stand before falling asleep. Outside the dream, it is completely powerless and relies entirely on catching victims unaware.
C
⚡ Power
C-MOON
Enrico Pucci's Stand from Stone Ocean, evolved from Whitesnake. Inverts gravity in a 3-kilometer radius centered on the user — everything within that range is pushed away from the user as the new center of gravity, sending objects and people flying outward. Additionally, any surface that C-MOON directly touches with its hands is inverted — turned inside out, which is instantly lethal when applied to a living body. Combining the gravity inversion with the inversion touch makes C-MOON an extraordinarily dangerous Stand at any range.
C
⚡ Power
Copying Magic
Allows the user to observe and perfectly replicate any magic they witness, adding it to their own repertoire. Each copied magic can be used at the user's own proficiency level. The wider the library of observed magic, the more adaptable and dangerous the user becomes in any situation.
C
⚡ Power
Kenjaku's Transplant
The technique of the ancient sorcerer Kenjaku. Allows the user to remove their own brain and transplant it into another body, inheriting that body's cursed technique alongside their own accumulated abilities. Can be used to effectively steal any technique from a compatible host.
C
⚡ Power
Construction
Allows the user to create anything they can vividly imagine out of cursed energy, giving it physical form and substance. The more detailed and precise the mental image, the more real and functional the construct becomes. Can produce weapons, structures, or complex mechanisms.
C
⚡ Power
Spirit Bomb
A technique that gathers energy from all living things in the surrounding area — plants, animals, people, and the planet itself. The collected energy is compressed into a massive orb and launched at the target. The more time and willing contributors, the more devastating the result.
C
⚡ Power
Ankhseram Black Magic
The forbidden magic of the god Ankhseram, governing the contradiction between life and death. In this modified form, the user retains enough control to direct its lethal power without it triggering involuntarily. Anything in the user's vicinity can be drained of life at will, causing instant death to weaker targets and severe deterioration to stronger ones. Requires immense concentration to wield without losing control — even modified, it remains one of the most feared magics in existence.
C
⚡ Power
Kamehameha
The iconic energy wave technique. The user cups their hands to the side, concentrates ki, then releases a massive beam of energy with devastating force and range. Can be angled, charged, and fired in rapid succession with training.
C
⚡ Power
Spatial Magic
Allows the user to manipulate and distort space itself. Can be used to teleport across distances, create spatial rifts to redirect attacks, compress or expand the distance between two points, and construct pockets of warped space. One of the most versatile offensive and defensive magic types available.
C
⚡ Power
Lip Service
One of Ajimu Najimi's vast collection of skills. Through a kiss, the user can swap the target's current ability with any ability the user possesses — transferring one of their own skills into the target while reclaiming it at will. However, the user can only retrieve abilities they personally gave out — if the recipient has modified or evolved the transferred ability in any way, it falls outside the user's reach and cannot be taken back. A precise and intimate ability with significant strategic applications for both arming allies and reclaiming assets.
C
⚡ Power
Shrine
A slashing technique that generates two invisible blades of cursed energy — Dismantle, an undirected slash that cuts anything in its path, and Cleave, an adaptive slash that scales in power to match the toughness of the target. Both can be fired at range or applied on contact.
C
⚡ Power
Metallica
Risotto Nero's Stand from Golden Wind. Controls iron and metallic substances within a set range — including the iron naturally present within the human body. Can extract iron from a target's blood to forge blades, needles, or other weapons inside their body, or manipulate external metal freely. Can also scatter iron particles through the air to bend light around the user, rendering them invisible. Highly lethal in close quarters — the ability to fabricate weapons inside an opponent's own bloodstream makes it nearly impossible to defend against without awareness.
C
📦 Item
The Bear Outfit
A full bear-themed equipment set that is non-transferable — anyone other than the rightful wearer gains no benefits from it whatsoever. Obtained in stages across multiple pulls. On the first pull, the wearer receives the bear onesie — a full-body suit that massively amplifies physical strength, enhances physical and magical defense on the black bear side, provides automatic stamina and mana regeneration on the white bear side, and is fully resistant to heat, cold, and water with no adhesive substance capable of sticking to it. Aim correction is also passively active at all times. On the second pull, the bear underwear is added — a base layer capable of shifting between male and female form at will, that keeps itself and the wearer completely clean, eliminates all unpleasant odors, and emits a pleasant scent at all times. On the third pull, the gloves and shoes are added. The black bear glove significantly boosts attack power and levels up with the wearer over time — it also serves as the catalyst to summon Kumayuru, the Swaying Bear, as a permanent familiar. The white bear glove is somewhat weaker offensively but stronger defensively, houses the Bear Box — an infinite personal storage space in which time does not pass for stored items — and serves as the catalyst to summon Kumakyuu, the Hugging Bear, as a permanent familiar. Both bear shoes increase movement speed, prevent fatigue entirely during long travel, and level up with the wearer over time.
C
📦 Item
Spectator
A headpiece Teigu with five distinct sight-based abilities — Insight reads an opponent's mind to predict their next move; Farsight allows clear vision at extreme distances regardless of conditions; Clearsight sees through solid objects; Precognition reads micro muscle movements to anticipate actions before they happen; and Illusion Sight projects a vision of the target's most precious person before their eyes.
C
📦 Item
Shambhala
A pendant-type Teigu that grants spatial manipulation. The user can teleport themselves and others over vast distances by creating a marker at the target location and activating an array that sends everything standing within it there. Requires significant energy to use and cannot be activated in rapid succession without rest.
C
📦 Item
Bansho Fan
A mystical fan from Dragon Ball, thought to have been created from the feathers of the Hikui Bird and originally crafted to fan the Furnace of Eight Divisions. Can completely extinguish any fire regardless of its source or intensity. Beyond fire control, it commands the weather with each wave — one wave raises a powerful gale, two waves summon storm clouds, and three waves bring a violent thunderstorm and torrential downpour. The wind it generates is powerful enough to knock back characters of extraordinary physical capability. Originally owned by Master Roshi, who carelessly used it as a potholder before throwing it away after spilling wonton soup on it.
C
📦 Item
Murasame
A cursed katana-type Teigu known as the One-Cut Killer. A single cut is all it takes — the wound injects a lethal curse into the victim's body that rapidly spreads through their system and stops their heart within seconds. Only works on living organic beings with a heart. The curse can be stopped if the affected area is severed before it spreads.
C
📦 Item
Child Chi-Chi's Full Outfit
The iconic childhood outfit of Chi-Chi from Dragon Ball. A blue bikini top and bottoms worn with pink gloves and boots, and a short green cape. The centerpiece is her pink helmet, which houses two distinct weapons — a detachable blade mounted on top that can be thrown like a boomerang with enough force to decapitate a T-Rex, and a circle on the front that fires a sweeping green laser beam capable of vaporizing whatever it hits. Demonstrated in combat against both dinosaurs and Red Ribbon Army soldiers with devastating effect. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
C
📦 Item
Yeoui
The legendary staff of Jin Mori from God of High School, originally a pillar used to measure the sea levels of the Dragon Palace, forged from the bones of Ogre — the first and most powerful dragon. Can freely extend and contract in both size and weight on the user's command, scaling from pocket-sized to reaching from the Earth to the Moon. In its natural state it weighs 80 million tons, making it near-impossible to even lift for most beings. Practically indestructible — only a handful of the most powerful forces in the series have ever scratched it. The user can also summon it to their side from any distance.
C
📦 Item
SCP-500 — Panacea (47 Pills)
A small container of 47 red pills, each capable of curing any disease, poison, infection, biological affliction, curse, or debuff without exception. A single pill is sufficient to completely eliminate any condition, no matter how severe, exotic, or supernatural in origin. The supply is finite and each pill consumed is gone permanently — making every use an irreversible decision. 47 uses of what is arguably the most valuable restorative item in existence.
C
📦 Item
Super Soldier Serum
A one-time injection that enhances the human body to the peak of physical perfection. Grants greatly increased strength, speed, endurance, and accelerated healing. Effects are permanent.
D
⚡ Power
Thread Manipulation
Grants the ability to generate and control incredibly thin but razor-sharp threads of spider silk. The threads can be woven into webs, used to bind and immobilize targets, or stretched across large areas as invisible traps. Despite their appearance, the threads are strong enough to break Nichirin blades.
D
⚡ Power
Heavenly Restriction (Toji's)
The Heavenly Restriction once belonging to Toji Fushiguro. The user is stripped of all cursed energy in exchange for a physical body pushed far beyond human limits — strength, speed, reflexes, and pain tolerance all reach an extraordinary level. This version is toggleable: the user can switch between the magic-nullifying physical mode and a normal state, with a 5-minute cooldown between switches.
D
⚡ Power
Water Breathing
A fluid and adaptable breathing style modeled after the flow of water. Techniques emphasize smooth, continuous movements that redirect force and flow seamlessly from one strike to the next. One of the most widely used and versatile styles.
D
⚡ Power
Ratio
Allows the user to divide any target into a ten-part ratio. When a hit lands precisely on the 3:7 point — the natural weak point of most structures — it deals catastrophic damage regardless of the target's durability. Also grants Collapse, which destroys the internal structure of anything the technique has touched.
D
⚡ Power
Erasure
Allows the user to nullify the quirks of anyone within their line of sight for as long as they maintain eye contact. Completely shuts down ability-based combat at close to mid range. Does not work while the user is asleep.
D
⚡ Power
Stone Breathing
A brutally powerful breathing style that draws on the immovable force of earth and stone. Techniques hit with crushing, earth-shaking weight and are designed to overwhelm opponents through sheer force and durability.
D
⚡ Power
Emperor
Hol Horse's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. Manifests as a self-guiding handgun that is a part of the user's body — it cannot be disarmed or taken away. Its bullets are fully under the user's telekinetic control after being fired, curving and tracking targets across any distance and from any angle. The user can redirect shots mid-flight to account for movement or dodges. Since the gun itself is part of the Stand, it functions as an extension of the user's will rather than an independent weapon.
D
⚡ Power
Weather Report
Weather Report's Stand from Stone Ocean. Grants complete control over local atmospheric conditions — summoning rain, lightning, wind, fog, hail, and more. Can generate highly specific and lethal phenomena such as lightning strikes on a precise target, spinning columns of air, or localized conditions that affect only a small area. Its more dangerous awakened form, Heavy Weather, unlocks a reality-altering snail transformation ability, but even in its base form Weather Report is one of the most versatile and powerful environmental Stands in the series.
D
⚡ Power
Enhancement Magic
Channels magic directly into the user's or an ally's body, temporarily boosting strength, speed, and endurance beyond their normal limits. The scale of the enhancement depends on the magical energy invested. A reliable and adaptable support ability.
D
⚡ Power
Barrier Magic
Allows the user to generate magical barriers of varying size, shape, and strength. Can be deployed instantly to block incoming attacks, contain targets, or protect allies. Durability and complexity scale with the user's magical output.
D
⚡ Power
Beast Breathing
A wild, animalistic breathing style that mimics the unpredictable movements of a beast. Focuses on erratic, close-range attacks using all four limbs, making it extremely difficult to read or defend against. Particularly effective in chaotic, aggressive combat.
D
⚡ Power
Sticky Fingers
Bruno Bucciarati's Stand from Golden Wind. Creates functional zippers on any surface it punches — walls, floors, objects, and living bodies alike. These zippers open compartments that lead into pocket spaces, allowing storage of objects or people, or simply open wounds and passages in whatever they're placed on. Can also zip and unzip parts of the user's own body, allowing Bucciarati to detach and reattach his limbs at will and use them as decoys or tools.
D
⚡ Power
Slide and Glide
Allows the user to slide across any flat surface with zero friction at high speed. Enables rapid movement and unpredictable angles of approach in open environments.
D
⚡ Power
Byakugan
A powerful dojutsu that grants near-360 degree vision and the ability to see through objects and barriers. Also allows the user to perceive chakra pathways, making it highly effective in close-range combat.
D
⚡ Power
Cell Activation
Allows the user to activate and optimize the cells of any living thing they touch, massively boosting their physical performance, accelerating healing, and enhancing stamina. Can be applied to allies or the user themselves.
D
⚡ Power
Solar Flare
A blinding technique that releases an intense flash of light from the user's hands, temporarily blinding anyone looking directly at them regardless of power level. Highly effective as an escape tool or setup for a follow-up attack.
D
⚡ Power
Spin
An ancient shooting technique that channels a perfect rotational force into projectiles — originally bullets or nails — by matching the spin to the golden ratio found throughout nature. A perfectly executed spin creates a self-perpetuating rotation that bores through targets with incredible penetrating force, bypassing conventional defenses. The technique requires exceptional precision and physical control to execute, and its power scales directly with how close the rotation comes to the perfect golden ratio. The closer to perfect, the more devastating the result. If the user achieves a perfect golden ratio rotation, the Spin evolves into the Golden Spin — a B rank ability.
D
⚡ Power
Hierophant Green
Noriaki Kakyoin's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. A long-range Stand with the unique ability to extend and stretch its body across vast distances — its tendrils can reach up to 10,000 meters. Fires Emerald Splash: a rapid barrage of emerald energy bullets from any part of its extended body, making it nearly impossible to dodge when fired in a wide spread from multiple angles simultaneously. Can also wrap its tendrils around targets to bind and restrain them. Unlike most Stands, Hierophant Green can detach from its user and act at a significant distance, giving it exceptional reach and positioning flexibility.
D
⚡ Power
Thunder Breathing
An ultra-fast breathing style focused almost entirely on a single lightning-quick thrust. The first form is considered one of the fastest single strikes in any breathing style. Requires exceptional leg strength and reflexes to execute.
D
⚡ Power
Stone Free
Jolyne Cujoh's Stand from Stone Ocean. Can unravel the user's body — and the Stand itself — into a strong, flexible string. The string is tough enough to cut through flesh and bind targets securely. Jolyne can extend string from any part of her body, reshape herself to slip through tight spaces, and use the string to sense vibrations transmitted along surfaces. In full Stand form, Stone Free is a close-range powerhouse; the string ability simply adds exceptional versatility and reach to an already formidable fighter.
D
⚡ Power
Healing Magic
Channels magical energy to accelerate the natural healing process in living beings, closing wounds and restoring the body's condition. More severe injuries require greater concentration and magical power. Cannot reverse death.
D
⚡ Power
Straw Doll Technique
Allows the user to drive nails into straw dolls to redirect harm to a target from a distance. The nails manifest as Resonance — sending cursed energy through a wound already inflicted on the target to massively amplify the damage. Highly effective as a finishing technique on an already injured opponent.
D
⚡ Power
Kraft Work
Sale's Stand from Golden Wind. Can lock the motion of any object it touches, fixing it in place in absolute space. A locked object retains all the momentum and kinetic energy it had at the moment of locking — releasing it causes it to resume moving at full original force. This allows for setups like locking bullets mid-flight then releasing them simultaneously, or fixing environmental objects as barriers. The user can also lock themselves in place to become immovable regardless of incoming force.
D
⚡ Power
Love Breathing
A personalized breathing style derived from Flame Breathing. Techniques are fluid and unpredictable, disguising lethal strikes within graceful, dance-like movements. Disarms opponents through apparent elegance before landing devastating blows.
D
⚡ Power
Acid
Allows the user to secrete a corrosive acid from their skin that can melt through most materials. The potency and viscosity of the acid can be controlled at will.
D
⚡ Power
Launch's Personality Shift
A toggleable ability modeled after the involuntary personality-switching condition of Launch from Dragon Ball. The user has a dominant natural personality — either peaceful or aggressive — and can trigger a shift into their opposite state at will. If the user is naturally more peaceful, their shifted state is aggressive and combat-hungry, granting a 3x multiplier to all offensive output for as long as it is sustained. If the user is naturally more aggressive, their shifted state is calm and composed, granting a 3x multiplier to all defensive capability for as long as it is sustained. Switching back is equally instant and voluntary. The multiplier applies only while in the non-dominant state — the natural personality receives no bonus. Additionally, while in the aggressive state, the user gains the ability to manifest most modern firearms out of thin air — rifles, handguns, shotguns, and more appear on demand, fully loaded and ready to use.
D
⚡ Power
Parsley Park
Gwess's Stand from Stone Ocean — not to be confused with Kiss. Tracks the health and physical condition of the user and nearby allies in real time, identifying injuries, illness, internal anomalies, and their precise locations within the body with exceptional accuracy. Functions as a passive diagnostic tool that can detect damage others might not be aware of, making it invaluable for medical assessment and battlefield triage.
D
⚡ Power
Fierce Wings
Grants the user a powerful pair of wings capable of high-speed flight and precise aerial maneuverability. The feathers can also be launched as sharp projectiles with considerable force.
D
⚡ Power
Hardening
Allows the user to harden any part of their body into an incredibly tough, jagged surface. Greatly increases defensive capability and turns the user's body itself into a weapon.
D
⚡ Power
Manifest
Allows the user to take on the physical characteristics of any creature they have consumed a part of. Grants the proportional strength, speed, and traits of that creature temporarily. The creature's material must not have been fully digested yet — once it passes through the system, the ability can no longer be used for that sample.
D
⚡ Power
Red Hot Chili Pepper
Akira Otoishi's Stand from Diamond is Unbreakable. Absorbs and stores electrical energy, growing dramatically stronger the more power it accumulates. Can travel through electrical currents — power lines, wiring, circuits — at extremely high speed, allowing near-instantaneous movement across any electrically connected infrastructure. Delivers devastating electrical strikes in combat, and can drain electrical devices to replenish its own power. Its one weakness is that in environments without electricity it becomes significantly weaker.
D
⚡ Power
Universal Language Comprehension
Grants the user the ability to perfectly understand and speak any language they are aware of — spoken, written, or otherwise. Awareness requires only knowing that a language exists, not any prior exposure to it — knowing that French, Ancient Sumerian, or a magical incantation tongue exists is sufficient for immediate fluency. This extends to animal communication, computer code, magic languages, ancient and dead tongues, and any other communicative system the user knows to exist. In practice this means fluent interaction with virtually any living being, seamless use of magic systems tied to specific languages, and the ability to interface directly with machines and ancient knowledge.
D
⚡ Power
Flower Breathing
An elegant breathing style derived from Water Breathing. Techniques flow gracefully but strike with sharp, precise cuts. Particularly effective against fast-moving targets, with several forms designed to counter evasive opponents.
D
⚡ Power
Catch the Rainbow
Blackmore's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Allows the user to become intangible during rainfall, phasing through any physical attack as long as rain is falling on them. The more rain present, the more completely intangible the user becomes. Can also freeze raindrops in place to use as platforms or projectiles. Completely useless in dry conditions — rain must be actively falling for the ability to function.
D
⚡ Power
Serpent Breathing
A sinuous, winding breathing style that mimics the movement of a snake. Attacks follow curved, unpredictable paths that are nearly impossible to track, allowing strikes to reach around guards and connect from unexpected angles.
D
⚡ Power
Snatch
Ban's ability from Seven Deadly Sins. Allows the user to steal physical abilities, stats, and objects from others — grabbing strength, speed, or other physical attributes directly from an opponent and adding them to their own. At its most extreme, it can be used to physically rip the heart out of a target's chest. The more physically capable the opponent, the more there is to take.
D
⚡ Power
Shapeshifting (Puar)
The transformative ability of Puar from Dragon Ball. Allows the user to instantly transform into any person, creature, or object they have seen or can accurately visualize, with no time limit on how long the form can be held and no restriction on how many times it can be used. The transformation is purely cosmetic — the user does not gain the abilities, strength, or powers of whatever they transform into. The only limit is the user's own knowledge and imagination — they cannot become something they have never observed or cannot mentally picture with sufficient accuracy.
D
⚡ Power
Sound Breathing
An explosive breathing style derived from Flame Breathing. Techniques are loud, flashy, and devastating, using rapid spinning attacks and overwhelming force to disorient and destroy targets. Requires exceptional physical conditioning.
D
⚡ Power
Illusion Magic
Projects realistic false images, sounds, and sensations into the minds of targets, deceiving their senses completely. Can be used to disorient, mislead, or terrify opponents. The complexity and believability of the illusion scales with the user's skill and magical power.
D
⚡ Power
Shadow Clone Jutsu
Creates one or more physical copies of the user that can fight and act independently. Clones vanish after taking damage but transfer their experiences back to the user upon dispelling.
D
⚡ Power
Silver Chariot
Jean Pierre Polnareff's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. An armored close-range Stand that wields a rapier with lightning-fast thrusts — its speed is among the highest in the series, capable of delivering dozens of stabs in an instant. Can shed its armor entirely for a significant additional boost in speed, though this leaves the user more vulnerable. The blade is precise enough to deflect bullets and strike targets at near-impossible angles. Polnareff's mastery of the Stand makes Silver Chariot a consistently deadly opponent at close range.
D
⚡ Power
3 Tomoe Sharingan
The fully awakened form of the Sharingan. Grants the ability to perfectly perceive and copy any movement, technique, or jutsu witnessed. Also allows basic genjutsu to be cast through eye contact.
D
⚡ Power
Rabbit
Grants the physical attributes of a rabbit — extraordinary leg strength, exceptional jumping ability, and enhanced speed. The user can cover massive distances in a single bound and deliver devastating kick-based attacks.
D
⚡ Power
Transformation Magic
Allows the user to alter their physical appearance, taking on the form of other people, creatures, or objects with convincing accuracy. The transformation is purely cosmetic and does not grant the abilities of whatever form is taken. Useful for infiltration and deception.
D
⚡ Power
Yumeko Jabami's Gambling Intuition
The preternatural gambling sense of Yumeko Jabami. Grants the ability to detect cheating, hidden patterns, and manipulated odds in any game almost instantly through hyper-focused observation and instinct. Also comes with an unshakeable nerve under pressure — the higher the stakes, the sharper the focus becomes.
D
⚡ Power
Telepathy
Allows the user to communicate directly with others through thought, bypassing speech and distance. Can also be used to read surface-level thoughts or broadcast messages to multiple targets simultaneously. A powerful tool for coordination and intelligence gathering.
D
⚡ Power
Acid Magic
Allows the user to generate and direct a potent magical acid, firing it in streams or coating surfaces in corrosive liquid capable of dissolving most materials it contacts. Unlike physical acids, its potency and spread can be adjusted through magical control alone.
D
⚡ Power
Mist Breathing
A deceptive breathing style that uses irregular rhythm and motion to confuse opponents. Techniques appear to shift in and out of range unpredictably, making it difficult for enemies to judge timing or distance.
D
⚡ Power
Prayer Song
Miguel Oduol's innate technique. Activated by dancing to a specific beat that is etched into the user's body. While the rhythm is maintained, the user's physical abilities are greatly enhanced and curses are actively driven away from their body — simultaneously buffing the user and debuffing nearby opponents. Functions similarly to a domain in terms of its area effect, but without requiring one.
D
⚡ Power
Steel Ball Forging
The Zeppeli family's innate craft, carried in the hands. Allows the user to perfectly forge Steel Balls from any available metal, each one shaped and weighted to exact specifications suited for channeling Spin at the golden ratio. The quality of the balls is not dependent on the quality of the source material — whatever metal is available, the result is always a perfectly made instrument for Spin. An unlimited supply of ideal Spin mediums as long as there is metal within reach.
D
⚡ Power
Aera
