Sprouts large feathered wings from the user's back, granting the ability to fly at considerable speed and carry others through the air. Simple, reliable, and highly practical for aerial travel and combat positioning. Sustained flight consumes magical energy over time.
D
⚡ Power
Drum Spells
Embeds six Tsuzumi drums across the body, each producing a different effect when struck. The shoulder drums rotate the surrounding room left or right, the leg drums rotate it forward or backward, the navel drum releases a slashing attack, and the back drum teleports the user or others to a different room. Only functional within an enclosed structure.
D
⚡ Power
Black Flash
Grants the ability to use a Black Flash. Slightly increases the chances of it occurring.
D
⚡ Power
Boogie Woogie
A technique that allows the user to instantly swap the positions of any two things that contain cursed energy by clapping their hands. This includes people, objects, and cursed spirits — anything imbued with cursed energy is a valid target. The range is determined entirely by how far the user can sense cursed energy, making it more versatile the more refined their perception becomes.
D
⚡ Power
Electrification
Allows the user to generate and discharge electricity throughout their body. Can be used for powerful strikes, paralysis, or to enhance speed by stimulating their own muscles. Extended use risks damaging the user's own nervous system.
D
⚡ Power
Flame Breathing
A powerful breathing style that channels explosive, forward-driving force into each attack. Techniques are bold and direct, hitting with intense heat and momentum. One of the most respected and storied styles among Demon Slayers.
D
⚡ Power
Hamon
An ancient martial art that channels sunlight energy through controlled breathing. Can be used to enhance physical strikes, heal wounds, and is particularly effective against vampires and undead beings.
D
⚡ Power
Wind Breathing
A fierce and sweeping breathing style that strikes with the force of a violent gale. Techniques are wide-ranging and powerful, capable of cutting down multiple targets at once with each swing.
D
⚡ Power
Roga Fufu Ken
Yamcha's signature technique, invented during his days as a desert bandit. A purely physical style of kenpō that channels ki energy directly into the strikes rather than expelling it outward — a unique approach that makes it distinct from nearly every other technique in existence. The user fights with the characteristics of a wolf attempting to bite its prey to death, launching a relentless flurry of high-speed punches and kicks that prioritize speed above all else, often trailed by a red aura or the image of a crimson wolf itself. Finished with a double palm strike that launches the opponent away. Invented by Yamcha and assumed to be his creation alone.
D
⚡ Power
Love
Allows the user to grant a powerful boost to a target by confessing their feelings for them. The more intense the user's love, the stronger the power transferred. Can only be activated once per day and the boost lasts for a limited time, making it a high-value trump card best saved for critical moments.
D
⚡ Power
Insect Breathing
A swift, precise breathing style designed for a user lacking the raw strength to decapitate demons. Compensates through rapid, needle-like thrusts that inject Wisteria poison directly into the target. Highly technical and lethal at close range.
D
⚡ Power
Air Magic
Allows the user to generate and shape currents of air into blades, shields, or concentrated bursts. Effective at any range for offense, defense, and mobility — propelling the user or launching opponents across distances.
D
⚡ Power
Wheel of Fortune
ZZ's Stand from Stardust Crusaders. Fuses with any vehicle the user is in, dramatically enhancing its speed, power, and off-road capability. The fused vehicle can traverse virtually any terrain, extend metal spikes to grip surfaces, and weaponize fuel — spraying it from the exhaust and igniting it as a massive flamethrower. The Stand can also warp the chassis of the vehicle at will, reshaping it mid-pursuit. The user can hide inside or merge with the vehicle completely, making them difficult to target directly.
D
⚡ Power
Jajanken
A Nen technique based on rock-paper-scissors. Rock releases a concentrated blast of Nen energy on impact. Scissors fires two sharp beams of Nen from the fingers. Paper emits a large explosion of Nen that engulfs the surrounding area. Each form requires a charge time, making timing and reading the opponent critical to landing any of them.
D
⚡ Power
Hadoken
A concentrated ball of life energy fired from both palms thrust forward. A staple of martial arts energy combat — fast, reliable, and capable of staggering or knocking back opponents at range. Can be charged for a more powerful variant.
D
⚡ Power
Paralyzing Gaze
A technique that, upon making eye contact with a target, locks their body in place through sheer cursed energy pressure transmitted through the eyes. The stronger the user's cursed energy, the more complete and lasting the paralysis.
D
⚡ Power
Creation
Allows the user to create objects out of lipids extracted from their own body. The properties of the created object depend on the nutrients consumed beforehand — a versatile and highly adaptable ability.
D
📦 Item
Diego Brando's Full Outfit
The complete signature outfit of Diego Brando. Centres around his iconic equestrian helmet bearing the letters 'D', 'I', and 'O' mounted on bending pins emerging from a small ribbon tied at its front. The main outfit consists of a turtleneck jumper patterned with a diagonal grid, mid-forearm-length light gloves, light wide-legged breeches, and tall dark riding boots. Bold, precise, and unmistakably built for both racing and combat. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Bulma's Full Outfit (Gypsy)
The outfit Bulma acquired at a village store immediately after finally ditching the bunny costume, worn through to her return to West City. A white shoulderless top paired with white pants and a red waistband cinching the waist, finished with a small blue jacket, gold armlets on both wrists, and red sandals. A relief upgrade from what came before, and a look that oddly suits her perfectly. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Child Goku's Full Outfit
The very first outfit worn by Son Goku at the start of Dragon Ball, before receiving his trademark orange gi. A blue martial arts dougi with no markings or symbols, paired with red wristbands and a white belt tied in a bow at the front. Simple, unadorned, and worn by a boy who had barely just begun his journey. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
AH-64 Apache (+ 3,600x 30mm Rounds & 48x Hellfire Missiles)
A fully operational AH-64 Apache attack helicopter. One of the most feared and capable combat helicopters in existence. Armed with a 30mm M230 chain gun stocked with 3,600 rounds, 48 AGM-114 Hellfire anti-tank missiles, and rocket pods. Equipped with advanced targeting systems, night vision, and the ability to operate in virtually any weather condition. A nightmare for ground forces and armored vehicles alike.
D
📦 Item
The Softest Pillow in the Universe
Exactly what it says. No pillow in any corner of the universe comes close to this level of comfort. The moment your head touches it, every muscle in your body relaxes. Sleep quality increases dramatically. Fighting over it is inevitable.
D
📦 Item
Ryu's Full Outfit
The iconic outfit of Ryu from Street Fighter. Includes a white karate gi with the sleeves fully torn off, loose-fitting gi pants with frayed edges, a black martial arts belt, and his signature long red hachimaki headband. Also includes his red fingerless hand pads. Worn bare-footed, as Ryu prefers. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Yamcha's Full Outfit (Desert Bandit)
The signature first outfit of Yamcha from Dragon Ball, worn during his days as a desert bandit. A Chinese-style martial arts ensemble consisting of a white turban and a vest, with the kanji 楽 (raku), meaning "comfort" or "easy", displayed on the chest — a personal choice reflecting nothing more than Yamcha's own preference for comfort. Paired with his signature sword, carried as a sidearm for combat. The look of a fierce and independent warrior who feared nothing but beautiful women. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
SCP-458 — The Never-Ending Pizza Box
A standard pizza box that, when opened by anyone, always contains a freshly made pizza perfectly tailored to that person's preferences at that exact moment — the right size, the right toppings, the right temperature. The box is never empty. The pizza is always exactly what you want. The mechanism behind it is entirely unknown. Practically useless in combat and absolutely invaluable in every other situation.
D
📦 Item
Steven Steel's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Steven Steel, promoter of the Steel Ball Run. A tall, commanding ensemble centered around a high-collared coat decorated with several tassels along the collar, paired with assorted trousers and small rectangular glasses. Eccentric and authoritative in equal measure — the look of a man who has reinvented himself many times and arrived at something unmistakably his own. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Power Pole
Goku's legendary extending staff. Can grow and shrink on command to any length, from pocket-sized to long enough to reach the heavens. Near-indestructible and deceptively powerful as a combat weapon in the hands of someone who knows how to use it.
D
📦 Item
Stone Mask
An ancient artifact that, when activated with blood, transforms the wearer into a vampire. Grants superhuman strength, speed, regeneration, and the ability to manipulate their own body. A dangerous and irreversible transformation. If the Red Stone of Aja is used to channel light through this mask during activation, the result surpasses vampirism entirely — transforming the wearer into the ultimate life form, a B rank outcome.
D
📦 Item
M1 Abrams (+ 126x 120mm Rounds)
A fully operational M1 Abrams main battle tank. One of the most advanced and heavily armored tanks ever built, weighing in at around 70 tons with composite armor capable of withstanding most conventional anti-tank weapons. Armed with a 120mm smoothbore cannon and comes stocked with 126 rounds. Also equipped with a coaxial machine gun and two additional machine gun mounts. An absolute powerhouse on any battlefield.
D
📦 Item
The Paradise Herb
An extraordinarily rare herb from the Dragon Ball universe. Grants the one who consumes it Type 1 immortality — eternal life, immune to death from age or illness. However, the herb must be consumed once every 1,000 years to maintain the immortality. Failure to do so will cause the effect to lapse.
D
📦 Item
Pocoloco's Full Outfit
The signature racing outfit of Pocoloco from Steel Ball Run. A light, cropped tank top and pants both sporting a distinctive brick-like pattern, worn with a harness, knee-high boots, and a classic leather aviator helmet covered with distinctive elliptical pieces. During cold crossings, a long-sleeved shirt with a similar brick pattern is worn over the tank top. Racing number 777. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Toji Fushiguro's Full Outfit
The signature combat outfit of Toji Fushiguro. Includes a tight-fitting short-sleeve black shirt, tan baggy training pants, a black belt woven through the waist, and black martial arts slippers. Simple, unrestricted, and built entirely for maximum physical performance. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Cross Tail
A glove-type Teigu that houses a supply of near-indestructible razor-sharp threads. The threads can be woven into weapons, armor, traps, or used as sensory barriers to detect intruders. Highly versatile and best suited to creative users who can think on their feet.
D
📦 Item
SCP-035 — The Possessive Mask
A white porcelain comedy mask of unknown origin. When worn, it immediately seizes full control of the host's body, overriding their will entirely while the original wearer's consciousness is suppressed. The entity behind the mask is highly intelligent, manipulative, and persuasive — capable of convincing others to put it on through charm and deception alone. The mask also secretes a corrosive fluid that slowly destroys whatever surface it rests on, including the host body over time. A deeply dangerous object in the wrong hands — or on the wrong face.
D
📦 Item
Master Roshi's Full Outfit (Turtle Hermit)
The iconic first and most recognizable outfit of Master Roshi, the Turtle Hermit. A loud Hawaiian-style button-up shirt covered in printed letters and triangles, paired with cuffed shorts and simple sandals. Topped with his trademark dark sunglasses. A large turtle shell worn on the back with shoulder straps — the mark of the Kame School. Completed by a walking cane, carried in hand at all times. The signature look of a man who invented the Kamehameha, trained generations of the world's greatest fighters, and once destroyed the Moon — all while appearing to be nothing more than a frail, lecherous old man on a beach. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Lucy Steel's Full Outfit
The signature main outfit of Lucy Steel. A short dress worn over striped tights, paired with arm warmers and tall boots — both the arm warmers and boots adorned with circular decorations throughout. Simple and distinctive, the look of a young woman navigating the chaos of the Steel Ball Run with quiet determination. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Muhammad Avdol's Full Outfit
The signature main outfit of Muhammad Avdol from Stardust Crusaders. A long red flowing jellabiya — a traditional Egyptian overcoat — worn over white and beige clothing underneath, with a white headband wrapped around the head. Completed with a distinctive golden chain necklace. The overall look is striking and deliberate, mirroring the visual of the Magician card from the Rider-Waite tarot deck — fitting for a professional fortune teller. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Baby Gamera
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Baby Gamera into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. A miniature version of the legendary kaiju Gamera, associated with Master Roshi. Brown and tortoise-like in appearance, with a spiked shell, a long tail, and pronounced tusks. Flies by retracting his limbs into his shell and expelling fire from the holes, spinning like a top to propel himself and any rider through the air. Nearly as fast as the legendary Kinto-Un, making it one of the quickest modes of aerial transport available. The only downside is that extended spinning causes significant motion sickness in the rider. Cooperative and willing in all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
D
📦 Item
Launch's General Blue Saga Outfit
Launch's outfit worn during the General Blue Saga of Dragon Ball. A pink tank top paired with black pants and white knee pads. A red ribbon is tied in the outfit. Understated but functional — the kind of outfit that works equally well for a quiet afternoon and a running gunfight. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Perfector
A pair of gloves-type Teigu known as the Glorious Hands of God. Dramatically enhances the speed and precision of the user's hand movements beyond what should be physically possible, enabling surgically precise strikes and techniques at blinding speeds.
D
📦 Item
SCP-173 — The Peanut
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release SCP-173 into the world — after which the marble disappears and the creature remains as a permanent presence. An animate concrete and rebar sculpture of unknown origin. Extremely hostile and capable of moving at untrackable speeds — but only when no one is directly looking at it. As long as eye contact is maintained it is completely immobile. If line of sight is broken for even a moment, it will close the distance and snap the nearest neck instantly. Will readily follow the user's directions — the only orders it will refuse are those that require it to protect or spare a living being. Hunting is its nature; anything contrary to that is where its compliance ends.
D
📦 Item
The Red Stone of Aja
A perfectly formed gemstone of ancient and mysterious origin, said to be the ultimate form of the Aja stone. On its own it is inert, but when light is channeled through it into a Stone Mask, it pushes the transformation far beyond the standard vampire result — evolving the wearer to the absolute peak of biological existence and becoming the ultimate life form, a B rank outcome. An object of immense latent power that requires the right catalyst to unlock.
D
📦 Item
Gyro's Steel Balls
A pair of masterwork iron balls forged to exacting specifications by the Zeppeli family. Perfectly weighted and balanced for channeling and applying Spin, serving as the primary medium through which rotational force is transmitted to a target. In the hands of someone who knows how to use them they are devastatingly precise instruments capable of delivering Spin through walls, around corners, and into the internal structures of the body. Without knowledge of Spin they are simply two very well made iron balls.
D
📦 Item
Extase
A pair of large scissors-type Teigu known as the Cutter of Creation. Capable of cutting through virtually any material in existence. Their size also makes them effective as a defensive tool for blocking incoming attacks. Can emit a blinding flash of light to disorient enemies.
D
📦 Item
Funny Valentine's Full Outfit
The iconic pink outfit of Funny Valentine. Features a flamboyant pink jacket and overcoat over a purple shirt and pants, giving it a distinct magician's aesthetic. Includes frilled garments underneath the coat, net-patterned gloves on the upper half, a black belt, and matching pink shoes. Commanding, extravagant, and unmistakably presidential. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Kryptonite (Rubix Cube Sized)
A chunk of Kryptonite roughly the size of a Rubix cube. In the presence of any Kryptonian — Superman, Supergirl, or otherwise — it rapidly drains their powers, causes intense physical pain, and will kill them with prolonged exposure. Harmless to non-Kryptonians but an absolute trump card against anyone with Kryptonian biology.
D
📦 Item
Gyro Zeppeli's Full Outfit
The complete signature outfit of Gyro Zeppeli. Centres around a wide-brimmed hat with slits across the crown and brim to let light and air filter through, with a pair of slit goggles situated around the crown. The main outfit consists of a short-sleeved studded black leather coat, leather pants, and cowboy boots, with a belt whose buckle bears a pair of hands and a pair of special holsters at the hips for his Steel Balls. Depending on conditions, a scarf may be worn alongside the goggles. Completed by his iconic teeth — either grills or prosthetics — with the phrase 'GO! GO! ZEPPELI' chiselled across them. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Pumpkin
A large rifle-type Teigu that converts the user's spirit energy into concentrated shockwave blasts. Can be configured as a sniper or a rapid-fire weapon. Its key trait is that its firepower scales with the level of danger the user is in — the more desperate the situation, the more devastating each shot.
D
📦 Item
Jean Pierre Polnareff's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Jean Pierre Polnareff from Stardust Crusaders. A fitted black tube top, shoulderless except for a single strap running from the chest over the left shoulder, paired with light trousers and a belt with pouches tied to each hip. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Kinto-Un
The legendary golden flying cloud from Dragon Ball. Moves at incredible speed and responds only to those with a pure heart — anyone else who tries to ride it will fall straight through. Capable of flying anywhere in the world and beyond, requiring no fuel or maintenance. One of the most reliable and fast modes of transport available to a worthy rider.
D
📦 Item
Hawk
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Hawk into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. The talking pig and self-proclaimed 'Captain of the Order of Scraps Disposal' from Seven Deadly Sins. Possesses the rare ability to eat magic and nullify its effects by digesting it, and can absorb the traits of anything he consumes. Cooperative and reliable in almost all situations — he will follow directions without much fuss. The only exception is orders that are outright cruel for no reason or that require him to abandon someone in genuine need. Everything else, he'll grumble about but do.
D
📦 Item
Giorno Giovanna's Full Outfit
The complete outfit of Giorno Giovanna. A two-piece suit featuring a heart-shaped cutout on the chest, wing-shaped emblems on the collar, and gold trim throughout. Adorned with three ladybug brooches on the chest and one below the zipper, with matching ladybug emblems on the shoes. Comes in the iconic pink and green color scheme. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Johnny Joestar's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Johnny Joestar from Steel Ball Run. Centers around a star-printed knit cap with two holes at the top that let his shoulder-length hair stick out like short horns. The main outfit consists of a light blue hooded top adorned with pink stars throughout, with protruding star-patterned hearts on the shoulders and wrist cuffs. Paired with star-patterned trousers and riding boots. Simple jockey attire that grows into something iconic over the course of the Steel Ball Run. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Gyumao's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of the Ox-King from Dragon Ball. A golden horned helmet with a single blue feather plume rising from the top and large circular goggle-like eye pieces on the front. A gold segmented chest plate over a purple tunic adorned with two large yellow stars on the chest, with gold shoulder guards fitted with circular studs. A flowing red cape draped over the shoulders. Blue wide-legged trousers with gold trim at the cuffs, and a white sash tied across the waist. Brown boots complete the look — the full ensemble of a king who rules through overwhelming force. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Launch's Debut Outfit
The first outfit worn by Launch from Dragon Ball. A light green belly-baring crop top paired with yellow shorts cinched with a red belt, brown fingerless gloves, and red shoes worn with green socks. A red ribbon is tied in the outfit. Simple, practical, and iconic — the look of a woman who can go from cooking dinner to firing a machine gun between sneezes. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.

Lionelle
A belt-type Teigu that transforms the user into a powerful beast form, massively boosting their strength, speed, instincts, senses, and perception. Its trump card grants high-speed regeneration capable of healing severe wounds — including lost limbs — over time.

📦 Item
Sandman's Full Outfit
The signature outfit of Sandman from Steel Ball Run. Bare-chested with a deep red studded corset-like garment covering the midsection, fastened with gold rivets throughout. A decorative yellow and black zigzag-patterned collar piece sits across the upper chest and shoulders. Long yellow forearm sleeves extend from the elbows to the wrists. A cream-coloured fringed loincloth hangs at the front, held by a belt with gold square buckles. Fringed leather wrappings are bound around the lower legs, worn barefoot. Body markings include bold dark red chevron stripes across the chest, circular tribal tattoos on both upper arms, and additional patterned markings across the body. A small blade is carried tucked into the back of the belt. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.

📦 Item
Gaea Foundation
A cosmetic case-type Teigu that allows the user to perfectly transform into any living creature — animals, insects, or even plants. The user gains the natural abilities of whatever form they take, enabling both deep infiltration and highly adaptable combat.
D
📦 Item
Joseph Joestar's Full Outfit (Part 2)
The signature battle outfit of young Joseph Joestar from Battle Tendency. Includes a dark green sleeveless tank top, blue jeans, a brown belt with a gold buckle, long brown fingerless gloves with yellow armbands, black motorcycle boots, and his iconic green and yellow striped scarf. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
D
📦 Item
Full Set of Hoi Poi Capsules
A complete set of Hoi Poi Capsules from the Dragon Ball universe. Each capsule can store any physical object inside it — vehicles, houses, equipment, weapons, or supplies — and instantly deploy it when thrown. The full set comes in a carrying case and includes capsules of varying sizes for storing everything from a motorcycle to a full house. An incredibly practical item for anyone who needs to carry more than their pockets allow.
D
📦 Item
Puar
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Puar into the world — after which the marble disappears and he remains as a permanent companion. A small cat-like creature of ambiguous species who graduated from the Southern Transformation Shapeshifting Academy, mastering the art completely unlike his classmate Oolong. Can transform into any person, creature, or object imaginable — including inanimate objects — and hold the form indefinitely with no time limit. The transformation is purely cosmetic and does not grant the abilities or strength of whatever form is taken, and cannot replicate consumable substances like fuel or food. Also possesses the innate ability of self-levitation and flight. Soft-spoken, deeply loyal, and cooperative in virtually all situations — the only orders he will refuse are those that require abandoning someone he cares about in genuine danger.
D
📦 Item
Judo Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt (Godan)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo Godan — a 5th degree black belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains true mastery of Judo in its entirety — every throwing technique, pin, choke, armbar, and transition executed with the precision and efficiency of decades of ingrained practice. At this level throws are applied with minimal effort against fully resisting opponents, combinations flow instinctively, and the underlying principles of maximum efficiency and minimum effort are second nature. A Godan is qualified to teach and examine others at the highest levels, and their physical expression of the art borders on effortless.
E
⚡ Power
Hey Ya!
Pocoloco's Stand from Steel Ball Run. Manifests as a small, cheerful figure that sits on the user's shoulder and whispers encouragement, reassurance, and strategic advice directly into their ear. It cannot fight directly and offers no combat capability whatsoever. Its sole function is psychological support — bolstering the user's confidence, restoring resolve in desperate situations, and helping them maintain focus when they would otherwise falter. The advice it gives is remarkably accurate and timely, making it an unexpectedly valuable companion in high-pressure moments.
E
⚡ Power
Jan Ken
Goku's signature technique from early Dragon Ball, based on rock-paper-scissors. Rock delivers a powerful straight punch. Scissors strikes with two fingers aimed at the eyes. Paper is an open-palm strike to the face. Simple, unpredictable, and surprisingly effective in the hands of someone fast enough to land any of the three.
E
⚡ Power
Anivoice
Allows the user to command any animal they speak to, bending it to their will. Works on a wide range of creatures and can be used to gather intel, create diversions, or overwhelm enemies with wildlife.
E
⚡ Power
Big Fist
Dramatically enlarges the user's fists, massively amplifying the impact and reach of their punches. Simple but brutally effective at close range.
E
⚡ Power
Hair Control
Grants the user complete control over their own hair, allowing it to be extended, hardened, and manipulated freely. Can be used to grab, restrain, or strike targets at a distance.
E
⚡ Power
Earphone Jack
Allows the user to plug long, flexible earphone jacks from their earlobes into surfaces, transmitting the sound of their own heartbeat as a powerful shockwave that can shatter objects and disorient enemies.
E
📦 Item
Atlatl (+ 10 Javelins)
A masterwork atlatl — a spear-throwing lever that dramatically extends the range and force of a thrown javelin by adding mechanical leverage to the throw. Comes with 10 masterwork javelins, each hand-forged with a steel tip and a perfectly balanced hardwood shaft. Capable of launching a javelin with enough force to punch through light armor at range.
E
📦 Item
Katana
A masterwork katana forged by a top-tier Japanese swordsmith using traditional tamahagane steel. Perfectly balanced, with a razor-sharp edge that holds its sharpness exceptionally well. The blade features a flawless hamon and comes with a custom-fitted lacquered saya.
E
📦 Item
Scimitar
A masterwork scimitar forged from high-carbon steel. A curved single-edged blade optimized for fast, slashing strikes from horseback or on foot. Perfectly weighted toward the tip for maximum cutting momentum, with a grip shaped for fluid one-handed use.
E
📦 Item
Yari
A masterwork yari with a hand-forged double-edged steel blade mounted on a hardwood shaft wrapped in lacquered cord. Perfectly balanced for precise thrusting at range. One of the most refined spear designs ever developed.
E
📦 Item
Labrys
A masterwork labrys — a double-headed axe with two symmetrical hand-forged steel blades mounted on a hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for two-handed use, capable of delivering powerful strikes from either direction without repositioning. An iconic weapon with ancient origins.
E
📦 Item
Halberd
A masterwork halberd combining an axe blade, a steel spike, and a rear hook on a long hardwood shaft. Perfectly balanced for its length, capable of chopping, thrusting, and pulling mounted opponents from their saddles. One of the most versatile polearms ever designed.
E
📦 Item
Claymore
A masterwork two-handed claymore forged from high-carbon steel. A massive, broad double-edged blade designed to be swung with both hands for devastating cleaving power. Despite its size, it is perfectly balanced — quick for its weight in the hands of someone strong enough to wield it.
E
📦 Item
War Pick
A masterwork war pick with a hand-forged steel head featuring a sharp, hardened pick on one side, mounted on a hardwood haft. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use. The pick concentrates force into a needle point capable of punching through plate armor where bladed weapons fail.
E
📦 Item
Short Sword
A masterwork short sword forged from high-carbon steel. Compact, perfectly balanced, and razor-sharp. Designed for speed and precision in close quarters, with a grip shaped for a secure hold in any conditions.
E
📦 Item
Bardiche
A masterwork bardiche with a long, curved single-edged blade attached along much of a tall hardwood pole. Perfectly weighted for powerful two-handed chopping strikes with exceptional reach. One of the most powerful cutting weapons ever fielded.
E
📦 Item
Partisan
A masterwork partisan featuring a broad spearhead with two lateral projections near the base, mounted on a reinforced hardwood pole. Perfectly balanced for thrusting and for catching and redirecting an opponent's weapon. A weapon of both function and prestige.
E
📦 Item
Sling (+ 30 Stones)
A masterwork sling crafted from braided leather, perfectly balanced for accurate throws at range. Comes with 30 smooth, weighted stones selected for consistent flight. In skilled hands, capable of delivering devastating blunt force at distances that far exceed a thrown weapon.
E
📦 Item
Estoc
A masterwork estoc forged from high-carbon steel. A long, rigid, double-edged blade with no cutting edge — designed entirely for thrusting with enough force to punch through gaps in plate armor. Perfectly balanced for precision and reach, deadly against armored opponents.
E
📦 Item
Ranseur
A masterwork ranseur with a central thrusting spike flanked by two curved prongs, mounted on a long hardwood shaft. Perfectly balanced for thrusting and trapping an opponent's blade between the prongs to disarm or control them in combat.
E
📦 Item
Fauchard
A masterwork fauchard with a long curved single-edged blade mounted on a hardwood pole, featuring a back-spike for hooking and thrusting. Perfectly balanced for sweeping cuts, hooks, and thrusts at extended range.
E
📦 Item
Messer
A masterwork Messer forged from high-carbon steel. A long single-edged blade with a knife-style handle, combining the reach of a sword with the chopping power of a heavy blade. Perfectly balanced for one or two-handed use, with a straight crossguard and a grip that allows a wide range of fighting techniques.
E
📦 Item
Saber

E
📦 Item
Dragon Slayer
The massive sword wielded by Guts from Berserk. An enormous slab of iron roughly as tall as a man, too large and heavy to be considered a conventional sword. Despite its crude construction, its sheer size and weight make it capable of cleaving through armor, monsters, and multiple enemies in a single swing. Has absorbed so much demonic blood over the years that it now repels evil and astral beings on contact.
E
📦 Item
Tomahawk
A masterwork tomahawk with a hand-forged steel head and a straight hardwood handle. Perfectly balanced for both one-handed combat and throwing. Lightweight, fast, and highly effective at close range or as a precision thrown weapon.
E
📦 Item
Valkyrie
Housed inside a smooth marble. Break it to release Valkyrie into the world — after which the marble disappears and she remains as a permanent companion. A 4-year-old stock horse of possible Australian origin, ridden by Gyro Zeppeli throughout the Steel Ball Run. Known for her exceptional stamina and durability, she has a plain coat and a distinctive mane tied and cut into a row of four flat-topped buns. She wears a dark hood covering most of her head, with openings for her mouth, eyes, ears, and a strand of hair, with several cloth straps across her neck and bandaging at the cannons. She has a unique quirk of swaying to her left every eight breaths — a habit that can be exploited by a skilled Spin user to generate tremendous rotational force. Willing and cooperative in nearly all situations — only truly resists if pushed into extreme sustained danger or treated with outright cruelty.
E
📦 Item
Cutlass
A masterwork cutlass forged from high-carbon steel. A slightly curved, single-edged blade built for fast, powerful slashing in confined spaces. Perfectly weighted for one-handed use, with a solid D-guard protecting the hand. As effective on land as it is at sea.
E

Voulge
A masterwork voulge with a broad, cleaver-like blade fixed to a long hardwood pole. Perfectly weighted for powerful chopping strikes at extended range. Simple in design but brutally effective against both armored and unarmored targets.
E

Zweihänder
A masterwork Zweihänder forged from high-carbon steel. A massive two-handed sword designed to be wielded by those with extraordinary strength and reach. Perfectly balanced for its size, and capable of sweeping through multiple opponents in a single swing.

PP Candy (x3)
Three pieces of Bulma's infamous invention from Dragon Ball, disguised to look like ordinary sweet mango-flavoured candy balls. Anyone who eats one will suffer severe stomach cramps and diarrhea whenever anyone — not just the distributor — utters the trigger phrase "Pii-Pii." The effect activates instantly upon hearing the phrase regardless of the victim's power level or toughness, and repeats every time the phrase is said for a full month before wearing off. Three candies means three separate targets can be placed under this condition simultaneously. Completely harmless to those who don't eat them, and pure misery for those who do.

📦 Item
Judo Grimoire — Blue Belt
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo blue belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational competence in Judo — proficiency in core throwing techniques such as o-soto-gari, seoi-nage, and uchi-mata, proper breakfall technique in all directions, fundamental groundwork including basic pins, transitions, and early submission attempts, and the body awareness and balance that separates a trained judoka from an untrained one. Meaningfully dangerous in unarmed grappling against anyone without formal training.
F
📦 Item
European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in the European pike and spear tradition — the polearm curriculum of the historical fencing guilds as documented by masters including Fiore dei Liberi, Joachim Meyer, and Paulus Hector Mair. The practitioner understands the three foundational guards — High, Middle, and Low — correct thrusting mechanics, basic bind-and-replace sequences, and the footwork required to maintain and control the weapon's extraordinary reach advantage. Already a serious threat against any untrained opponent at range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Free Scholar grimoire.
E
📦 Item
European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Free Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Free Scholar-level proficiency in the European pike and spear tradition — an advanced grade requiring demonstration of considerable expertise in both technique and historical source material. The practitioner has a thorough command of the Italian and German polearm curricula: all major thrusting sequences, transitions between guards with full footwork, half-staff grips for close-measure work, grappling applications using the shaft, and the application of techniques from Fiore's spear sections and Meyer's staff and halberd teachings. Public Prize Playing against senior opponents has been passed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
D
📦 Item
European Pike & Spear Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery in the European pike and spear tradition — a senior grade requiring mastery across multiple polearm types alongside the spear, including the halberd, quarterstaff, and partisan. The complete Italian and German polearm canon is internalized at a level approaching the historical masters who wrote the manuals. Every thrust, bind, transition, close-measure grapple, and counter is executed with automatic precision, and the weapon's reach advantage is exploited at every opportunity with the tactical intelligence of a seasoned practitioner. In superhuman hands, a two-metre war spear driven by Provost-level mechanics at superhuman speed produces a weapon virtually unanswerable at range.
C
📦 Item
Aikido Grimoire — 8th Dan Hachidan (Shihan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Hachidan proficiency in Aikido — the Shihan rank, awarded by Aikikai World Headquarters to only a handful of the most senior and distinguished practitioners alive at any given time. Fewer than 20 living holders exist worldwide at any moment. Every principle of the art is embodied at its highest level — technique, timing, and the blending of force are executed with an effortlessness that appears almost passive to an observer yet is irresistible in application. The Shihan's understanding of aiki at this level borders on the philosophical as much as the physical. In superhuman hands, Aikido's principles of redirecting force and controlling joints applied at this level of mastery become something that cannot be countered by strength or speed alone.
D
📦 Item
Aikido Grimoire — 5th Dan Godan
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Godan proficiency in Aikido — a senior instructor rank (Shidoin) representing many years of dedicated practice and deep mastery of the complete curriculum. Every technique is executed with the naturalness and precision of long internalization, and the principles of aiki are applied effortlessly against committed attacks from multiple directions. The practitioner is fully qualified to lead their own dojo and transmit the art. In superhuman hands, Aikido's joint-locking and throwing mechanics — designed to control opponents regardless of size — become capable of generating forces that no conventional body can withstand. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 8th Dan grimoire.
E
📦 Item
Aikido Grimoire — 1st Dan Shodan
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Shodan proficiency in Aikido — the first black belt, marking the end of the beginner's journey and the true beginning of study. The complete kyu-level curriculum is deeply internalized: all foundational throws, pins, and joint locks are executed with fluency from both static and moving attacks. The practitioner understands the underlying principle of aiki — meeting force with redirection rather than resistance — and applies it consistently under pressure. A Shodan-level Aikidoka is a genuinely capable martial artist. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Aikido Grimoire — 4th Kyu (Blue Belt)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 4th Kyu proficiency in Aikido — the Blue Belt level, marking the transition from beginner to intermediate study. The practitioner has internalized the foundational ukemi (breakfalls) in all directions, core throws including ikkyo, nikyo, sankyo, and shihonage, basic irimi and tenkan footwork, and the principle of blending with an attacker's force rather than opposing it. The circular redirection of force that defines Aikido is beginning to emerge in technique. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan grimoire.
E
⚡ Power
Breaking (B-Boying)
Complete mastery of breaking — the street dance born in the Bronx in the 1970s at the intersection of hip-hop, funk, and athletic expression. The practitioner commands all four foundational elements: toprock, the standing dance that opens a set with rhythm and attitude; footwork, the rapid floor-based leg patterns using the hands for support; power moves, the acrobatic full-body rotations including windmills, headspins, flares, airflares, and turtles that require exceptional upper body strength and momentum; and freezes, held poses that suspend the body off the ground through core and arm strength alone. Transitions between all elements are seamless and musical, hitting breaks in the beat with precision. At master level the practitioner can improvise complete competitive sets in a cypher, battle opponents with original combinations, and execute advanced power moves including the one-handed airflare. An Olympic sport since the 2024 Paris Games.
F
📦 Item
Sambo Grimoire — Candidate Master of Sports
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Candidate Master of Sports level proficiency in Sambo — the Russian combat and sport grappling system developed from Judo, wrestling, and indigenous Soviet martial arts. The practitioner has a solid command of Sambo's distinctive throwing curriculum, leg locks that are banned in most other grappling arts, and the aggressive ground-and-pound transitions that bridge Sambo's combat and sport applications. Competition-ready and meaningfully dangerous against any untrained or lesser-trained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master of Sports grimoire.
E
📦 Item
Sambo Grimoire — Master of Sports
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master of Sports level proficiency in Sambo — a nationally recognized title awarded to competitors who meet strict performance standards at major competitions. The complete throwing, takedown, and submission curriculum is deeply internalized and proven under live competitive conditions. Leg locks, heel hooks, and the brutal combat Sambo striking-to-grappling transitions are all executed with dangerous proficiency. A Master of Sports Sambo practitioner is a serious and complete grappler by any standard. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master of Sports International grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Sambo Grimoire — Master of Sports International
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master of Sports International level mastery in Sambo — the highest competitive title, reserved for athletes who have placed at the top of international championship competition. Every throwing technique, takedown, and submission in the Sambo system is executed with the automaticity and tactical intelligence of an elite international competitor. The practitioner's ability to close distance, execute throws against fully resisting opponents, and transition immediately to devastating leg locks or ground control is at the absolute peak of the sport. In superhuman hands, Sambo's combination of explosive throws and immediate submission transitions becomes virtually impossible to survive on the ground.
D
📦 Item
Muay Thai Grimoire — Kru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kru rank in Muay Thai — a certified instructor and master practitioner who has reached the highest level of the art's technical and competitive development. Every technique across all eight limbs is executed with the precision, power, and timing of a career professional. The clinch, which distinguishes elite Muay Thai from all other striking arts, is at a level where the practitioner can control, sweep, and devastate any opponent who enters close range. In superhuman hands, Muay Thai's eight-limb arsenal driven by superhuman power and speed — particularly the shin kick and flying knee — becomes capable of ending any confrontation with a single strike.
E
📦 Item
Muay Thai Grimoire — Nak Muay Khao
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Nak Muay Khao level mastery — the designation for a skilled competitive Muay Thai fighter with a complete arsenal across all eight limbs. The clinch game, elbow work, and knee strikes that elevate Muay Thai above other striking arts are fully developed and pressure-tested through competitive bouts. The practitioner reads and controls range, sweeps opponents off balance, and lands devastating combinations from the clinch with the instincts of a seasoned fighter. At this level the practitioner is among the most dangerous stand-up fighters in any context. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Kru grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Muay Thai Grimoire — Nak Muay
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Nak Muay level proficiency in Muay Thai — the Thai art of eight limbs. The practitioner has internalized foundational technique across all eight weapons: jabs, crosses, elbows, knees, teeps, roundhouse kicks, and clinch entries. Basic pad work, bag work, and sparring fundamentals are solid. The devastating roundhouse kick — driven by hip rotation and the shin rather than the foot — is already meaningfully developed at this level. A Nak Muay is a genuinely dangerous striker against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Nak Muay Khao grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Kickboxing Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient master-level command of kickboxing — the complete technical arsenal of punches, kicks, combinations, counters, feints, and defensive movement executed with the automaticity and fight IQ of a career professional. Every technique is sharp, fast, and correctly structured, and the practitioner's ability to read opponents, control range, and string combinations is at an elite level. In superhuman hands, the speed and power of kickboxing technique driven by superhuman output makes every strike a potential finisher.
E
📦 Item
Kickboxing Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level proficiency in kickboxing. The complete striking curriculum — punches, kicks, combinations, counters, and defensive movement — is deeply internalized and pressure-tested through competitive sparring. The practitioner reads and reacts to opponents at speed, chains combinations fluidly, and fights with the timing and rhythm of an experienced competitive fighter. At this level the practitioner can hold their own against and defeat most opponents they encounter in a stand-up exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Kickboxing Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level proficiency in kickboxing — the striking art combining boxing punches with kicks above the waist. The practitioner has solid command of the jab-cross-hook-uppercut combination framework, mid and high roundhouse kicks, front kicks, and the footwork and defensive head movement that separates a trained kickboxer from an untrained one. Sparring instincts are sharpened and the practitioner is genuinely dangerous in any stand-up striking exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
D
📦 Item
MMA Grimoire — Elite Champion
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of an elite championship-level MMA fighter — a top-10 ranked competitor in a major promotion, with the complete technical arsenal, fight IQ, and physical conditioning of someone who can compete for a world title. Every range — striking, clinch, takedown, scramble, and ground — is developed to an elite level, and transitions between them are seamless and instinctive. The practitioner reads opponents' patterns in real time, adapts their game plan mid-fight, and applies finishing techniques with the precision of a career professional. In superhuman hands, the complete striking and grappling integration of championship MMA becomes something no conventional fighting art can fully prepare for.
E
📦 Item
MMA Grimoire — Professional Fighter
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of a professional MMA fighter — someone who trains full-time across all combat domains and earns their living competing under unified rules. Striking, clinch work, takedowns, scrambles, ground control, and submissions are all integrated at a high level and pressure-tested through years of live sparring and competitive bouts. The practitioner understands how to impose their game plan, neutralize an opponent's strengths, and exploit openings across all ranges simultaneously. A professional MMA fighter is one of the most comprehensively dangerous unarmed fighters on the planet at any given weight class. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Elite Champion grimoire.
F
📦 Item
MMA Grimoire — Amateur Competitor
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skill level of a competitive amateur MMA fighter — someone who has trained seriously across striking, wrestling, and ground fighting, and competed under full rules against other trained opponents. The practitioner has functional boxing and kickboxing for stand-up, basic takedown offense and defense from wrestling, and foundational ground control and submission awareness from BJJ. Cross-training across all three ranges is coherent enough to apply in live sparring against resisting opponents. Well beyond any untrained individual or single-discipline hobbyist in a real confrontation. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Professional grimoire.
C
⚡ Power
Dodonpa
The signature technique of the Crane School, created as a direct rival to the Turtle School's Kamehameha. The user concentrates ki into a single fingertip and fires a thin, superheated beam with extraordinary piercing force — designed specifically as an assassin's technique. Unlike the Kamehameha which blasts an opponent away with brute force, the Dodonpa is concentrated on piercing through a specific point on the body, capable of punching through vital organs. Requires minimal charging time compared to the Kamehameha, making it exceptionally dangerous at close range. According to Master Roshi, a standard Kamehameha is inferior to it in raw power. At full charge the output increases dramatically, creating a much larger explosion on impact. Can be deflected by a sufficiently stronger opponent, but against anyone near or below the user's power level it is a precise, fast, and lethal finishing technique.
D
⚡ Power
Bankoku Bikkuri Sho
Master Roshi's signature electric technique, considered so lethal that he reserves it as a last resort. The user charges their hands together, converting their ki entirely into electricity, then thrusts both palms forward to fire an unavoidable electric beam at the target. If it connects, the opponent is engulfed in an electric field that delivers 20,000 volts throughout their entire body, lifting them off the ground and holding them completely immobilized until the technique is released. Capable of shocking, incapacitating, or killing a superhuman opponent depending on the output. Two significant limitations: the user cannot move while sustaining the electric field, and the charge-up time before firing leaves a brief window of vulnerability. Before being used against Goku at the 21st World Tournament, Roshi had only ever needed to use it once — against Grandpa Gohan.
C
⚡ Power
Yoiko Minmin Ken
Master Roshi's signature hypnosis technique, used under his Jackie Chun alias at the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user performs a series of unusual, rhythmic hand movements to draw the target's attention, then delivers a piercing gaze accompanied by a soft, sweet lullaby-like vocal tone that bypasses conscious resistance and induces immediate sleep. The technique is effective regardless of the target's power level — it works on any opponent who can see and hear it being performed. It can be countered by a sufficiently strong external stimulus snapping the target out of sleep before the countdown completes, or by an opponent who proactively shocks themselves awake to fight through the effect. Used against Goku at the tournament and successfully on Ganos during the Tournament of Power.
D
📦 Item
Eskrima Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 5th Dan Black Belt mastery in Eskrima/Arnis — a senior rank representing many years of dedicated practice and deep, broad mastery across all weapon categories. Every technique — single stick, double stick, knife, espada y daga, staff, and empty hand — is executed with fluid automaticity and tactical intelligence. The flowing, continuous attack-and-defense that defines Eskrima at its highest levels is fully internalized. The practitioner reads and responds to armed opponents with the instincts of a career fighting artist. In superhuman hands, Eskrima's principles of continuous striking and simultaneous attack-defense become nearly impossible to interrupt.
E
📦 Item
Eskrima Grimoire — 1st Dan Black Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 1st Dan Black Belt proficiency in Eskrima/Arnis — the entry point of black belt mastery in the Filipino fighting arts. The complete foundational curriculum is deeply internalized: all twelve strike angles, basic and intermediate disarms, espada y daga (sword and dagger) combinations, empty hand applications derived from weapon techniques, and sparring proficiency with full protective equipment. A 1st Dan Eskrimador is a genuinely dangerous fighter with a stick, blade, or empty hands. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Eskrima Grimoire — Blue Belt
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Blue Belt proficiency in Eskrima/Arnis — the Filipino national martial art. The practitioner has internalized the foundational twelve strike angles that form the backbone of the system, basic defenses, disarming concepts, and the stick and knife techniques that distinguish Eskrima from most other martial arts. Training begins with weapons rather than empty hands — the Filipino principle that armed technique naturally develops unarmed ability. At Blue Belt level, single stick, double stick, and knife fundamentals are all meaningfully developed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Silat Grimoire — Mahaguru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mahaguru rank in Silat — the grandmaster level, representing the absolute pinnacle of the art. Every technique of the style — striking, sweeping, locking, grappling, and weapons — is executed with effortless automaticity and devastating efficiency. The Mahaguru's understanding of Silat's biomechanics, deceptive entries, and the art's characteristic ability to flow seamlessly between ranges makes them one of the most difficult practitioners to engage at close quarters. In superhuman hands, Silat's close-range destruction principles applied at grandmaster level become something few opponents could survive.
E
📦 Item
Silat Grimoire — Guru
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Guru rank in Silat — a full master level, representing deep mastery of the complete art. All jurus, applications, weapon techniques, and the deceptive, low-to-the-ground combat principles that define Silat are fully internalized. The Guru fights with the flowing, unpredictable transitions between striking, sweeping, and grappling that make Silat extraordinarily difficult to read. Weapon work — particularly with the kerambit at close range — is executed with lethal precision. A Guru is fully qualified to open their own school and transmit the art. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mahaguru grimoire
F
📦 Item
Silat Grimoire — Cikgu
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Cikgu rank in Silat — an instructor level representing solid foundational mastery of the art. The practitioner has internalized the core jurus (forms), fundamental footwork patterns, and the basic application of Silat's characteristic low stances, sweeps, and strikes. The weapon curriculum — kerambit, parang, and others — has been introduced and foundational techniques are practiced with competence. A Cikgu-level Silat practitioner is qualified to teach basics under senior supervision. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Guru grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master-level command of the American Bowie knife fighting tradition — the level of the frontier knife duelists who built the reputation of the Bowie as the most feared close-quarters weapon on the American frontier. Every technique is executed with complete automaticity, the practitioner reads and exploits openings with the speed and decisiveness of a career fighter, and the Bowie's weight and cutting geometry are used to maximum efficiency at every range. In superhuman hands, the Bowie's combination of reach, mass, and master-level technique makes it a weapon of extraordinary lethality.
E
📦 Item
Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Experienced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Experienced-level proficiency in the American Bowie knife fighting tradition. The practitioner has thorough command of the complete system — all major cuts, thrusts, parries, traps, and the aggressive forward pressure that characterizes the frontier style at its most effective. Timing, distance, and the reading of an opponent's intent with a blade are well developed. A practitioner at this level has the skill and instinct to win against most knife fighters they encounter. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.

📦 Item
Bowie Knife Fighting Grimoire — Journeyman
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Journeyman-level proficiency in the American Bowie knife fighting tradition — the frontier dueling system built around the large clip-point fighting knife. The practitioner understands the basic guards, parries, and cuts of the tradition, can use the heavy blade to deflect an opponent's knife while immediately retaliating, and has internalized the footwork and timing of this aggressive, forward-driving style. Meaningfully dangerous with the Bowie knife against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Experienced grimoire.

A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Every technique is executed with automatic precision at speeds approaching the limits of human reaction time. The practitioner understands the complete corpus of Italian dagger theory and can generate lethal thrusting force with minimal telegraphing. In superhuman hands, the stiletto at Maestro level becomes a weapon capable of ending any confrontation in a fraction of a second at close range.

📦 Item
Italian Stiletto Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery of Italian stiletto fencing — a level requiring many years of training and public proving against experienced opponents. All major techniques of the tradition are deeply internalized, thrusting speed and precision are exceptional, and the practitioner's ability to control measure and timing at blade-close range is expert. A Provost-level stiletto fencer is one of the most dangerous opponents imaginable in the confined spaces where the dagger excels. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
