Italian Stiletto Grimoire — Scholare
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholare-level proficiency in the Italian stiletto fencing tradition — the piercing dagger art of the Renaissance schools. The practitioner understands the fundamental thrusting mechanics, basic guards and parries, and the principle of controlling an opponent's blade while seeking an opening for a lethal thrust. The stiletto's unique geometry — designed to punch through clothing and between ribs — is understood and exploited correctly. A practitioner at this level is already genuinely dangerous at very close range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Navaja Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Master-level command of the Spanish Navaja fighting tradition — the level of the professional Navajero whose skill with the folding blade was legendary in Spanish and Latin American fighting culture. Every technique is executed with effortless automaticity, the practitioner's control of distance and timing is prescient, and the Navaja's curved blade is used with devastating efficiency at all ranges from long slashing to close thrusting work. In superhuman hands, Navaja technique at master level applied with superhuman speed produces a blade fighter of extraordinary lethality.
E
📦 Item
Navaja Grimoire — Practiced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient a Practiced level of mastery in the Spanish Navaja tradition. The complete cutting and thrusting curriculum of the style is deeply internalized, footwork is fluid and instinctive, and the practitioner reads and exploits openings with the speed and decisiveness of an experienced blade fighter. The Navaja's combination of reach, curved cutting geometry, and the tradition's aggressive rhythm of continuous attack are all exploited at their most effective. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Navaja Grimoire — Apprentice
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Apprentice-level proficiency in the Spanish Navaja fighting tradition — the blade art built around the large folding knife that dominated Spanish street and dueling culture for centuries. The practitioner understands the fundamental cuts, guards, and the characteristic footwork of the style, and has internalized the basic combination attacks that define Navaja fighting's aggressive rhythm. The weapon's considerable reach for a folding knife and its razor-sharp curved blade are exploited correctly at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Practiced grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 5
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 5 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — the highest military-grade level of the system, equivalent to the training of elite Russian special forces operators. Every technique is executed with the effortless, economical precision that Systema's founders described as using 25% physical force and 75% natural flow. The practitioner can engage multiple armed opponents simultaneously, disarm under extreme conditions, and apply knife technique with a directness and adaptability that conventional martial arts cannot easily prepare for. In superhuman hands, Systema's principle of total relaxation combined with explosive, precise striking produces knife work of devastating efficiency.
E
📦 Item
Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 3
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 3 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — an advanced level covering the full knife and counter-knife curriculum. All attack, defense, and disarm sequences are executed with the fluid, deceptive continuity that defines Systema at higher levels. The practitioner can operate effectively against single and multiple armed opponents, maintains psychological composure under extreme duress, and applies knife technique with the efficiency and directness of special forces training. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Level 5 grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Systema Knife Grimoire — Level 1
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Level 1 certification in Russian Systema knife fighting — the foundational level of the military system used by Russian special forces. The practitioner has internalized the core principles of Systema knife work: natural, tension-free movement; simultaneous defense and attack; and the use of breathing to maintain calm under extreme pressure. Basic knife attacks, defenses, and disarms against both armed and unarmed opponents are fully functional. A Level 1 Systema knife practitioner is already a credible threat with a blade. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Level 3 grimoire.
E
📦 Item
NR-40 Combat Knife
A masterwork Russian NR-40 combat knife forged from high-carbon steel. The standard fighting knife of Soviet and Russian special forces, with a single-edged blade featuring a false edge on the spine, a simple steel guard, and a textured wooden grip. Designed for both thrusting and cutting in close-quarters combat with a simple, no-nonsense profile that prioritizes function over form. Perfectly balanced and built to last under harsh conditions.
E
📦 Item
Navaja
A masterwork Spanish navaja — a large folding knife with a locking blade, forged from high-carbon steel. The blade is long, slender, and slightly curved, razor-sharp along its full length. The navaja was the weapon of the Spanish working class and a mainstay of street and dueling culture for centuries, developing an entire fighting tradition around its reach and cutting ability. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use and folds flat for concealment.
E
📦 Item
Stiletto
A masterwork Italian stiletto forged from high-carbon steel. A long, slender, needle-pointed blade with no cutting edge — designed purely for thrusting with the force to punch through gaps in clothing, light armor, and between ribs. Perfectly balanced for rapid repeated thrusting at very close range. The weapon of the Italian schools of dagger fencing and a favorite of professional duelers for centuries.
E
📦 Item
Bowie Knife
A masterwork Bowie knife forged from high-carbon steel. A large single-edged fighting knife with a clip point, a brass guard, and a stacked leather grip. The clip point allows for fine thrusting work while the heavy blade delivers powerful cuts. Originally designed by Jim Bowie as a dueling weapon capable of blocking an opponent's blade and immediately retaliating. Perfectly balanced for one-handed use in close quarters.
E
📦 Item
Kerambit
A masterwork kerambit forged from high-carbon steel. A small curved blade modeled after a tiger's claw, worn with the finger ring over the index finger for a secure grip that cannot be disarmed. The curved geometry concentrates cutting force into a hooking draw cut that tears rather than slices, devastating against flesh and tendons. Compact, concealable, and extraordinarily dangerous at grappling range.
E
📦 Item
Pinuti
A masterwork Filipino Pinuti, the signature single-edged blade of Eskrima and Arnis. A short to medium-length sword-knife with a wide fuller along the spine and a distinctive flared tip optimized for slashing. Perfectly weighted for rapid figure-eight cutting motions and close-quarters strikes. Sharp along the full length of its curved edge and capable of both deep cuts and thrusting
D
📦 Item
Goku's Full Outfit (First Turtle Gi)
The first Turtle Hermit uniform gifted to Son Goku by Master Roshi upon completing his training at Kame House, worn for the first time at the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. An orange martial arts gi with the Kame kanji (亀) — meaning "turtle" — printed on both the front chest and back, representing Goku's student status under Master Roshi and the Turtle School's philosophy of pushing oneself beyond all limits. Paired with a black belt, blue wristbands, and blue toe shoes with white socks. The outfit Goku wore through some of his most iconic early battles. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
C
📦 Item
Sojutsu Grimoire — Menkyo Kaiden
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo Kaiden of a koryu sojutsu school — the license of total transmission of Japanese spear art, representing complete mastery of everything the school contains. As rare as its kenjutsu equivalent; only a handful of practitioners per school have ever received it in recorded history. Every technique, oral transmission, and secret teaching of the school is fully internalized at the level of the founding masters. In superhuman hands, the reach and penetrating force of the yari driven by centuries-refined battlefield technique becomes something virtually unanswerable at range.
D
📦 Item
Sojutsu Grimoire — Menkyo
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo of a koryu sojutsu school — a formal teaching license representing many years of dedicated practice and deep mastery of the school's complete spear curriculum. Every technique is internalized at a level that allows transmission to others, and the practitioner's command of distance, timing, and the weapon's balance is expert. The yari's extraordinary reach combined with master-level technique makes this a devastating combination in any combat context. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo Kaiden grimoire.
E
📦 Item
Sojutsu Grimoire — Mokuroku
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mokuroku of a koryu sojutsu school — a scroll cataloguing the complete curriculum of techniques the practitioner has mastered. The full set of the school's spear kata is deeply internalized, including techniques against multiple weapon types. Distance management, thrusting precision, and the ability to apply techniques against fully resisting opponents are all well developed. A Mokuroku-level sojutsu practitioner is a formidable fighter with the yari. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Sojutsu Grimoire — Kirigami
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kirigami of a koryu sojutsu school — the first formal certificate of spear training. The practitioner has been accepted into the school's transmission and has internalized foundational spear kata, correct grip and footwork, and the basic principles of reach, timing, and thrusting mechanics with the yari. The spear's extraordinary reach advantage over shorter weapons is already meaningfully developed at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mokuroku grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 5th Dan (Godan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 5th Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — the highest dan grade in the modern federation system, above which only the shogo teaching titles of Renshi, Kyoshi, and Hanshi exist. Every technique in the curriculum is executed with precision and naturalness, forms are performed with the depth of long internalization, and the practitioner's command of the weapon's extraordinary reach and cutting geometry is at an expert level. The naginata's combination of a long cutting blade and extended reach, wielded at this level of mastery, is exceptionally difficult to counter with any shorter weapon.
E
📦 Item
Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 3rd Dan (Sandan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 3rd Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — a meaningfully advanced rank requiring several years of dedicated practice past black belt. The complete shikake-oji curriculum, advanced forms, and bogu sparring are all executed at a high level. Combinations, transitions, and reading an opponent's distance and timing are well developed. A Sandan-level naginata practitioner is a serious and dangerous fighter with the weapon. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Naginatajutsu Grimoire — 1st Dan (Shodan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient 1st Dan proficiency in naginatajutsu — the entry point of black belt mastery in the art. All foundational kihon, the basic shikake-oji partner practice sequences, and the initial bogu sparring curriculum are fully internalized. The practitioner fights with the sweeping, long-range cutting and thrusting that characterizes the naginata, and has proven themselves at examination level against qualified opponents. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 3rd Dan grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Qiang Grimoire — Si-Gung (Master's Master)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Si-Gung level of Chinese spear — a master whose students have themselves become instructors, representing the highest tier of practical mastery in the traditional lineage. Every technique, form, and combat principle of the style's spear system is fully internalized at the level of the founding generation. The nine-year mastery curve that gives the weapon its traditional name has been fully traversed and exceeded. In superhuman hands, the penetrating force of a two-meter war spear wielded with the whipping power generation of a Si-Gung produces thrusting strikes of extraordinary velocity and force, far beyond what the weapon's size would suggest.
E
📦 Item
Qiang Grimoire — Sifu (Instructor)
— A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Sifu level of Chinese spear — an instructor-grade within the traditional Chinese lineage system, representing deep and broad mastery of the complete spear curriculum. The practitioner has internalized all major forms, understands the underlying combat principles of the style's spear work, and is qualified to teach others. The whipping, coiling, and thrusting power generation characteristic of Chinese spear at the highest levels — transmitting force in a wavelike motion from the spine through the full length of the weapon — is fully developed. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Si-Gung grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Qiang Grimoire — Si-Hing (Senior Student)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Si-Hing level of Chinese spear — the senior student grade within a traditional Chinese martial arts lineage. Known in China as the "Nine Year Spear" for the time required just to develop a feel for the weapon, the Si-Hing practitioner has completed the foundational curriculum: core thrusting sequences, the circular deflecting motions characteristic of the style, footwork patterns, and the initial forms. The distinctive leaf-shaped blade and red horsehair tassel are understood and used correctly. The practitioner is already meaningfully dangerous with the weapon. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Sifu grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Assegai Grimoire — Induna (Warrior Commander)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills and tactical awareness of an Induna — a Zulu warrior commander, appointed directly by the king for demonstrating exceptional individual fighting ability, leadership, and battlefield intelligence. Every technique of Shaka's reformed close combat system is executed with complete automaticity and devastating efficiency. The Induna fights with the weapon at the absolute peak of the tradition — the iklwa and shield combination at this level mirrors the Roman legionary's gladius and scutum in its systematic lethality, delivering fast, decisive thrusts with the shield controlling the opponent's ability to respond. In superhuman hands, the explosive aggression and penetrating force of iklwa technique at this level becomes almost impossible to survive at close range.
E
📦 Item
Assegai Grimoire — Izikhulu (Veteran Warrior)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills of a senior Zulu Izikhulu veteran — a battle-hardened warrior who has served in the chest of the buffalo formation and fought in multiple campaigns. Iklwa technique is refined through live combat experience, shield work is instinctive, and the practitioner reads the rhythms of close-quarters battle with the awareness of a soldier who has survived many of them. Combination attacks, counter-thrusts, and the explosive short-range burst that defines Zulu close combat are all executed with dangerous proficiency. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Induna grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Assegai Grimoire — Ibutho (Junior Warrior)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the skills of a junior Zulu Ibutho warrior — a member of a fighting age regiment who has completed Shaka's foundational combat training. The practitioner has internalized the iklwa's short stabbing mechanics, the shield-and-spear combination technique pioneered by Shaka, the art of hooking an opponent's shield to force it aside before thrusting, and the basic movements of the impondo zankomo buffalo formation. Fleet-footed, aggressive, and effective in close-quarters exchanges against any untrained opponent. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Izikhulu grimoire.
C
📦 Item
Kenjutsu Grimoire — Menkyo Kaiden
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo Kaiden — the license of total transmission, representing complete mastery of everything a koryu school contains. So rare that many headmasters award only a single Menkyo Kaiden in their entire lifetime; in recorded history, only a handful of practitioners per school have ever received it. Every technique, principle, oral transmission, and secret teaching of the school is fully internalized at a level indistinguishable from the founding masters. The practitioner carries the entire school within them and is qualified to transmit it in full. In superhuman hands, centuries of battlefield-refined sword principles executed with total mastery become something beyond description.
D
📦 Item
Kenjutsu Grimoire — Menkyo
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Menkyo — a formal teaching license within a koryu school, representing a level of mastery requiring many years of dedicated practice. Every technique in the school's curriculum is internalized to a high degree, and the practitioner understands the art deeply enough to transmit it to others under a senior instructor's oversight. Combat instincts, sensitivity to the opponent's blade, and the ability to apply technique against fully resisting opponents are all at an expert level. In superhuman hands, the battlefield-refined techniques of a koryu school become lethally efficient beyond any conventional measure. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo Kaiden grimoire.
E
📦 Item
Kenjutsu Grimoire — Mokuroku
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Mokuroku — a scroll cataloguing the full curriculum of techniques the practitioner has mastered within the school. At this level the practitioner has a thorough command of the school's complete kata set, understands the combat principles underlying each technique, and executes them with the precision and naturalness of long internalization. Timing, distance, and reading an opponent's subtle intent are well developed. A Mokuroku holder is a serious and dangerous swordsman. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Menkyo grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Kenjutsu Grimoire — Kirigami
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the Kirigami — the first formal certificate of a koryu sword school, written on folded paper and bearing the seal of the headmaster. The practitioner has been formally accepted into the school's transmission and has internalized its foundational kata, basic footwork, maai (distancing), and the correct mechanics of cutting and thrusting with the Japanese sword. Well beyond an untrained individual in any exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Mokuroku grimoire.
D
📦 Item
European Longsword Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery in the European longsword tradition — a senior grade requiring mastery across multiple weapon systems alongside the longsword, including sword and dagger, unarmed combat, and polearms. The practitioner has an encyclopedic command of the historical sources, has publicly proved themselves through extended Prize Playing bouts against numerous senior opponents, and is qualified to teach independently. Every major technique of the German and Italian schools is internalized at a level approaching that of the historical masters who wrote the manuals. In the hands of someone with superhuman physical output the cutting and thrusting mechanics of this tradition become devastating beyond any conventional measure.
E
📦 Item
European Longsword Grimoire — Free Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Free Scholar-level proficiency in the European longsword tradition — an advanced grade requiring demonstration of considerable expertise in both technique and historical source material. The practitioner has a thorough command of the Ringeck and Danzig glosses, executes complex techniques from the masters' manuals with precision, and has proven themselves in competitive free-play against senior opponents through the trial of Prize Playing. At this level the practitioner can assist in teaching and has been publicly tested in open sparring against multiple senior opponents. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
F
📦 Item
European Longsword Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in the European longsword tradition — the foundational grade of the historical fencing guilds. The practitioner understands the core principles of the Liechtenauer tradition: the four guards, the five master cuts, the before and after, and the concept of Fühlen (feeling the blade). Basic thrusts, cuts, and guards are executed with structural correctness. Well beyond an untrained individual in any sword exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Free Scholar grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Rapier Grimoire — Maestro
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the rank of Maestro di Scherma — the highest grade in the historical and classical rapier tradition, requiring mastery across multiple weapons and a profound understanding of the art's theoretical foundations. The practitioner has internalized the complete corpus of Italian fencing theory, executes all techniques with effortless precision, and is qualified to maintain their own school and certify others. Point control, sentiment du fer, and the reading of an opponent's intent are at a level that borders on prescient. Physical strength multiplies the penetrating force of every thrust dramatically — in superhuman hands, the rapier becomes a weapon of surgical lethality.
E
📦 Item
Rapier Grimoire — Provost
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Provost-level mastery of historical rapier fencing — the lesser teaching grade, requiring many years of training and public Prize Playing against multiple senior opponents. The practitioner has thorough command of the Italian and Spanish systems, executes all major techniques from the historical masters' treatises with precision, and reads and responds to an opponent's blade with the sensitivity characteristic of a trained fencer. Qualified to teach under the oversight of a Master at Arms. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Rapier Grimoire — Scholar
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient Scholar-level proficiency in historical rapier fencing — the entry grade of the Schools of Defence, covering the Italian and Spanish traditions of Fabris, Capoferro, and Destreza. The practitioner understands the fundamental guards, lines, and measure, executes basic thrusts and parries with correct structure, and has begun developing the sensitivity and point control that defines this art. A Scholar-level rapier practitioner is already meaningfully dangerous in any close-quarters exchange. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Provost grimoire.
D
📦 Item
Sabre Grimoire — Maestro
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient the rank of Maestro — the highest grade in classical sabre fencing, requiring mastery of the complete system across all weapon categories and the ability to certify others. The practitioner commands every cut, thrust, and counter in the tradition with complete automaticity, fights with the economy of motion and tactical intelligence of a seasoned duelist, and understands the biomechanics of the weapon at a level that allows them to extract maximum efficiency from every exchange. In superhuman hands, the sabre's combination of speed and devastating cutting force becomes almost impossible to defend against.
E
📦 Item
Sabre Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level proficiency in military sabre fencing. The practitioner has a thorough command of the full cutting and thrusting curriculum, executes compound actions, feints, and counter-attacks with precision, and has developed the explosive speed and decisive commitment that defines sabre at the highest competitive and military levels. Capable of holding their own against and defeating most practitioners they encounter. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Maestro grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Sabre Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level proficiency in military sabre fencing — the tradition of the cavalry sword as systematized by masters like Roworth, Angelo, and the Hungarian school. The practitioner has sound command of the basic cuts, parries, and guards, understands the principles of tempo and distance, and executes technique with proper mechanics. Meaningfully dangerous against any untrained opponent at close range. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.
D

Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Master
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient master-level command of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing — the highest attainment in the tradition, representing complete mastery of the system as documented by the historical masters and refined through generations of military and civilian use. Every technique is executed with total precision and automatic instinct, the guard system is impenetrable at this level of mastery, and the cutting mechanics deliver force with devastating efficiency. In superhuman hands the basket-hilted broadsword, swung with master-level mechanics, becomes a weapon of extraordinary destructive capability.

Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level mastery of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing. The practitioner has a thorough command of the complete cutting and thrusting system, executes compound actions and counter-cuts with decisive speed, and fights with the relentless forward pressure and controlled aggression that defines the Highland style at its most effective. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Scottish Broadsword Grimoire — Intermediate
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient intermediate-level mastery of Scottish Highland broadsword fencing — the basket-hilted sword tradition systematized by Donald McBane, Henry Angelo, and the Highland military schools. The practitioner understands the fundamental cuts, guards, and parries of the system, executes technique with correct Highland mechanics, and has begun developing the aggressive, forward-driving style characteristic of the tradition. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.

Every technique flows with effortless precision, power generation is maximized through perfect mechanics, and the practitioner can adapt the art's principles to any combat situation. In superhuman hands the Dao's slashing power, amplified by correct Chinese biomechanical principles, delivers force that can cleave through obstacles far beyond what the weapon's size would suggest.
E

Dao Grimoire — Advanced
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient advanced-level mastery of Chinese Dao swordsmanship. The practitioner has a complete command of the style's forms and applications, understands the combat principles of continuous flowing attack and defence, and executes techniques with speed and power. The Dao's slashing capability and the leverage generated by its curved geometry are fully exploited at this level. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Master grimoire.

Dao Grimoire — Intermediate

The practitioner has internalized core forms, understands the principles of circular power generation and the flowing transitions characteristic of the style, and executes basic cuts, deflections, and footwork patterns with structural correctness. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the Advanced grimoire.

📦 Item
Taekwondo Grimoire — 5th Dan Black Belt (O Dan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the 5th Dan level — a senior master rank qualifying the practitioner as a head instructor. Decades of expertise are transferred instantly: all techniques from foundational through advanced are executed with effortless precision, kicks are devastatingly fast and controlled, and the practitioner possesses deep understanding of the art's biomechanics, pressure points, and combat applications. Physical strength multiplies the effectiveness of every technique dramatically — in the hands of a superhuman practitioner, Taekwondo at this level becomes something else entirely.
E
📦 Item
Taekwondo Grimoire — 1st Dan Black Belt (Il Dan)
A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the 1st Dan level — the entry point of black belt mastery. All color belt techniques are fully internalized alongside advanced poomsae and sparring instincts honed to expert level. The practitioner can perform board and brick breaking with precision, reads opponents' movements rapidly, and fights with the efficiency and economy of motion characteristic of a trained black belt. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 5th Dan Black Belt grimoire.
F
📦 Item
Taekwondo Grimoire — Blue Belt (4th Geup)
— A grimoire that burns away the moment its knowledge transfers, leaving nothing but ash. Grants the recipient complete mastery of Taekwondo at the Blue Belt level — the final stage of the intermediate program. The practitioner has full command of foundational and intermediate kicks, strikes, and stances, including the Spin Hook Kick, and has internalized multiple poomsae forms. Sparring instincts are sharpened and reactions are considerably faster than an untrained individual. Obtaining this grimoire a second time automatically upgrades it to the 1st Dan Black Belt grimoire.
E
⚡ Power
Saruken (Crazy Monkey Technique)
A wild improvised fighting style created by young Goku during his match against Jackie Chun at the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament as a direct counter to the Sui-Ken drunken fist style. The user mimics the erratic, frenzied movements of a monkey — scurrying, scratching, leaping, and attacking from unpredictable angles with no discernible pattern. The style is deliberately chaotic and unreadable, making it nearly impossible to predict or counter with a conventional fighting approach. Goku used his tail to trip Jackie Chun and scratched at his face — attacks no trained martial artist would expect from an opponent in a formal tournament setting. The technique works precisely because it abandons all structure, making it uniquely effective against opponents who rely on reading and responding to conventional technique.
E
⚡ Power
Sui-Ken (Drunken Fist)
A martial arts style mastered by Master Roshi and used during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament under his Jackie Chun alias. The user mimics the swaying, stumbling movements of a drunk person — creating a combat style that is almost entirely unreadable. The irregular rhythm, unpredictable footwork, and unconventional attack angles make it nearly impossible for an opponent to anticipate the next strike, as the body appears to be off-balance at all times while actually being in complete control. The style incorporates striking, grappling, joint locks, dodging, feinting, and aerial techniques all woven through the same deceptive movement pattern. Roshi himself stated he chose this technique against Goku precisely because Goku had never experienced intoxication and therefore had no reference point to counter it — a strategy that briefly even stumped one of the most naturally gifted fighters in the world.
E
⚡ Power
Tornado!
A rapid spinning rush technique used by young Goku during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user tucks into a tight spinning motion and launches themselves at the opponent at high speed, delivering a flurry of rotating strikes as they close the distance. The spin makes it difficult to read the exact angle and timing of the incoming attack, and the rotational momentum adds force to each hit. Simple in concept but effective as a close-range approach tool — particularly useful for breaking through an opponent's guard or closing distance too quickly for them to react.
D
⚡ Power
Tenku Pekeji Ken
A powerful aerial strike technique used by Nam during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user leaps high into the air above the opponent, then descends at tremendous speed with both arms raised overhead, driving a crushing double-handed overhead blow down onto the top of the opponent's head with the full force of the fall behind it. The technique combines the user's raw strength with gravitational momentum, concentrating enormous force into a single devastating point of impact. A direct hit is powerful enough to knock out opponents of considerable physical capability for extended periods — Nam's successful use of it rendered Goku unconscious, an opponent whose physical durability at that stage of training already far exceeded normal human limits. Requires sufficient airspace to execute and telegraphs clearly during the ascent phase.
D
⚡ Power
Afterimage Technique
A speed-based technique mastered by Master Roshi, one of the foundational skills of the Turtle School. The user moves at such extreme speed that a visual copy of their body is left behind at the original position — opponents attack the afterimage while the user has already moved elsewhere. The basic form leaves a single afterimage, creating a simple but effective feint. The advanced form, the Afterimage Strike, has the user spinning rapidly around the opponent while leaving multiple simultaneous afterimages in all directions — making it virtually impossible to identify the real body among the copies. The technique requires no ki expenditure beyond the raw speed needed to execute it, making it available at any time as long as the user can move fast enough to trigger it.
D
📦 Item
Guruguru Gum
A magical technique used by Giran, a member of the Monster Race who competed in the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. The user spits a sticky, rubbery substance from their mouth that wraps around a target and binds them completely. The defining property of Guruguru Gum is that it is self-tightening — the more the victim struggles and strains against it, the more constricting it becomes, making conventional attempts to break free actively counterproductive. The substance is magical in nature and cannot be torn or broken through ordinary physical force alone. A target with sufficient ki or magical power beyond a certain threshold can break through it, but for anyone below that ceiling it functions as an effectively inescapable restraint.
D
⚡ Power
Roshi's Mind Reading
A telepathic technique mastered by Master Roshi, one of the greatest martial arts minds in history. Allows the user to read the thoughts of any person within range without physical contact, accessing their surface thoughts, intentions, and memories at will. Can also be used to establish two-way mental communication between people across a distance. Particularly devastating in combat — an opponent's next move, strategy, and emotional state are transparent before they act. The one consistent limitation is that it fails entirely against beings of very low intelligence, as there is simply not enough coherent thought to read.
D
📦 Item
Jackie Chun's Full Outfit (21st Tournament)
The disguise outfit worn by Master Roshi during the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament under the alias Jackie Chun. A dark navy formal martial arts gi worn without a turtle shell, paired with dark sunglasses and a white wig glued firmly to the head — the complete ensemble of a man who entered a children's martial arts tournament in disguise to ensure his students never grew complacent from winning too easily. Simple, understated, and completely unconvincing to anyone paying attention. Adjusts to fit the wearer perfectly regardless of body type or size.
E
⚡ Power
Bacterian's Super Stench
The legendary hygiene-based fighting technique of Bacterian, one of the most feared competitors in the 21st World Martial Arts Tournament. A toggleable ability — when active, the user emits an overwhelming and all-encompassing stench produced by a complete and deliberate lifelong refusal to bathe, brush teeth, or practice any form of personal hygiene whatsoever. The odor is so catastrophically powerful that it functions as a genuine combat tool — opponents within range are overwhelmed by nausea, watering eyes, and complete loss of focus, rendering them unable to fight effectively regardless of their power level. The ability is entirely bypassed by anyone without a functioning sense of smell. When toggled off, the stench subsides entirely — and unlike the original Bacterian, whose filth was permanent and irreversible, the user retains the option to thoroughly wash and clean themselves while the ability is inactive, restoring normal hygiene for as long as they choose to maintain it. Toggling the ability back on gradually restores the stench to full potency over time.
D
📦 Item
Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Tuhon
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Tuhon — the grandmaster rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Tuhon is the guardian and master of the complete Pekiti Tirsia Kali system — a rank representing total mastery of one of the most combat-proven Filipino martial arts in existence. The system spans over 25 countries and is used to train military and law enforcement in Asia Pacific, India, and Europe. Grand Tuhon Leo T. Gaje Jr., the current guardian and source of the system, is a three-time Hall of Fame awardee and one of the greatest living legends of Filipino martial arts. The bearer receives the complete technical and tactical expression of Pekiti Tirsia Kali at its absolute highest level — a lifetime of combat-oriented knife and blade mastery with no equivalent in modern martial arts.
E
📦 Item
Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Mataas na Guro
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Mataas na Guro — the master instructor rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Mataas na Guro translates as respected teacher and represents a level of mastery sufficient to independently run a school and transmit the full system. The bearer has complete command of the Pekiti Tirsia Kali curriculum across all ranges — long, medium, and close — and across all weapon categories including the single blade, double blade, stick and blade combinations, and empty hand. The system's survival strategy and tactics have been field-tested and validated by special forces units across multiple countries, and the bearer's knife and blade fighting knowledge reflects this practical, combat-proven foundation.
F
📦 Item
Pekiti Tirsia Kali Grimoire — Lakan Guro
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a Lakan Guro — the assistant instructor rank of Pekiti Tirsia Kali, meaning Warrior Teacher. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Pekiti Tirsia Kali is a sacred family system originating in Negros Occidental, Philippines, with roots tracing back over 2,000 years, and is the only Filipino martial art officially recognized by the Philippine government and used to train the Marine Force-Recon Battalions of the Armed Forces of the Philippines. At Lakan Guro level the bearer has internalized the foundational curriculum of the system — the complete close quarters combat methodology centered on edged and impact weapon control, from the initial engagement through to finishing techniques.
C
📦 Item
Kyudo Grimoire — 10th Dan (Hanshi)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a Hanshi — the absolute pinnacle title in Kyudo, requiring both 8th Dan and the Kyoshi title, awarded only by election among the most senior masters of the art. The total number of Hanshi ever recognized in all of Kyudo's history numbers fewer than 20. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. At this level, the truth of Kyudo is transparent — every aspect of the art is expressed with absolute naturalness, as if the form and the person are one. The bearer receives the complete philosophical and technical mastery of the way of the bow as conceived by its greatest living exemplars. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the precision, control, and focused power of Kyudo at this level becomes something else entirely.
D
📦 Item
Kyudo Grimoire — 8th Dan (Kyoshi)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a Kyoshi — an 8th Dan master title in Kyudo, meaning professor of the philosophy of the art. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. At the 8th Dan level, the shooting has reached perfection in technique — every movement, every breath, every release is an expression of the art at its highest technical expression. The Kyoshi title requires holding the Renshi title, passing the 8th Dan examination with a pass rate that historically falls below one percent on any given attempt, and waiting years between examinations. The bearer possesses total mastery of Kyudo in both its technical and philosophical dimensions.
E
📦 Item
Kyudo Grimoire — 6th Dan (Renshi)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a Renshi — a 6th Dan instructor title in Kyudo, meaning polished instructor. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Excellence of technique is far more prominent than in previous levels — the bearer's shooting form flows naturally and is characterized by a high degree of refinement. The Renshi title is awarded not by examination alone but by selection and recommendation, recognizing both technical mastery and the character to transmit the art. The bearer possesses a complete and deeply internalized command of Kyudo, capable of reading and correcting the form of others with precision.
F
📦 Item
Kyudo Grimoire — 3rd Dan
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and form of a 3rd Dan practitioner of Kyudo, the Japanese way of the bow. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer has internalized the fundamental shooting sequence — the hassetsu, the eight stages of shooting — with consistent and correct form, stable posture, and proper breath control. At the 3rd Dan level the practitioner shoots with genuine composure and has begun to embody the principle that technique and spirit are inseparable. The knowledge encompasses both the physical and philosophical foundations that underpin Kyudo as a martial art.
D
📦 Item
Composite Bow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a composite bow master — the absolute peak of the tradition across all cultures that developed it, from the Mongols and Turks to the Persians and Scythians. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and fully refined command of the composite bow across all its applications — instinctive accuracy at range, mounted shooting in all directions, rapid fire at full gallop, and the ability to extract the maximum performance from the bow's exceptional power-to-size ratio. Turkish flight archers using the composite bow held world records for distance shooting for centuries. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the composite bow's combination of compact size and exceptional power becomes something medieval armies had no reliable answer for.
E
📦 Item
Composite Bow Grimoire — Mongol Horse Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a composite bow master — the absolute peak of the tradition across all cultures that developed it, from the Mongols and Turks to the Persians and Scythians. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and fully refined command of the composite bow across all its applications — instinctive accuracy at range, mounted shooting in all directions, rapid fire at full gallop, and the ability to extract the maximum performance from the bow's exceptional power-to-size ratio. Turkish flight archers using the composite bow held world records for distance shooting for centuries. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the composite bow's combination of compact size and exceptional power becomes something medieval armies had no reliable answer for.
E
📦 Item
Composite Bow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent composite bow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The composite bow — constructed from layers of wood, horn, and sinew — is one of the most technologically sophisticated bows in history, producing significantly more power and range from a shorter length than a simple wooden bow. The bearer gains foundational composite bow technique — the Mongolian thumb draw, proper use of the thumb ring, correct posture and anchor, and accurate shooting at combat distances. The composite bow's compact size makes it well-suited to mounted use and confined spaces where longer bows cannot function.
D
📦 Item
Recurve Bow Grimoire — Olympic Champion
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of an Olympic and World Champion level recurve archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Olympic recurve is the only bow form permitted in the Olympic Games, and the athletes who reach champion level represent the absolute technical ceiling of the form. The bearer gains complete mastery — perfect form, a completely consistent and repeatable shot cycle, near-perfect groupings at 70 meters under full competition conditions, the ability to read and adapt to wind in real time, and the mental discipline to perform at the highest level under maximum pressure. Combined with any significant physical enhancement, the recurve bow at this level can be pushed far beyond what any human body currently allows.
E
📦 Item
Recurve Bow Grimoire — National Competitor
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a national-level competitive recurve archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains the refined technical skill and mental composure of an archer who has competed and placed at national championship level — consistent groupings at 70 meters, mastery of the stabilizer and sight system, complete command of the release and follow-through under competition pressure, and the ability to perform with precision in variable wind conditions. At this level, the recurve bow is pushed to the peak of what the archer's body and technique can deliver.
F
📦 Item
Recurve Bow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent recurve bow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational recurve technique — correct stance and posture, proper finger draw and anchor point, consistent release, and accurate shooting at standard competition distances. The recurve bow's curved limb design stores more energy than a straight bow for its size, making it faster and more powerful at shorter lengths. At competent level the bearer can shoot reliably and accurately, and understands the bow's mechanics well enough to maintain and tune it independently.
D
📦 Item
Crossbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a master crossbow operator — the absolute ceiling of what can be achieved with the weapon across all its forms and traditions. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains total command of the crossbow in every form — from light hunting crossbows to heavy siege weapons — with instinctive accuracy, perfected reloading speed, and deep knowledge of bolt types, trajectories, and effective engagement scenarios. Combined with extraordinary physical strength, the already formidable penetrating power of a heavy crossbow becomes even more devastating.
E
📦 Item
Crossbow Grimoire — Marksman
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of an expert crossbow marksman. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. At marksman level, the bearer has fully mastered the crossbow's accuracy potential — capable of consistent precision hits at extended range, rapid reloading through refined technique, effective engagement of moving targets, and the tactical knowledge to use the weapon's high penetrating power and mechanical precision to maximum effect. Medieval crossbows at full power could penetrate plate armor at close range and were accurate enough for individual target selection at distances that challenged even experienced longbowmen.
F
📦 Item
Crossbow Grimoire — Competent Operator
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent crossbow operator. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The crossbow's key advantage in history was its accessibility — it could be taught to an untrained soldier in days where the longbow required years. At competent level, the bearer has mastered the full mechanics of the crossbow — spanning, loading, aiming with a simple sight system, and effective engagement at combat range. They understand bolt selection, maintenance, and the tactical use of cover to compensate for the slow reload time. Effective against armored and unarmored opponents alike within range.
D
📦 Item
Shortbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a shortbow master — the absolute peak of what has been achieved with a shortbow across all traditions. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a complete and refined command of the shortbow across all its applications — instinctive close-range accuracy, rapid fire at speed, mounted shooting in all directions, and the ability to exploit the shortbow's unique maneuverability advantages to their fullest. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical speed and coordination, the shortbow's rate of fire and close-range precision become a genuinely lethal combination.
E
📦 Item
Shortbow Grimoire — Mounted Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a skilled mounted shortbow archer — the Mongol horse archer tradition, considered the most complete expression of shortbow mastery in history. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Mongol horse archers trained from early childhood and could deliver accurate fire in any direction from a galloping horse — including the famed Parthian shot, firing backwards at full gallop while retreating. The bearer gains the full skill set of this tradition — the Mongolian thumb draw producing faster reloading than finger draw techniques, accurate fire at the gallop in all directions, target selection and range estimation at speed, and the tactical understanding of mobile archery that helped the Mongol armies conquer from the Pacific to central Europe.
F
📦 Item
Shortbow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge of a competent shortbow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains solid foundational shortbow technique — proper thumb draw or finger draw depending on tradition, accurate shooting at close to medium range, rapid reloading, and the maneuvering advantage the shortbow's compact size provides in close quarters and mounted situations. The shortbow's lower draw weight and shorter length make it faster to draw and easier to use on horseback than a longbow, at the cost of range and penetrating power. Effective and reliable against unarmored opponents within its range.
D
📦 Item
Longbow Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a longbow master — the Howard Hill tier, the absolute peak of what a human being can achieve with a longbow. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Howard Hill, widely regarded as the greatest longbow archer in recorded history, could hit a target thrown into the air, split an arrow at range with a second, and consistently drive arrows clean through large game at hunting distances. The bearer gains a lifetime of mastery — instinctive aiming without sights, perfect mechanical release through the back muscles alone, the ability to gauge range and wind intuitively, and the speed and accuracy to deliver rapid effective fire in any conditions. Combined with extraordinary physical strength, the penetrating power and range of the longbow at this level is genuinely staggering.
E
📦 Item
Longbow Grimoire — War Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of an elite English war longbow archer — the longbowman who shaped medieval warfare at Crécy, Poitiers, and Agincourt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. English war archers began training in childhood and were typically considered fit for full duty only by the age of 21, with skeletons showing significant skeletal deformation from years of high-poundage drawing. The bearer gains the full skill set of a professional war archer — capable of loosing 10 to 12 accurate arrows per minute with a 130 to 160 pound draw weight bow, penetrating chainmail and some plate armor at 250 yards, and sustaining this rate through an extended engagement. Against any unarmored opponent at range, the result is not in question.
F
📦 Item
Longbow Grimoire — Competent Archer
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and physical conditioning of a competent English war longbow archer. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a functional foundation in war longbow technique — correct stance, the English pressing method of drawing using the chest and back rather than the arms alone, proper arrow selection, and the ability to draw and loose accurately at combat distances. The war longbow requires a draw weight of between 80 and 160 pounds — demanding years of conditioning that physically reshapes the skeleton. At competent level, the bearer can draw consistently and accurately enough to contribute to a volley formation and engage individual targets at moderate range.
D
📦 Item
Sumo Grimoire — Yokozuna (Grand Champion)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of a Yokozuna — the Grand Champion rank of professional sumo, the highest title a wrestler can achieve. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Only 75 wrestlers have ever been awarded this rank across all of recorded sumo history. Promotion requires not just two consecutive tournament championships but a demonstration of the dignity, bearing, and dominance befitting the sport's living embodiment of its ideals. Unlike every rank below it, Yokozuna cannot be demoted — a holder who can no longer perform at the required level is expected to retire. The bearer receives the complete physical and technical expression of sumo at its highest level — explosive tachi-ai, overwhelming forward pressure, mastery of every kimarite in the canon, and the ability to control any opponent's movement from the moment of contact. Combined with any significant physical ability beyond the human norm, the power, leverage, and technique of a Yokozuna scales to something else entirely.
E
📦 Item
Sumo Grimoire — Ozeki
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of an Ozeki — the second highest rank in professional sumo, requiring a minimum of 33 wins across three consecutive elite tournaments for promotion. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Only a handful of active wrestlers hold this rank at any given time. The bearer gains the refined technical mastery and championship-level fighting instincts of a wrestler who has consistently defeated Yokozuna and all competition below. At the Ozeki level, every throw, push, and grip is executed with total efficiency — the bearer can change tactics mid-bout in an instant, exploit micro-imbalances in an opponent's posture, and generate devastating force through proper weight transfer and timing rather than raw strength alone.
F
📦 Item
Sumo Grimoire — Maegashira
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge, technique, and physical conditioning of a Maegashira — the entry rank of the top Makuuchi division in professional sumo. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains the complete technical foundation of elite professional sumo — mastery of the full range of the 82 official kimarite techniques, including throws, trips, pushes, and lifts, combined with the powerful forward-driving tachi-ai charge, precise footwork within the dohyo, and the ability to read and exploit an opponent's balance in real time. Every Maegashira has earned their place by dominating every division below the top and surviving a grueling schedule against the best wrestlers in the world. Against any untrained opponent, there is no contest.
D
📦 Item
Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Master
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a catch wrestling master — the Karl Gotch and Billy Robinson tier, the highest level the art has ever produced. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Karl Gotch, known in Japan as the God of Wrestling, and Billy Robinson, regarded as one of the most technically complete grapplers who ever lived, represent the absolute ceiling of catch-as-catch-can. The bearer gains a complete lifetime of refined catch wrestling knowledge — every takedown, control position, pin, submission, counter, and re-counter executed with the total economy of motion and tactical depth that defines grandmaster level grappling. Billy Robinson famously stated that the key to catch wrestling is learning how to learn — at this level, every combat situation encountered becomes an opportunity to adapt and counter in real time. Combined with any significant physical ability, the principles of this art scale without limit.
E
📦 Item
Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Professional Competitor
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a professional catch wrestling competitor. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Catch wrestling at the professional level was historically contested in carnival athletic shows and professional bouts where the full range of submission holds — armbars, kimuras, heel hooks, toe holds, neck cranks, and countless others — were not just permitted but expected. The bearer gains a complete and battle-tested grappling arsenal built around the pin-and-submit methodology, seamless transitions between positions, advanced control rides, and the ability to apply submissions from virtually any position. The emphasis on improvisation and adaptability makes this a uniquely dangerous style in unpredictable real-world situations.
F
📦 Item
Catch Wrestling Grimoire — Competent Practitioner
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a competent catch wrestling practitioner. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer gains a fully functional foundation in catch-as-catch-can wrestling — solid single and double leg takedowns, breakdowns, control positions, basic pins, fundamental submission holds including the armbar, kimura, toe hold, and rear naked choke, and the escapes and reversals needed to survive on the ground. Unlike sport wrestling styles, every technique is oriented toward real combat with no restrictions on joints or submissions. Against any untrained opponent on the ground, the result is not in question.
D
📦 Item
Boxing Grimoire — Undisputed Champion
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of an undisputed world champion in professional boxing. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Undisputed status — holding all four major world titles simultaneously across the World Boxing Association, World Boxing Council, International Boxing Federation, and World Boxing Organization — is one of the rarest achievements in all of sport. In the modern four-belt era, fewer than a handful of fighters have ever accomplished it. The bearer gains the complete mastery of a fighter who has beaten every credible challenger their weight class has produced — flawless technical execution under maximum pressure, championship-level conditioning, an intuitive ability to adapt mid-fight, and the psychological fortitude to perform when everything is on the line. Combined with extraordinary physical attributes, the boxing knowledge in this grimoire scales without limit.
E
📦 Item
Boxing Grimoire — Contender
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a ranked professional boxing contender. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. A ranked contender has navigated the professional circuit long enough to earn a top fifteen position in their weight class from one of boxing's four major sanctioning bodies — the World Boxing Association, the World Boxing Council, the International Boxing Federation, or the World Boxing Organization. The bearer gains the full skill set of a fighter one or two bouts away from a world title shot — refined defensive technique, sharp counter-punching instincts, the ability to cut off the ring and control distance, and the mental composure to perform under sustained pressure. Against anyone short of elite professional level, the result is rarely in doubt.
F
📦 Item
Boxing Grimoire — Golden Gloves
grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a National Golden Gloves champion in amateur boxing. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The Golden Gloves is the most prestigious amateur boxing tournament in the United States, founded in 1923, with alumni including Muhammad Ali, Joe Louis, Sugar Ray Robinson, and Joe Frazier. The bearer gains the complete technical foundation of elite amateur boxing — precise footwork, sharp defensive head movement, accurate combination punching, ring generalship, and the conditioning to sustain three hard rounds. A Golden Gloves champion has fought through regional, state, and national elimination rounds against the best amateur fighters in the country. Against any untrained opponent, the skill gap is total.
C
📦 Item
Judo Grimoire — 10th Dan Red Belt (Judan)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Judo Judan — a 10th degree red belt, the absolute pinnacle of Judo. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Only 21 people have ever received this rank from the Kodokan and the International Judo Federation combined across all of Judo's history, with the minimum age for consideration being 70 years old. The bearer receives the complete technical and philosophical mastery of Judo at its highest possible expression — every throw, pin, choke, armlock, and kata executed with the total refinement of a lifetime dedicated entirely to the art. At this level, Judo is no longer just a martial art but a living philosophy of maximum efficiency and minimum effort applied to every interaction. Combined with any significant physical ability, the principles of leverage, timing, and redirection contained in this grimoire scale without ceiling.
C
📦 Item
Taekwondo Grimoire — 9th Dan Black Belt (Grandmaster)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a Taekwondo 9th Dan — the Grandmaster rank, the highest level awarded to living practitioners by recognized federations worldwide. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Fewer than 300 people have ever achieved this rank across all of Taekwondo's history. Reaching it requires a minimum of 40 to 60 years of uninterrupted training, teaching, and contribution to the art, with promotion decided not by testing but by unanimous vote of a council of senior grandmasters. The bearer receives complete mastery of every poomsae, sparring principle, breaking technique, and self-defense application in the Taekwondo curriculum, alongside the strategic and philosophical depth that only a lifetime of practice and teaching can produce. Kicks executed at this level are devastatingly fast, precise, and efficient — and in the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the art's emphasis on explosive lower body power and angular attacks becomes something else entirely.
C
📦 Item
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — 9th Degree Red Belt (Grandmaster)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 9th degree red belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu — a Grandmaster rank held by fewer than 55 people in the entire history of the art. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Reaching this rank requires a minimum of 48 years as a black belt and a lifetime of contribution to the art. The bearer receives the complete technical and philosophical mastery of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu at its absolute peak — every technique, position, submission, escape, and transition executed with the total refinement of a grandmaster. Combined with any significant physical ability, the grappling knowledge contained in this grimoire scales without limit.
D
📦 Item
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — 6th Degree Black Bel
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 6th degree black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu — the highest achievable black belt rank before the coral belt. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Reaching the 6th degree requires a minimum of 31 years as a black belt. The bearer possesses a complete and deeply refined understanding of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu across every dimension — technique, strategy, teaching methodology, and combat application. Every movement is executed with the effortless precision of a lifetime practitioner. In the hands of someone with extraordinary physical capability, the leverage and submission principles of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu at this level become something else entirely.
E
📦 Item
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — 1st Degree Black Belt
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 1st degree black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. Black belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu is among the rarest and hardest earned in all martial arts — typically requiring 10 to 15 years of serious training. The bearer has complete command of the entire Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu curriculum, can fight effectively from any position, and has internalized the art's core principle of using leverage and technique to defeat larger, stronger opponents. The 1st degree represents the beginning of true mastery.
F
📦 Item
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu Grimoire — Purple Belt (2 Stripe)
A grimoire containing the complete knowledge and muscle memory of a 2-stripe purple belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu. Upon reading, the knowledge transfers instantly and the grimoire turns to ash. The bearer has internalized a wide and well-rounded foundation of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu — guard passing, sweeps, submissions from multiple positions, escapes, and transitions. A 2-stripe purple belt can hold their own against most practitioners below their level and begin to develop their own personal game. Dangerous on the ground against any untrained opponent.

`; const blob = new Blob([table], { type: 'application/vnd.ms-excel;charset=utf-8' }); const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob); const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url; a.download = 'gacha_entries.xls'; a.click(); URL.revokeObjectURL(url); }; function getSearchTerms(raw) { return String(raw || '').toLowerCase().trim().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean); } function buildHighlightRegex(terms) { if (!terms.length) return null; const escaped = [...new Set(terms)].sort((a, b) => b.length - a.length).map(term => term.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')); return new RegExp('(' + escaped.join('|') + ')', 'gi'); } function enhancedHighlight(text, terms) { const regex = buildHighlightRegex(terms); const safe = escHtml(text); return regex ? safe.replace(regex, '$1') : safe; } function enhancedHandleSearch() { const raw = document.getElementById('search').value; const terms = getSearchTerms(raw); let visible = 0; document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(entry => { const typeMatch = currentFilter === 'all' || entry.dataset.type === currentFilter; const haystack = (entry.dataset.name + ' ' + entry.dataset.desc).toLowerCase(); const textMatch = !terms.length || terms.every(term => haystack.includes(term)); if (typeMatch && textMatch) { entry.classList.remove('hidden'); visible += 1; entry.querySelector('.entry-name').innerHTML = enhancedHighlight(entry.dataset.name, terms); entry.querySelector('.entry-desc').innerHTML = enhancedHighlight(entry.dataset.desc, terms); } else { entry.classList.add('hidden'); } }); if (terms.length) { document.querySelectorAll('.rank-section').forEach(section => { if (section.querySelectorAll('.entry:not(.hidden)').length > 0) section.style.display = 'block'; else section.style.display = 'none'; }); document.getElementById('search-results-count').textContent = visible + ' result' + (visible !== 1 ? 's' : ''); } else { document.querySelectorAll('.rank-section').forEach(section => section.style.display = 'block'); document.getElementById('search-results-count').textContent = ''; document.querySelectorAll('.entry').forEach(entry => { if (!entry.classList.contains('hidden') || currentFilter !== 'all') { entry.querySelector('.entry-name').innerHTML = escHtml(entry.dataset.name); entry.querySelector('.entry-desc').innerHTML = escHtml(entry.dataset.desc); } }); } } handleSearch = enhancedHandleSearch; highlight = function (text, q) { return enhancedHighlight(text, getSearchTerms(q)); }; function upgradeSearchInput() { const oldInput = document.getElementById('search'); if (!oldInput || oldInput.dataset.enhancedSearch === 'true') return; const replacement = oldInput.cloneNode(true); replacement.value = oldInput.value; replacement.dataset.enhancedSearch = 'true'; replacement.oninput = enhancedHandleSearch; oldInput.replaceWith(replacement); } const originalRebuildBrowse = rebuildBrowse; rebuildBrowse = function () { originalRebuildBrowse(); addSpreadsheetButtons(); upgradeSearchInput(); }; addSpreadsheetButtons(); upgradeSearchInput(); })();
